Name: Verallia
Description:
At Verallia, our purpose is to re-imagine glass for a sustainable future. We want to redefine how glass is produced, reused and recycled, to make it the world’s most sustainable packaging material. We work in common cause with our customers, suppliers and other partners across the value chain to develop new healthy and sustainable solutions for all. With around 10,000 people and 32 glass production facilities in 11 countries, we are the leading European and the third largest producer globally of glass containers for food and beverages, providing innovative, customized and environmentally friendly solutions to more than 10,000 businesses around the world. Verallia produced more than 16 billion bottles and jars and achieved revenues of €2.7 billion in 2021. 

Verallia is listed on compartment A of the Euronext Paris stock exchange (Ticker: VRLA – ISIN: FR0013447729) and belongs to the SBF 120, CAC Mid 60, CAC Mid & Small et CAC All-Tradable indexes.

Name: LAV
Description:
Gürok Grubu’nun yenilikçilik anlayışıyla geliştirilerek sofra camı sektörüne adım atan LAV, grubun 1948 yılına uzanan gücünü şirketin gelecek hedefleri doğrultusunda, üretimden pazarlamaya kadar yenilikçi, dinamik ve teknolojiye değer veren bir çalışma anlayışı ile sektöre “deneyimli, modern ve genç” bir yaklaşımla hizmet sunmayı hedeflemektedir.

Logosundan ambalaj tasarımına kadar her açıdan yepyeni bir marka olarak tasarlanan LAV, kadınlar başta olmak üzere tüm kullanıcılarının en samimi, en tarz arkadaşı olmayı hedeflemektedir. Adını cam şekillendirmenin en önemli enerjisi ateş ve camın hammaddesinin bir araya geldiği kızgın cam hamurundan almaktadır.

Üretimini Kütahya’da gerçekleştiren LAV, toplam 300 bin metrekare alan üzerinde kurulu 2 üretim tesisinde günde 2 milyon adede ulaşan üretimi ile dünya üreticileri arasında 5. sırada yer almaktadır. 2000 kişinin istihdam edildiği tesislerde, toplam 3500 kalem üretim gerçekleştirilirken, ürünler başta Fransa, İspanya olmak üzere, Brezilya’dan Çin ve Filipinler’e kadar dünyanın 140 ülkesine ihraç edilmektedir.

Ayrıca, 2001 yılında kurulan Gürok Teknopark bünyesinde cam üretimiyle ilgili yeni teknolojiler üzerinde çalışmalar yapılmakta; cam üretiminin yanı sıra üretim yapan makinelerin tasarım ve üretimi süreçleri de burada yürütülmektedir. Kendi teknolojisini sürekli geliştirme amacıyla çalışan birim, 2003 yılında devreye alınan ve ikinci fırına bağlı olan tüm cam şekillendirme makinelerinin mekanik ve elektrik-elektronik süreçlerinin yanı sıra üretimini de sürdürmektedir. 
  
https://www.facebook.com/LAVTurkiye/ 
https://twitter.com/LAVTURKIYE
https://instagram.com/lavturkiye/

Name: SAVERGLASS
Description:
Saverglass, a world leader in the design, production, customization and decoration of high-end bottles for the premium and ultra-premium spirits and wine markets, is a privileged partner of the world's leading spirits and wine brands, as well as emerging brands committed to the quality and exclusivity of their packaging.

From its six glass plants and four decoration units benefiting from leading-edge technologies, and thanks to the professionalism, ongoing training and passion for excellence of its 3,900 employees, Saverglass sells over 700 million bottles to more than 4,000 customers in some 100 countries, and is committed to its longstanding sustainable development strategy with the objective of reducing its carbon footprint by 50% by 2035.

Name: Arc
Description:
For more than 200 years, we have been beautifying tables around the world.

World leader in tableware, the Arc group creates everyday innovative and sustainable glass solutions to enjoy eating, drinking and home experiences. 

Through its Luminarc, Arcoroc, Cristal d'Arques Paris and Chef&Sommelier brands, Arc is aimed at both individuals and professionals. The Group is present in many markets, in particular that of mass distribution, hotels, restaurants, bars and cafes, wine merchants, and collective catering. Arc is also actively contributing to the transition to a new circular economy model, including offering innovative and sustainable glass containers as alternatives to single-use plastic.

With production sites in France, the United States, China and the United Arab Emirates, the Group produces more than 4 million items every day. Arc employs 6100 people, including 3750 in France, and generated sales of 688 million euros in 2024.

By joining Arc, you will experience a wonderful human and entrepreneurial adventure in a historic company that has been combining tradition and modernity for more than 200 years.

Name: Wheaton Brasil Vidros
Description: With over a century experience in the production of glass packaging, and established in Brazil since 1952, the Wheaton Brasil Group acts in the world market of glass packaging and tableware, and its present in the daily life of families in Brazil and other 40 countries. Presently, the company is the country’s leader and one of the five biggest plants in the world supplying glass packaging for the perfumery, cosmetics and pharmaceutical industries.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: AGP eGlass
Description:
AGP eGlass is part of AGP Group, one of the world’s leading glazing manufacturers with a large portfolio of products for the automotive, marine, and security markets. 

With a value proposition focused on anticipating and responding to the latest trends of the industry – such as electrification, connectivity, shared mobility, autonomous driving, digitalization and well-being – eGlass provides high-tech glazing solutions for more than 20 automotive brands that are shaping the future of sustainable mobility. 

AGP has seven manufacturing plants, three AVOs, and four Tech Innovation Centers in Europe, North and South America as well as commercial offices in 20 countries. With more than 4,000 employees from over 60 different nationalities, the company delivers solutions to make the world cleaner, safer, and more enjoyable.

Name: Verallia Brasil
Description:
Verallia Brasil offers innovative, customized and sustainable glass packaging solutions for the food and beverage industry. . Our purpose is to reimagine glass for a sustainable future. We want to redefine how glass is produced, reused and recycled to make it the most sustainable packaging material in the world. We work in common cause with our customers, suppliers and other partners across the value chain to develop new healthy and sustainable solutions for all.

Verallia Brasil has three factories located in the cities of Campo Bom (RS), Jacutinga (MG) and Porto Ferreira (SP) and also provides its customers with a Creation Center for the development of new products at its headquarters in São Paulo. In all of its production processes, Verallia seeks to optimize water and energy consumption, control atmospheric emissions, encourage social development and create new options in glass packaging that require less raw material and that , at the same time, stimulate and facilitate the recycling chain.

 Verallia Brasil is part of an independent group that is a European leader and one of the world's three largest manufacturers of glass packaging with around 10,000 employees and 32 factories in 11 countries, five technical centers and 13 product development centers, serving more than 10 thousand customers worldwide. Verallia produced over 16 billion glass bottles and jars and achieved global revenues of €2.7 billion in 2021.

Name: VILUX SA
Description: Con casi cinco décadas en el mercado nacional y presencia en las ciudades de Minga Guazu, Encarnación, Pedro Juan Caballero y Asunción, nuestro liderazgo en el procesamiento del vidrio lo compartimos hoy poniendo a su alcance productos innovadores y de gran calidad para la construcción.

Name: Gold Plus Glass Industry Ltd.
Description: Gold Plus Glass Industry Limited is a leading manufacturer and supplier of high-quality float glasses. Established in 1985, the company has a rich history of providing top-notch glass solutions to its customers. With a focus on quality and innovation, Gold Plus Glass Industry Limited offers a wide range of float glasses including clear float glass, tinted glass, reflective glass, aluminum coated mirror, silver coated mirror, frosted glass, architectural glass, automotive glass and industrial glass that cater to diverse needs and requirements. The company has state-of-the-art production facilities at Roorkee Uttarakhand and Belagavi Karnataka and a team of experienced professionals who ensure that each product meets the highest standards of quality. Gold Plus Glass is the first BIS-certified company in India, Choose Gold Plus Glass Industry Limited for all your glass needs, and experience the best in class products and services.

Name: Emirates Float Glass LLC
Description:
Emirates Float Glass (EFG) LLC, a greenfield venture based in Abu Dhabi, the EFG production facilities have a 320,000 sqm plot at a cost of AED 692 million, and have a design capacity to produce 600 tons per day of clear molten glass. it is first integrated glass manufacturing and processing facility in the UAE, providing world class standards and practices in its delivery commitments. EFG LLC has long-term plans to consolidate and emerge as a leader in this business segment.

Dubai Investments (DI) is a world-class company that invests in viable and profitable entities. The Company has an enviable track record and has shown leadership in all fields of investment activities in the United Arab Emirates and the Middle East.  With over 21,500 shareholders, and paid-up capital of AED 3.2 billion, it is the largest investment company listed on Dubai Financial Market. Its prudent use of capital and sound management skills enables DI to establish, acquire, or strategically participate in successful corporate ventures throughout the region.

Name: City Glass
Description:
City Glass was first established in 1986 , with a mission to produce high quality glass products made of premium quality materials of Soda-Lime glass with the use of latest technology. It consists of factories with various production types from handmade, half automated and automated press. These types of production are categorized in to four brands;
We move too fast, and experience too little. There are many special moments hidden in our daily lives, but we tend to overlook them. We believe that those brief moments are what makes our lives more exciting. Through useful, affordable and simple design.
Here at City Glass, we highly value our customers as well as our craft of glass making.
Through City Glass Products we aim to provide highly artistic products, that resemble the historical art of glass cutting.
Our products will play both decorative and functional items paired with our high quality standards, value for design and attention to our clients needs,
We hope to satisfy customers whom appreciate the original glass artisans in which there work was the inspiration to City Glass .

Name: SOTUVER
Description:
Established in 1963, SOTUVER is regarded as one of the leading players in the hollow glass industry in the Mediterranean basin.

For years, SOTUVER has embarked on a marketing development strategy focused on strengthening its sales in the local market and an increasing presence in its export markets.
Thus, in addition to the local market, its products serve the European markets (France, Italy, Spain …), North Africa, Sub-Saharan Africa, Middle East, as for others destinations.

The company produces a wide range of glass packaging in a variety of colors (Flint, Mid flint, Emerald Green and Antic Green) in the agri-food industry, including oils, wines, liquors and spirits, Beer, Mineral waters, soft drinks, juices as well as jars.
Apart of the standard models, SOTUVER offers customized bottles and possibly with ACL printing adapted to customers’ needs.

Name: Verallia France
Description:
Chez Verallia, notre raison d’être est de réimaginer le verre pour construire un avenir durable. Nous voulons redéfinir la façon dont le verre est produit, réutilisé et recyclé, pour en faire le matériau d'emballage le plus durable au monde. Nous faisons cause commune avec nos clients, nos fournisseurs et d'autres partenaires tout au long de notre chaîne de valeur pour développer de nouvelles solutions saines et durables pour tous. 

Avec environ 11 000 collaborateurs et 34 usines verrières dans 12 pays, nous sommes le leader européen et le troisième producteur mondial de l’emballage en verre pour les boissons et les produits alimentaires et offrons des solutions innovantes, personnalisées et respectueuses de l’environnement à plus de 10 000 entreprises dans le monde. 
Verallia produit plus de 17 milliards de bouteilles et pots en verre et a réalisé 3,5 milliards d’euros de chiffre d’affaires en 2024. Verallia est coté sur le compartiment A du marché réglementé d'Euronext Paris (Ticker : VRLA – ISIN : FR0013447729) et figure dans les indices suivants : SBF 120, CAC Mid 60, CAC Mid & Small et CAC All-Tradable. Pour plus d’informations : www.verallia.fr

Name: Verallia UK
Description:
We are immensely proud that Verallia is trusted to create ground-breaking glass packaging for many world-leading brands of food and drink. With over a century of glassmaking experience and unwavering dedication to meeting the needs of every customer, it is faith well founded.

Verallia is a company renowned for taking glass packaging to new levels of quality and sophistication, and we see every new challenge as an opportunity to further enhance our reputation for award-winning creativity.

Name: Arc Middle East LLC
Description:
ARC Middle East LLC is a glass manufacturing company based in Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates. Arc Middle East founded in 2005 has its headquarters in France. 

About the Group:
Arc was founded in 1825 in Arques, France, which is still home to the group’s global headquarters and one of the world’s largest glass production plants. Today, Arc’s footprint extends across the world, with factories in the USA, China and the UAE and sales in over 160 countries. For nearly 200 years, we have continuously evolved and have stayed at the forefront of the industry by innovating manufacturing techniques, incorporating cutting-edge technologies, developing and improving new designs and materials, and pushing the boundaries of our own creative visions. All of these key areas of focus have helped us to grow to become a world leader in the tabletop industry. Over the decades, we are proud to have created long relationships with a multitude of well known large globalists to independents; from candle jars to custom promotional beverage glasses, to collections for some of the largest US retailers, to beautiful and durable tableware for a plethora of hospitality partners. Our Luminarc, Arcoroc, Cristal d'Arques Paris and Chef&Sommelier brands are designed for both individuals and professionals.

Committed to a Corporate Social Responsibility approach, the Arc group invested 4.1 million euros in research & development in 2019 and reduced its CO2 emissions by 26% per ton of glass produced between 2010
Location: RAS AL KHAIMAH, Ras Al Khaimah

Name: PKO do Brasil
Description: A PKO do Brasil é uma empresa que atua nos setores de vidros e pedras para diversos segmentos do mercado, em todas as regiões do Brasil. Criada há mais de 10 anos, a PKO funciona em duas unidades altamente equipadas e é reconhecida pela qualidade dos produtos e pelo profissionalismo de seus colaboradores.

Name: Vidroforte Industry and Trade of Glass Ltd
Description: With worldwide technology in special glass processing, Grupo Vidroforte is a supplier of automotive (assembly and spare parts), civil construction (tempered, laminated and insulated), special (trains, subways, nautical vessels, agricultural machinery), antivandalism and safety, besides the line of appliances and furniture. The group has the companies Templex and Vidroforte Transportes, four distribution units (SP, MG, PR, GO) and businesses around the globe.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: RIEDEL - The Wine Glass Company
Description:
If your wine could choose a glass, it would be RIEDEL.

As a leading brand in the glassware industry, RIEDEL is best-known for the creation and development of grape varietal-specific stemware.

RIEDEL was the first manufacturer to recognize that the taste and aroma of a beverage is affected by the shape of the glass from which it is consumed.

Founded in 1756 and pioneering varietal-specific stemware since 1958, RIEDEL has become the brand of choice for wine connoisseurs, sommeliers, and hospitality professionals globally.

To this day, RIEDEL remains a family-run business, owned and operated by Georg and Maximilian J. Riedel – the 10th and 11th generation of the RIEDEL glassmaking legacy.

RIEDEL glassware is distributed worldwide and can be found in top-rated wineries, hotels, and restaurants around the world.

RIEDEL produces collections for every lifestyle and price range, whether for critical wine evaluation, a picnic or dinner. There is a series for every wine lover, including the popular RIEDEL Veloce, RIEDEL Performance, and many more.

A RIEDEL glass turns a sip of wine into a celebration.

Name: DWK Life Sciences
Description:
DWK Life Sciences is a leading global manufacturer and supplier of precision labware as well as primary packaging solutions for Life Science Research, Diagnostics and Pharmaceutical markets. 
The company´s offering includes over 35,000 glass and plastics products, manufactured at 12 sites, marketed under the acclaimed brands DURAN, WHEATON and KIMBLE. Its world-leading and trusted glass is complemented by an innovative research and life science portfolio. 
Worldwide, 1,900 people are dedicated to developing and delivering superior products and services to meet the high expectations of customers in laboratories and production environments around the world.

Name: LG Advanced Materials (LG PuroTec)
Description: The new standard in antimicrobial glass. Our innovative solution takes surface sanitation to new heights with enhanced antimicrobial performance.

Name: Glass Open Book
Description:
Welcome to Glass Open Book (GOB), the glass industry community with thousands of followers in more than 100 countries and territories worldwide. GOB's mission is to unite glass industry professionals. Thus, the platform provides ample opportunities to search for everything necessary for glass production and processing - from glass manufacturing machinery and equipment, raw materials and consumables to technical assistance, online tools and digital services. 

Glass Open Book (GOB) is equally useful for the glass industry professionals involved in Production, Engineering, Sales, Marketing, Purchasing, Training, HR, R&D, QA, IT, Business Development and so many more, as well as for those who are looking for a job in the glass industry or want to increase their professional competence in the field of glassmaking.

Glass Open Book - new era of glass industry networking, brand building and business communication.

Join us!

Name: Sans Souci
Description: Bohemian designer of bespoke high-end lighting and decorative glass features. Founded in 2005 by Martin Cháb, the company has become synonymous with cutting-edge luxury creations, developing over the years into a leader in the decorative lighting market thanks to its forward-looking approach, innovative designs and pioneering use of nanotechnologies. With stunning projects spanning the entire world, from Burj Al Arab in Dubai to Claridge's in London, Sans Souci presents the right choice for anyone desiring a one-of-a-kind lighting solution.

Name: Verallia Italia
Description:
In Verallia, il nostro scopo è ripensare il vetro per costruire un futuro sostenibile. Vogliamo ridefinire il modo in cui il vetro viene prodotto, riutilizzato e riciclato, per renderlo il materiale di imballaggio più sostenibile al mondo. Uniamo le forze con i nostri clienti, fornitori e altri partner in tutta la nostra catena del valore per sviluppare nuove soluzioni sane e sostenibili per tutti.
Con circa 10.000 dipendenti e 35 stabilimenti che producono packaging in vetro in 12 Paesi, siamo il leader europeo e il terzo produttore mondiale di imballaggi in vetro per bevande e prodotti alimentari e offriamo soluzioni innovative, personalizzate e rispettose dell'ambiente a più di 10.000 aziende in tutto il mondo.
Verallia produce più di 16 miliardi di bottiglie e barattoli di vetro e ha generato vendite per 3,9 miliardi di euro nel 2023. 
In Italia può contare sulla forza di 7 stabilimenti produttivi e sulla passione ed esperienza di oltre 1600 dipendenti.

Name: Fanavid
Description:
Fundada em 1963 por Mansur José Farhat, a Fanavid está presente no mercado automotivo desde o início de suas atividades. Em 2003 a empresa expandiu seus negócios para incluir a produção de vidros blindados, tornando-se a única empresa 100% brasileira presente em todos os segmentos automotivos.

E a Fanavid não parou por aí, em 2007 a empresa consolidou sua presença no setor de arquitetura e construção com a aquisição da Santa Marina Vitrage, tornando-se uma referência em vidros e soluções também para construção civil.

Recentemente, em dezembro de 2022, a Fanavid passou por uma transformação cultural focada em novos valores e performance juntamente à Falconi Consultoria. Isso significa que a empresa está comprometida em melhorar ainda mais, não só seus produtos e serviços, mas também sua relação com clientes e colaboradores. Essa iniciativa reflete o compromisso da Fanavid em ser uma empresa moderna e inovadora, sempre buscando novas soluções e maneiras de atender às necessidades de seus clientes.

Em resumo, a Fanavid é uma empresa com uma história rica, que se expandiu ao longo dos anos, e agora é líder em vários setores. Seus valores e compromisso em oferecer qualidade e segurança são evidentes em seus produtos e serviços. Se você está procurando por uma empresa confiável, com soluções criativas e um time comprometido, a Fanavid é a escolha certa.

Name: VIDRAK
Description:
Há quase uma década, a Vidrak é referência nacional em visores industriais, com a experiência de mais de 30 anos dos nossos líderes.

Oferecemos soluções para máquinas, caldeiras e fornos, além de serviços de inspeção e manutenção com tecnologia exclusiva para otimizar sua produção.

Conheça nossos produtos e serviços no nosso site!

Name: Verallia Spain
Description:
En Verallia, nuestro propósito es re-imaginar el vidrio para un futuro sostenible. Queremos redefinir la forma en que se produce, reutiliza y recicla el vidrio, para convertirlo en el material de embalaje más sostenible del mundo. Trabajamos junto con nuestros clientes, proveedores y otros socios a lo largo de la cadena de valor para desarrollar soluciones nuevas, beneficiosas y sostenibles para todos.
Con casi 11.000 empleados y 35 plantas de producción de vidrio en 12 países, somos el líder europeo y el tercer mayor productor mundial de envases de vidrio para bebidas y productos alimenticios. Ofrecemos soluciones innovadoras, personalizadas y respetuosas con el medio ambiente a más de 10.000 empresas en todo el mundo.
Verallia produjo más de 16.000 millones de botellas y tarros de vidrio y registró unos ingresos de 3.500 millones de euros en 2024.
La estrategia de RSC de Verallia ha sido galardonada con la Medalla de Platino de Ecovadis, situando al Grupo en el 1% superior de las empresas evaluadas por Ecovadis. Nuestro objetivo de reducción de emisiones de CO2 de -46% en los alcances 1 y 2 entre 2019 y 2030 ha sido validado por SBTi (Science Based Targets Initiative). Está en línea con la trayectoria de limitar el calentamiento global a 1,5 °C establecida por el Acuerdo de París.
Verallia cotiza en el compartimento A del mercado regulado de Euronext Paris (Ticker: VRLA – ISIN: FR0013447729) y cotiza en los siguientes índices: CAC SBT 1.5°, STOXX600, SBF 120, CAC Mid 60, CAC Mid & Small y CAC All-Tradable.

Name: Bomma
Description:
Cutting Edge Crystal | Contemporary Designers | Bohemian Artisans

We work in high quality crystal designed by leading Czech and international designers and artists. We proudly manufacture for luxury companies worldwide using traditional craftsmanship and our proprietary cutting technology.

Name: PRECIOSA
Description: A global leader in luxury goods manufactured from crystal, Preciosa stands upon nearly five centuries of glassmaking tradition and innovation. From the world’s smallest faceted flatback stone to our cutting-edge, bespoke lighting installations, Preciosa looks to our own unique heritage to draw inspiration for the future of responsibly crafted Bohemian crystal. Together, the Group operates regional offices across Europe, North America and Asia and melts 40 tons of glass every day.

Name: Ghani Value Glass Ltd
Description: Ghani Value glass Limited (GVGL) is a publicly traded company on the Pakistan Stock Exchange and is a member of the Ghani Group.

Name: Glasafe
Description:
Welcome to Glasafe, where we redefine the every day with a touch of elegance. As a premium lifestyle brand, we're not just about glassware but about elevating your daily experiences into extraordinary moments.

Our stylish products are crafted to impress, blending quality and durability with a confident design. Whether it's a sip of your favourite drink or storing your meals & kitchen essentials, Glasafe ensures every moment is an occasion.

Discover how we're transforming the ordinary into the extraordinary, one glassware at a time!

Name: 1niq vidros
Description:
A busca constante por parcerias consolidadas
fez com que tenhamos a honra de apresentar
nossa Empresa a você!
A 1NIQ foi fundada em 01/11/2020 na cidade de
Diadema, estado de São Paulo. Viemos com objetivo
de atender os clientes com Excelência, Pontualidade
abrangendo em Soluções adequadas ao mercado e
sendo reconhecidos pela aplicação tecnológica no
ramo vidreiro.
Temos em nosso DNA a fluência em processos
Vidreiros e por esse motivo, mesmo na breve
história de nossa fundação já nos tornamos marca
notável dentro do mercado.

A 1NIQ tem suas raízes no mercado do Mato Grosso, com sede Industrial em Cuiabá, onde foi herdado
todo conhecimento e experiência necessária para entrar como evidente fornecedor de material vítreo.
Sendo o seu berço a Industria Tempermat atuante no mercado a mais de 20 anos.
Com conhecimento passado de Pai para Filho, os laços entre a 1NIQ e a TEMPERMAT são próximos e
duradouros. Temos orgulho de participar dessa história e poder aliar nossa marca com uma referência
industrial e empresarial tão notória.

Name: Dr. Greiche
Description:
Dr. Greiche Group
Since its founding in 1985, Dr. Greiche Group has become a benchmark in the glass manufacturing industry — not only in Egypt, but across the MENA region and beyond.

With decades of expertise, we lead in providing high-performance glass solutions tailored to the needs of diverse sectors: automotive, architecture, interior design, appliances, lighting, mirrors, and safety systems.

Our advanced production facilities, combined with a highly skilled workforce, enable us to deliver large-scale, custom glass processing with unmatched precision and quality. Exporting to more than 40 countries, we are proud partners to some of the world’s most recognized brands.

At Dr. Greiche, we don’t just manufacture glass — we shape progress, set standards, and build trust.
Dr. Greiche – The Clear Name in Glass.

Name: IKK Glass
Description:
IKK Glass is a 100% Saudi glass processor factory. 

The factory was established in 2015 as a subsidiary of the Isam Khairy Kabbani Group, IKK Glass has been dedicated to supporting and elevating the glass industry markets of Saudi Arabia and the MENA region. We aim to become the trusted provider of top-quality glass processing solutions, catering to the diverse needs of construction and modern architecture.

Name: CSG Glass
Description:
Founded in 1984, CSG Holding Co., Ltd. (CSG) is headquartered in Shekou National Free Trade Zone in Shenzhen. As one of the earliest listed companies in China, both A-share and B-share of the company were listed on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange in 1992.

After 40 years of development, we have set up three complete industrial chains of energy-saving glass, electronic glass&display devices, and solar energy. As technology and manufacturing processes continue to advance in all areas, our industrial capabilities have become increasingly prominent. We have also established a well-structured industrial layout, comprising over 30 manufacturing subsidiaries and five core business sectors: float glass, solar glass, architectural glass, electronic glass&display devices, and photovoltaic materials.

With decades of R&D-driven innovation and over 2,000 patents, we are committed to sustainable manufacturing and low-carbon development. From adopting natural gas in production to delivering energy-saving glazing solutions, ESG principles are embedded in our operations.

Looking ahead, we will continue to focus on innovation and contribute to the construction of more sustainable, futuristic cities.

Our Main Products:
1. Float Glass: Clear Glass, Low-iron Glass, Tinted Glass, etc.
2. Architectural Glass:
· Low-e Insulated Glass — Single/Double/Triple Silver 
· Flat & Curved Heat Treated Glass — Tempered Glass, Heat-strengthened Glass 
· Laminated Glass— PVB/SGP
· Silk Screen & Digital Printing Fritted Glass
· Easy-cleaning Glass
· Anti-reflective Glass
     ...
3. Solar Glass: Annealed, Tempered/Heat-strengthened, AR-coated, etc.
4. Electronic Glass: High Quality AG Glass, Glass Coating Product, Automotive Product, etc.
5. Photovoltaic Products: Polysilicon, Crystalline Silicon Wafers, Solar Cells, PV Modules, BIPV, etc.

Name: France Vitrail International
Description:
-FR-
France Vitrail International est un atelier français d’artisanat du verre, situé à Colombes et dirigé par Éric Bonte, maître verrier depuis 1979.
Notre équipe d’une vingtaine de professionnels est spécialisée dans la création de vitraux et de verres sablés, ainsi que dans la restauration et la mise en double vitrage de vitraux anciens. Labellisé Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant (EPV), notre atelier crée, réalise et pose des œuvres originales, artistiques et esthétiques en France et à l’international.

Depuis plus de quarante ans, nous collaborons avec des particuliers, architectes, institutions, ainsi qu’avec des artistes contemporains de renom. Nous avons eu le privilège de travailler avec Jean Bazaine, Philippe Pasqua ou encore Alvaro Barrington (Galerie Thaddaeus Ropac), et de voir certaines de nos réalisations exposées dans des lieux emblématiques.

L’atelier fait le lien entre artisanat d’art et création artistique, en donnant vie aux projets les plus ambitieux et en repoussant les limites de l’art du vitrail.

-EN-
France Vitrail International is a French glass art studio based in Colombes and led by Éric Bonte, master glass artist since 1979.
Our team of twenty professionals specializes in stained glass and sandblasted glass, as well as the restoration and double-glazing of historic stained-glass windows.
Awarded the Living Heritage Company (EPV) label, the workshop designs, produces, and installs unique and artistic creations for clients worldwide.

For over four decades, we have worked with private clients, architects, institutions, and renowned contemporary artists. Among our collaborations are projects with Jean Bazaine, Philippe Pasqua, and Alvaro Barrington (Thaddaeus Ropac Gallery), with several works exhibited in prestigious venues.

At the crossroads of craftsmanship and fine art, our studio brings to life the boldest visions, combining tradition, innovation, and excellence.

 Contactez-nous / Get in touch!

Name: FEVISA
Description:
FEVISA tiene más de tres décadas de experiencia invirtiendo en el desarrollo de avanzada tecnología que ha llevado a que sus plantas estén dentro de las más modernas y con mayor crecimiento en el mundo.

Desde sus inicios en 1987 en Mexicali, Baja California se ha enfocado en proveer soluciones integrales de empaque a la industria de alimentos y bebidas, diseñando, produciendo y distribuyendo en tiempo y precio, envases de vidrio de calidad.

Nuestro Centro de Diseño cuenta con software especializado que permite mejorar el envase reforzando donde lo requiera y optimizando el costo de producirlo. Fabricar envases atractivos y eficientes para cada mercado es altamente apreciado por los diferentes consumidores en nuestro país y más allá de nuestras fronteras.

Es de suma importancia trabajar con energías renovables en todos los procesos de producción de los envases de vidrio que son amigables con el medio ambiente por ser 100% reciclables y reusables.

Name: Verallia Argentina
Description:
Expertos en diseño, fabricación y reciclaje de envases de vidrio, proveemos soluciones saludables, estéticas y sostenibles.
Como líder europeo y el tercer productor más grande del mundo de envases de vidrio para bebidas y productos alimenticios, queremos redefinir la manera en que el vidrio es fabricado, reutilizado y reciclado, para hacerlo el envase con el material más sostenible del mundo.
En Argentina, Verallia, ubicada en el corazón de la región vitivinícola, se dedica a la fabricación y comercialización de envases de vidrio para la industria vitivinícola y olivícola.

Name: Glass Container Manufacturing Consulting Ltd
Description:
We host the Largest Group of Independent Glass Container Manufacturing Experts and Consultants in the World.

Together, this represents literally THOUSANDS of Years of Experience... and all Now Available for You to tap into, with any single request you present to us.

IF you have a problem with any aspect of the glass container manufacturing process (all the way from batch to packaging, and anything in between), 

OR 

IF you think you can perform better in a particular area or simply want to discuss such possibilities 

THEN please click on the 'Contact Us' button to connect with us.

We will take your enquiry and discuss it confidentially and anonymously then propose a viable plan of action.

All of our Glass Container Manufacturing Group members are passionate about the process of making glass container and are experts in their particular fields of the process. 

No person knows it all, but together we can implement all the best knowledge about every aspect of the glass container production process and reach towards perfection.

Glass plant profitability is directly affected by the many separate but interlinked processes in the glass container plant, and this is what makes this manufacturing process So Fascinating. 

There is hardly any single area that does not have an impact on the performance of the plant in some way (most are significant on the overall output, costs or quality).

Glass container customers are getting more and more focussed on their glass suppliers delivering better quality and achieving environmentally responsible solutions in providing their glass.

In this challenging environment of increasing demands coming from our customers, we are seeing increasing regulatory pressures and increasing costs of raw materials and energy. 

We are here to bring our joint expertise to help you!

YOUR NEXT STEPS TO GETTING OUR HELP: Click on the 'Visit Website' button to contact us RIGHT NOW!

Name: BetaGlass
Description:
Beta Glass, a proud member of the Frigoglass Group, stands as a strategic partner to international beverage bottlers. Major supplier of top-quality glass packaging, crowns and crates in West & Central Africa. 

Our diverse range of glass containers offers superior packaging solutions to clients across various sectors, including soft drinks, beer, spirits, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals. We are committed to delivering excellence in our products.

Name: Bendheim
Description:
Bendheim, the resource for specialty glass since 1927, is one of the world’s foremost sources of decorative architectural glass, offering a virtually unlimited range of in-stock and custom architectural glass varieties. 

For four generations, the family-owned company has been supplying the world's finest specialty glass to architects, designers, contractors, and building owners. Among Bendheim’s most sought-after glass varieties are patterned glass, Italian etched glass,back-painted glass for vivid feature walls and backsplashes, wood veneer laminated glass, glass featuring architectural metal and textile interlayers, 60% recycled Lamberts channel glass, and more – all precision-fabricated to suit any application. 

Bendheim Wall Systems, Inc. is North America's leading channel glass wall systems supplier. The translucent U-shaped glass contains a high percentage of recycled material and is produced in Europe’s first environmentally sensitive oxygen-fired cast glass melting furnace. Bendheim Wall Systems also introduced the first-of-their-kind decorative glass rainscreen systems to North America. With compression glass fittings from Längle of Austria, the rainscreen systems are an exterior glass cladding that envelopes the building in order to protect it from the elements while providing a unique, highly customizable aesthetic.

Name: Gutmann PVB
Description: Gutmann PVB is a manufacturer of high-quality polyvinyl butyral (PVB) for the production of safety laminated glass. Gutmann PVB is the region's first manufacturer of PVB for the international glass industry. Our products are manufactured to international standards utilizing the world's finest raw materials to ensure the highest quality material supply.

Name: PT Asahimas Flat Glass Tbk
Description:
Asahi Glass Co. Ltd (AGC Inc.) the world's foremost glass producer was founded by Mr. Toshiya Iwasaki and determine to take on the challenge of domestic flat glass production in the 1900s. The Search commenced for a new plant site could offer convenient water transportation and room to expand. In the end, Amagasaki, Hyogo, was selected as the location for the new plant. The land acquired in August 1907 become the site of Amagasaki Plant, where Asahi Glass Born.

Asahimas' Mission and Vision depict from numerous of values living in the Company, which is described further based on the Company's corporate culture i.e. pioneering and cooperation spirit, honesty, integrity and creative thinking. Eventually, the Company formulates its Mission and Vision to be as follow :

The Company's Mission :
"TO BUILD THE WORLD A BETTER PLACE FOR LIVING"

THE COMPANY'S VISION    :
"TO BECOME A RESPECTABLE MANUFACTURER AND GLOBAL SUPPLIER OF GLASS AND ITS RELATED PRODUCTS"

The Company’s Value :  
- The Pioneering Spirit
- Honesty and Sincerity
- The Spirit of Cooperation
- Creative Thinking
- Be Responsible

These days, Asahimas increases an aggregate installed production capacity of 720,000 tons for Flat Glass, 5,800,000 square meters for Safety Glass and 6,800,000 square meters for mirror. This large number of annual capacity ranks Asahimas not only as the largest glass manufacturer in Indonesia but also in Southeast Asia.

This large number of annual capacity ranks Asahimas as one of the largest glass manufacturer in Indonesia and also in Southeast Asia.

Name: Fuyao Glass Corporation of America
Description: Fuyao Group provides total solutions for safety glass and automotive trim for a wide range of transportation vehicles, including design, production, sales and service related to automotive-grade float glass, automotive glass, locomotive glass, luggage racks and window trim. Our automotive glass manufacturing facility in Dayton, Ohio enables us to produce up to 4 million automotive units and 4 million windshields for the ARG market. We currently supply aftermarket glass to companies around the world.

Name: Goel Scientific Glass Works Ltd
Description: We are the first ISO 9001, Leading Scientific Glass Manufacturing Company in India of high repute and goodwill, specialized in anything and everything in Borosilicate Glass 3.3, Process Plant equipment including conceptualizing, co-creating, designing, fabrication, engineering, installation & commissioning of most complex requirements in Industrial Glassware, Laboratory Glassware and Customized Developments in Borosilicate Glass and other MOCs. We have always been the fore runners when it comes to innovation in scientific glass for more than 43 years and have many patents in our name.

Name: Riedel Crystal of America
Description:
"The finest glasses for both technical and hedonistic purposes are those made by Riedel. The effect of these glasses on fine wine is profound. I cannot emphasize enough what a difference they make." (Quote: Robert M. Parker, Jr. The Wine Advocate)

"The Riedel family has never stamped its name on a single bottle of wine. But over the past 50 years, this Austrian clan of master glassmakers has done more to enhance the oenophile's pleasure than almost any winemaking dynasty". (Quote: TIME MAGAZINE)

Claus Riedel was the first person in the long history of the glass to design its shape according to the character of the wine. He is thus the inventor of the functional wine glass.

Make a journey through our world of glasses and senses. On the following internet pages you will find detailed information about our glass creations and our unique philosophies on the ultimate enjoyment of wine.

Name: O-I Italia
Description:
Innovation is in our DNA: we are transforming the glass industry.

At O-I Glass, Inc. (NYSE: OI), we love glass and are proud to be one of the world's leading manufacturers of glass bottles and containers.

 Glass is not only beautiful, but also pure, healthy and completely recyclable, making it the most sustainable rigid packaging material. 

Locally, the headquarters are in Origgio, Italy, and the global headquarters in Perrysburg, Ohio (USA). Our team consists of approximately 24,000 people spread over 70 plants in 19 countries. 

O-I is the preferred partner of many of the world's leading food and beverage brands. We collaborate with customers to create iconic and innovative packaging that builds brands around the world.

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

Name: Royal Tint
Description:
Royal Tint was founded in 2016 in India, on the principle of supplying high-quality smart glass.

PDLC film is a distinctive product in itself. With hard work and persistence, we have successfully delivered client satisfaction and established an empire throughout India. We provide world-class Services, Support & Quality. Having experienced significant and continuous growth since its foundation, Royal Tint established its own Manufacturing unit of smart glass in 2020.

We aim to know your requirements in detail & present you with the best option for your desired Projects. All of our products set the standard for the industry.

Name: Miru
Description: Miru is developing next-generation electrochromic window (eWindow) solutions for the residential, commercial and transportation markets. Miru is disrupting how smart windows are produced and distributed, with a patented process that lowers costs, improves performance and significantly reduces carbon emissions —enhancing the well-being of people and our planet. From materials, to manufacturing and build, Miru is partnering with experts across the existing window supply chain to accelerate the adoption of eWindows worldwide.

Name: Groupe Prelco
Description:
Head quartered in Rivière-du-Loup Quebec Canada, Prelco inc. an 
ISO 9001 certified company, is the leader in security and safety 
glass manufacturing in Canada. Our company counts nearly fifty 
(50) years of manufacturing experience and R&D technology 
development efforts. We manufactures specialty glass products 
for architectural and industrial markets such as: 
insulating glass (IG) units, spandrel panels and tempered, 
laminated, bent and silkscreened glass.

Name: MFG
Description:
Mediterranean Float Glass (MFG SPA) filiale du premier groupe privé algérien CEVITAL, a fait du verre une véritable valeur sûre 
Algérienne. En effet, en l'espace d'à peine une année d'existence seulement, l'Algérie, grâce à MFG est devenue exportatrice de 
verre après avoir été, pendant des décennies, importatrice. D'ailleurs MFG est l'unique enseigne de verre plat au Maghreb et l'une 
des plus importantes en Afrique. Son site industriel est Implanté à l'Arbaa (Wilaya de Blida, 34km du port d'Alger) sur une superficie de 30 hectares, elle dispose aujourd'hui de 4 lignes de production et d'une filiale de transformation de verre architectural et 
électroménager. Grâce aux connaissances et à l'expérience acquise au fil des années, MFG est devenue une véritable référence 
en Algérie et à l'international, plus encore, MFG compte devenir parmi les entreprises les plus performantes dans son domaine.

Name: Saint-Gobain Vetrotex
Description:
With 90 years of expertise in fiberglass manufacturing and backed by Saint-Gobain’s 360-year expertise, Vetrotex delivers tailored solutions for our customers in construction fabrics and technical textiles.

Thanks to our worldwide presence with production facilities in Mexico, Europe, and North America, and sales offices across key regions, we combine global reach with local service.
Our commitment to innovation, quality, and sustainability makes us a trusted leader in the industry.

Name: Joshua James
Description:
Founded in 2021 by Joshua Chart and James Pickles, Joshua James leverages over 20 years of hands-on experience and expertise. Specialising in bespoke, luxury handcrafted steel doors and room dividers, the company serves clients throughout the UK and internationally. Based in Surrey, Joshua James provides a fully tailored and personalised service, ensuring exceptional product quality and outstanding customer support.

What started as a two-person team has evolved into a larger operation, where every team member—whether in the office, fabrication, or installation—shares a steadfast commitment to delivering excellence in both products and services.

Joshua James is dedicated to working closely with clients at all levels to bring their visions to life.

“Handcrafted by us to last a lifetime for you” - Joshua James | Contemporary Glass Specialists

Name: PMP de Mexicali
Description: Somos una empresa experta en la fabricación y distribución de materias primas para la industria del vidrio.

Name: I & L GLASS FACTORY
Description:
Welcome to I & L Glass Factory, a company born from a proud Kuwaiti vision to bring innovation and clarity to the world of glass, wood, and aluminum solutions. As a leading manufacturer, we specialize in delivering premium products for residential and commercial spaces. With state-of-the-art technology and a dedication to excellence, we produce a diverse range of solutions tailored to the unique needs of our clients.

From modern designs to timeless classics, our offerings enhance any environment with elegance and functionality. Whether it’s doors, partitions, staircase railings, shower boxes, or enclosures, our solutions bring sophistication to both indoor and outdoor spaces. Trust I & L Glass Factory to transform your living and working areas with brilliance, strength, and style. Elevate your surroundings with the finest glass, wood, and aluminum solutions from Kuwait’s own I & L Glass Factory, where vision meets craftsmanship.

Name: Global Antico Process Systems Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Global Antico Process Systems Pvt. Ltd.  – is a leading Exporter, Manufacturer and Supplier of Industrial Pilot Plant , Custom Pipeline Components, scientific process equipments. We also provide industrial gaskets and complete range of CS/SS Fluoropolymer lined pipes, fittings and valves. The fluoro polymers we deal with are PTFE, PFA, FEP, PVDF etc.

Name: Tempera Carbone
Description:
A Carbone está no ramo vidreiro desde 1999,apresentando vasta qualidade em seus produtos: vidros comum,temperados,laminados e serigrafados além de alumínios e espelhos. 
Com o intuito de atender vidraçarias e construtores nossa matriz está localizada em Mauá região do grande ABC e contamos com uma filial em Americana interior de São Paulo.

Name: STYLELINE Glass Door Systems
Description: Operating since 1975, STYLELINE Systems, Inc. f/k/a Commercial Refrigerator Door Company offers the highest performing DOE compliant glass doors in the industry for walk-in coolers and freezers and a wide range of shelving and merchandising accessories. STYLELINE Glass Door Systems sets the industry standard for design innovation, quality and reliability. Each system is made-to-order and manufactured to exact specifications. With a wide array of standard features and custom configurations, you're sure to find a system that suits your needs for condensation protection, energy efficiency and appearance.

Name: Arslan Ambalaj
Description:
Faaliyetlerine 1982 yılında yapı sektöründe başlamış olan ana firmamızın farklı iş kollarına yayılma politikası sonucunda cam ambalaj sektöründe yerimizi aldık. 2003 yılından bu yana gıda, içecek, kozmetik ve medikal sektör üreticilerine yenilikçi, estetik, fonksiyonel ürünlerimizle hizmet vermekteyiz. Farklı renk, hacim ve kapama biçimleriyle, kendimize ait olan ve farklı üretici firmaların sahip olduğu kalıplarla müşterilerimize 500’den fazla alternatif cam şişe ve cam kavanoz modeli sunmaktayız.

Kullanım alanlarına uygun farklı birçok tasarıma sahip cam şişe ve kavanoz modellerimiz eczacılıktan yağ perakendeciliğine, kozmetik sektöründen su, meşrubat ve alkollü içecek sektörlerine kadar geniş bir kullanım yelpazesine hitap etmektedir. Bu durum ürünlerimizin ulusal ve uluslararası firmalar tarafından tercih edilirliğini artırmaktadır. 

Cam ambalaj ve cam kapların tamamlayıcısı olan metal kapak, mantar tapa, kapüşon gibi ürün çeşitlerimizle; Trakya, Güney Marmara, Akdeniz, İç Anadolu ve Ege Bölgelerinde bulunan depolarımızla 5 ülkede 2500’den fazla müşterimizin çözüm ortağıyız.

Name: Atelier Faucher
Description:
En 2017, l’Atelier Faucher s’établit à Lyon, dans le quartier des Brotteaux (69006). 
Les réalisations de Mélanie Faucher s’étendent de la restauration de vitraux anciens à la création de pièces contemporaines. Elle travaille aussi bien pour des architectes et décorateurs que pour des particuliers, pour des lieux publics comme pour des privés.

Name: Olila Glass Industries Ltd
Description:
Established in 2011 OLiLA has already gained significant market share in the glassware sector of Bangladesh. At OLiLA we relentlessly work hard for better customer experience. OLiLA Group is engaged in solving unemployment problem of the country and is contributing to National Economy / GDP.
We produce our glassware’s in our own facility equipped with state of the art technologies housed over an area of 38 Bighas of land. More than 350 workers and 150 employees are putting their craftsmanship to produce perfectly crafted products of OLiLA Glassware. Foreign Technical Partners’ are engaged to assure the global standard. One third of our workers is female because we believe in woman empowerment and OLiLA glassware was launched in Bangladesh on September 2016.

Name: MagnetCam
Description:
1988’den bu yana özel cam makineleri, 1994’ten itibaren ise vakumlu kaldırıcılar üreten Magnetcam, cam, inşaat, dış cephe, saç ve mermer işleme sektörlerine yenilikçi çözümler sunmaktadır.
ISO 9001, SGS, EN 4414, EN 13155, ACID, CARGO X ve CE belgelerine sahip olan firmamız, TÜBİTAK destekli Ar-Ge projeleriyle ürün gamını sürekli geliştirmektedir.
Bugün 43 ülkeye ihracat yapan Magnetcam, birçok prestijli gökdelen ve havalimanı projesinde tercih edilen güvenilir bir markadır.

Name: Smart Glass Accessories LLC
Description:
www.smartglassaccessories.shop is your source for simple innovative hardware solutions designed specifically for switchable glass or film systems. Available to Smart Glass vendors, installers, or end customers. Manufacturer Neutral, Industry Standard.

Smart Glass hardware has historically been difficult to find, source, and incorporate in any Smart Glass project. One-off and custom methods have often been the standard, creating costly, complex, and time consuming installations. 

SGA was founded to create easy access for those who choose and incorporate smart glass technologies into their projects. By eliminating common entry barriers, and providing solutions to the difficult "how-to" questions, including smart glass in your project has never been easier!

Let no complexity or unanswered question stall your smart glass project. Anywhere there's glass, we can make it smart.

Name: Cardinal FG Durant
Description:
We are a division of Cardinal Glass Industries, the largest manufacturer of residential insulated windows in the U.S.

Thanks to our employees, Cardinal FG Durant provides superior quality products with excellent customer service to maintain our success and leadership in the glass industry.

Come see our high-end manufacturing environment. Bright, clean, and clear – just like our products.

Al Khinji Group Glass & Accessories Trading
We specialize in trading of all kinds of Glass, Mirrors and Glass Accessories. We are one of the

Name: Osmic Glass
Description: We are leading manufacturers and exporter of Glassware Home Decor products. Osmic Glass is a 2nd generation Manufacturer and exporter of Home Décor Glassware Products. With over 22+ years of experience, we have honed our craft to perfection, becoming synonymous with exquisite home decor  glassware products that adorn homes across the globe.

Name: Ocean
Description:
Established since 1979, Ocean Glass Public Company Limited has manufactured quality glassware for families, food service operators and companies or brands who want to personalize their own glassware as gifts or souvenirs.

Ocean Glass has been registered as a public company and become a listed company on the Stock Exchange of Thailand since 1993.

Today, the company provides an extensive range of quality glassware with an annual production capacity of 160 million pieces and exports its quality products to more than 90 countries all over the world.

The company’s determination and commitment to produce quality glassware which is designed and manufactured to its highest level of functionality and quality makes Ocean Glass one of the most successful glassware manufacturer in Asia until today.

Name: Impacto Doors
Description:
Fabricamos portas de vidro com soluções inovadoras em alumínio, unindo qualidade e design para móveis planejados.  

Em 2024, fomos reconhecidos pelo Latin American Quality Institute como a Empresa Brasileira do Ano. Além disso, somos pioneiros no mercado na produção de tintas à base d’água.  

Atendemos clientes no Brasil e no exterior, oferecendo produtos de alto padrão para diversos projetos.

Description: Atık şişelerden dönüştürülmüş ürünler ile daha sürdürülebilir bir dünya için çalışıyoruz.

Name: VTC Tecnologia De Vidros Temperados
Description:
A VTC Vidros Temperados é uma empresa brasileira e nossas atividades iniciaram em 2003, na cidade de Itupeva – São Paulo. Temos o compromisso de fornecer produtos com eficiência e que atendam às expectativas de nossos clientes, através da otimização de recursos, da preservação do patrimônio ambiental e do constante aprimoramento tecnológico.

O incentivo ao protagonismo e ao aperfeiçoamento profissional constante de nossos colaboradores, garantem a melhoria contínua de nosso sistema de gestão.

Nossas práticas de negócios são orientadas para o relacionamento de parcerias, garantindo benefícios mútuos para os clientes, colaboradores e fornecedores, promovendo o sucesso a longo prazo.

Premier fabricant de verre TREMPE plat dans toutes ses déclinaisons

Fabrication de verre trempé feuilleté - feuilleté de couleur

Name: Saint-Gobain Glass Hellas
Description:
Η Saint-Gobain Building Glass Europe παρέχει υψηλής απόδοσης και καινοτόμες λύσεις για υαλοπίνακες για κάθε χώρο διαβίωσης και εργασίας όπου απαιτείται άνεση και ασφάλεια, ικανοποιούμε τις ανάγκες των πελατών μας σε τέσσερις βασικούς τομείς: προσόψεις, παράθυρα, εσωτερική διακόσμηση και προστασία.

Είμαστε στην ευχάριστη θέση να μοιραστούμε μαζί σας το πάθος μας για το γυαλί!

Name: LADOR LLC
Description:
LADOR şirkəti 2016-cı ildə Azərbaycanın ilk yerli qapı aksesuarları brendi kimi fəaliyyətə başlamışdır.
Təklif etdiyimiz yüksək keyfiyyətli, dünya standartlarına cavab verən, sertifikatlı və rəsmi zəmanətli məhsullarla bu industriyada yeni reallıq formalaşdırdıq. 
Biz şüşə qapı aksesuarları sahəsində müştəri tələbinin və keyfiyyətli xidmətin üst standartlarını müəyyən edən şirkət olmaq üçün çalışırıq.
Qapı aksesuarları sahəsində müştəri məmnuniyyətinin və keyfiyyətli xidmətin nə qədər vacib olduğunu anlayırıq və bu istiqamətdə olan tələbi qarşılamaq üçün innovativ addımlar atmağa cəhd edirik.

Name: Glass Partners SA
Description:
GLASS PARTNERS
Is an independent forward thinking building glass company which stocks, processes and distributes a diversified product range throughout Southern Africa.

Name: Sacada Envidraçamentos
Description: Há mais de 12 anos oferecemos as melhores soluções em envidraçamentos de ambientes, como: Fechamento de varanda, Tetos/coberturas solares fixos e retráteis, Guarda-corpo, divisórias, vitrines, portas slides, esquadrias de alumínio, persianas e muito mais. Oferecemos também  soluções em automação, estéticas,  acústicas e de proteção solar  Conheça-nos melhor linktr.ee/sacadaenvidracamento

Name: Anna von Lipa
Description:
Anna von Lipa is a glassware brand that brings everyday beauty into people’s homes.
At its core, the business is about hand-blown glass made for daily use, not just for special occasions.

Rooted in Bohemian glassmaking tradition and shaped by Scandinavian simplicity, Anna von Lipa blends centuries-old craftsmanship with a modern, poetic sensibility. Every piece is mouth-blown in Czech workshops, making each glass, vase, or bowl subtly unique.

What sets Anna von Lipa apart is its philosophy:
beauty should be lived with, not saved.
The designs are meant to be used every day—at the breakfast table, with flowers from the garden, during quiet moments and shared celebrations alike.

Founded in 1996, the brand creates collections that feel timeless rather than trendy, emotional rather than decorative. Light, color, and form are carefully balanced so the glass enhances daily rituals without overpowering them.

We invite export agents, distributors, and B2B collaborators to elevate their portfolio with beautiful, handcrafted glassware.

Name: Oevering Glas en Bouwservice
Description: Oevering Glas en Bouwservice is een bedrijf die de levering en montage doet op het gebied van hardglas, aluminium, rvs en isolatieglas. gevestigd aan Koetille 7, Harlingen, Netherlands.

Name: DemuGlas BV
Description: DemuGlas is een volledig zelfstandig en onafhankelijk opererende producent van isolatieglas. Wij leveren uitsluitend aan bedrijven. Ons productenpallet bestaat onder meer uit enkel glas en gelaagd glas.

Name: BarteltGlasBerlin GmbH
Description: Wir sind der führende Glasveredler, der Tradition und Moderne miteinander verbindet.Qualität seit 1960. Von A wie Architelturglas bis Z wie Zuschnitt.

Name: Vetreria Ciri S.r.l.

Name: Yavuz Cam
Description:
Yavuz Cam started its commercial activities with retail glass sales in 1970 and continued this activity until 1995. Having obtained the distributorship of Şişecam in 1976, the company has also started wholesale glass sales since that date. The company which opened its production facility in Arsin Organized Industrial Zone - Trabzon / Turkey in 1992 started to produce heat-insulated glass in 1994 and became one of Şişecam's Authorized Isıcam Manufacturer (IYÜ) companies. The company also held the Plaspen and Rehau dealerships between 1997-2007 and engaged in plastic joinery activities.

Yavuz Cam is one of the first technological facilities in the Eastern Black Sea region in glass industry and closely follows the technological developments in glass industry. In this direction, 2 glass tempering lines were established in 2007 and 2014. Temper furnaces can temper Low-E glasses with high energy efficiency.

As a result of the dealership system revised throughout the country by Şişecam in 2015, the company was determined as the only authorized wholesale glass dealer in the Eastern Black Sea region.

The company is the wholesaler/regional dealer of Şişecam – one of the most well-known brands in glass sector in the world - in flat glass group of products and is specialized in safety and security glasses ( tempered glass and laminated glass ), double-glazings, tempered double-glazings, tempered low-e glasses, glass curtain-wall as well as producing glass table, glass door, vent-hole glass. It also distributes decorative glass, reflective glass, tinted glass and opal glass.

Name: Quartz Scientific Inc
Description:
Quartz Scientific, Inc. (QSI), founded in 1963, is a leading manufacturer and international supplier of high-quality, fused quartz products. Housed in a 44,000 square foot facility are skilled artisans whose quartz working skills and expertise complement QSI’s wide variety of specialized equipment. QSI’s products range from simple evaporating dishes and watch glasses to large, complex laboratory apparatus. QSI also manufacturers specialized extremely high-purity fused quartz products for crystal growing and wafer process handling for the semiconductor industry.

QSI fused quartz purity levels (99.998% SiO2) are attained by careful screening of raw material, meticulous attention to detail and stringent quality control throughout the various manufacturing stages.

QSI also stocks and supplies quartz in the form of tubing, rods, ingots, discs, plates and cylinders. From thin-wall boiling and distilling flasks to heavy-wall diffusion tube used to process semiconductor wafers at furnace temperatures in excess of 1200 degrees C, QSI offers custom fabrication of fused quartz to customer specification and configuration, and repairs fused quartz products when feasible.

Available in opaque, transparent and transparalucent forms, QSI fused quartz products meet or exceed all industry standards for physical, thermal, chemical, mechanical and electric properties.

Name: iGlass S.A.
Description:
Η iGlass είναι μια πρωτοπόρος εταιρία στον τομέα του χονδρικού εμπορίου υαλοπινάκων και στον τομέα της επεξεργασίας γυαλιού στην Ελληνική αγορά, ενώ έχει σημαντική παρουσία στην αγορά των Νοτίων Βαλκανίων και επιδιώκει συνεχώς την ανάπτυξη σε νέες χώρες και αγορές. 

Η ιστορία μας ξεκινά το έτος 1953, ενώ από το 1984 κύριο άξονα της δραστηριότητάς μας  αποτελεί η εμπορία και επεξεργασία γυαλιού, σε αυτό συμπεριλαμβάνονται το χονδρικό εμπόριο επίπεδων υαλοπινάκων και εξαρτημάτων στήριξης γυάλινων κατασκευών, η παραγωγή θερμικά επεξεργασμένων και πολυστρωματικών υαλοπινάκων, οι κατασκευές από γυαλί, η εμπορία καινουργών και μεταχειρισμένων μηχανημάτων επεξεργασίας γυαλιού και η παροχή υπηρεσιών συντήρησης αυτών, καθώς και η αντιπροσώπευση ξένων οίκων παραγωγής όλων των προηγούμενων. Με εμπειρία, που υπερβαίνει τα 70 χρόνια, δεσμευόμαστε στην εξυπηρέτηση των πελατών μας με προϊόντα και υπηρεσίες προστιθέμενης αξίας και δημιουργούμε μαζί τους μακροχρόνιες σχέσεις, που βασίζονται στην εμπιστοσύνη, την ακεραιότητα και τη συνέπεια. 

Η ομάδα μας αποτελείται από ανθρώπους που έχουν την απαραίτητη τεχνική κατάρτιση για να σας βοηθήσουν με την μελέτη & τον σχεδιασμό της λύσης που είναι η κατάλληλη για εσάς. Οι διεθνής οίκοι που συνεργαζόμαστε και οι αποκλειστικές αντιπροσωπείες που έχουμε εξασφαλίσει για την Ελληνική αγορά (Bottero, FAAC), καθώς και το πελατολόγιό μας που περιλαμβάνει εκτός των άλλων και εταιρίες ηγέτες του κλάδου, δείχνουν ότι η ομάδα της iGlass ανταπεξέρχεται και στα πιο απαιτητικά έργα.

Name: Shower Door Professionals Co-Op | Official Page
Description:
The Shower Door Professionals Co-Op is a national alliance of independent glass and shower door companies dedicated to elevating the standards, safety, and sustainability of the shower door industry.

Our mission is simple: to advance the glass trade through shared knowledge, collective buying power, and unified professionalism. We bring together fabricators, installers, designers, software providers, and suppliers who believe in collaboration over competition.

As a cooperative, we provide access to industry education, vendor partnerships, and business growth tools designed specifically for our industry.

Members benefit from certified training modules, peer mentorship, marketing automation, and shared resources that improve efficiency and profitability.

Through partnerships with our trusted vendors, members also receive exclusive perks and savings that directly support their day-to-day operations:
CRL (C.R. Laurence) – Free access to Showers Online design software and free shipping on qualifying orders for Co-Op members.
FollowUp Glass – Complimentary Basic FollowUp CRM accounts to help members streamline communication, manage leads, and automate workflows.
 
We are equally proud to collaborate with the National Glass Association (NGA), supporting industry education and advocacy efforts.

Beyond vendor benefits, Co-Op members enjoy access to:
A private community of vetted glass and shower door professionals. Certified training programs and compliance resources (aligned with NGA and OSHA best practices)
Exclusive webinars, in-person workshops, and national networking events
Business coaching, automation consulting, and technical support from peers
A national online member map that connects homeowners, contractors, and designers with trusted professionals in their area.

Together, we’re creating a stronger, smarter, safer future for the shower door trade.

Visit www.showerdoorprofessionals.com or contact info@showerdoorprofessionals.com to learn more.

Description:
Azar Mina Jam Glass Industries Company, based on mineral potential in the region started the project of Production of flat glass by float method in the year 2013. The project was built on a 22-hectare land in Phase Two of Torbat-e-Jam Industrial Estate (Khorasan Razavi Province), Iran.

Azar Mina Jam Glass Factory production line is designed to produce 600 tons of glass Jam daily (200,000 T/year) by the float method in the parts of Automotive, Architectural and Industrial with high quality according to standard and is capable of producing flat glass types from 2 to 19 mm thick in different size and Jumbo size and color (white, green, blue, brown and flint).

It is noted that the technology used in this production unit is the most modern production method in the world, and the benefits of this project are the maximum automation, the most environmentally friendly and the lowest energy consumption to produce each kilogram of glass.

About 20% of the machinery in the project is domestically manufactured, but the original design and technology selection was carried out by HORN Germany Company, and remaining key and efficient machinery were provided from European Companies Horn, Zippe, Bottero, and Cnud.

Name: Circula Vidro
Description:
Institucional
Nosso objetivo é concentrar e otimizar esforços para atingirmos juntos a meta de 40% de  embalagens de vidro recicladas ao ano, até 2032. Ao conquistar isso, ganharemos todos: consumidores, empresas, meio ambiente e trabalhadores que atuam diretamente na cadeia de reciclagem do vidro.

Por que o vidro?
O vidro é um dos principais protagonistas da economia circular que tanto almejamos na sustentabilidade do nosso planeta. Isso, porque o vidro é 100% e infinitamente reciclável. Cada quilo de caco de vidro produz um quilo de vidro apto ao consumo, uso, reuso e, novamente, à reciclagem. Essa característica, rara entre os materiais que consumimos no dia a dia, reduz os descartes na natureza, e dá sentido ao nome da nossa Entidade: Circula Vidro.

A singularidade do vidro o transforma em um dos principais aliados das políticas de logística reversa de resíduos sólidos. Mas o que é isso? A logística reversa de resíduos sólidos é o conjunto de ações que envolvem a recuperação do que é descartado na natureza. Inclui a coleta, transporte e armazenamento desse resíduo, reciclagem quando é o caso, ou o tratamento do que não pode ser reaproveitado.


Nosso compromisso
Comprometidas com o tema, as associações do setor de embalagens de vidro ABIVIDRO (Associação Brasileira das Indústrias de Vidro), ABRABE (Associação Brasileira de Bebidas) e SINDICERV (Sindicato Nacional da Indústria da Cerveja), que representam quase a totalidade das fabricantes e usuárias de vidro do país, se uniram para formar esta entidade gestora única, a Circula Vidro, responsável por gerir a logística reversa de embalagens no Brasil.

Our pledge is to establish lasting relationships with our customers by providing the highest quality products with state of the art equipment, exceptional customer service, and gaining their trust through exceptional performance by every member of the team. Description:
Die Optec Jena GmbH ist ein kleines und innovatives Unternehmen, welches flexibel, schnell und individuell auf die Wünsche der Kunden ausgerichtet optische Halbzeuge und Komponenten fertigt. 
Seit der Firmengründung 2017 liegt der Schwerpunkt am Standort in Schorba, in der Nähe der Optikstadt Jena, auf der Fertigung der folgenden Produkte: Planoptiken (Planplatten, Spiegel, Fenster, Filter), Prismen und Keile sowie zylindrische und torische Optiken.
Darüber hinaus wurde 2021 in Miesitz bei Triptis eine firmeneigene Vorfertigung aufgebaut, mit der verschiedenste Halbzeug-Produkte aus unterschiedlichsten Gläsern realisiert werden können: Prismenrohlinge, Rundscheiben, Platten, Zuschnitte, Stäbe sowie Spezialanfertigungen.

Die Grundlage dafür bildet die maschinelle Ausrüstung im Bereich der Fertigung inkl. der Messtechnik sowie eine lange technologische Erfahrung im gesamten Bereich der Optikfertigung. Dadurch ist die Optec Jena GmbH in der Lage vom Zuschnitt des Rohmaterials beginnend bis zur finalen optischen Komponente alle Fertigungsschritte im eigenen Unternehmen abbilden zu können.

Name: Glashütte Valentin Eisch GmbH
Description:

Bereits in vierter Generation identifiziert sich die Familie Eisch mit Glasdesign und -veredelung sowie Innovationen im Weinbereich. Die faszinierende, Genuss verstärkende Wirkung der zur intensiven Aromen-Entfaltung entwickelten SENSISPLUS-Gläser wird von Weinexperten aus aller Welt bestätigt.
Das außergewöhnliche Design der hochwertigen Kristallgläser wurde in jüngster Zeit mit mehreren  Auszeichnungen wie dem Tableware International Award of Excellence, dem Tischkulturpreis Dineus und dem Manufakturprodukt des Jahres bestätigt.
Die familiengeführte Glashütte hat ihren Sitz im Herzen des Nationalparks Bayerischer Wald in Deutschland. Eisch wurde vom deutschen Fachhandel vielfach als die Nummer 1 unter den Glasherstellern ausgezeichnet.

Nous travaillons tous types de verres et de miroirs, du plus standard au plus spécifique, afin de répondre aux besoins de tous les secteurs.

Notre manière de travailler repose sur une ligne simple : garantir une qualité régulière, communiquer clairement et proposer des solutions adaptées, sans détour. Chaque étape est encadrée, du premier échange à la fabrication, pour assurer un résultat fiable et conforme aux attentes.

Notre équipe réunit des techniciens qualifiés et des opérateurs expérimentés, capables de s’adapter aux contraintes de chaque chantier et de trouver les réponses les plus pertinentes aux demandes reçues.

Chez Mouton Esmard, notre objectif est d’offrir un service durable et sérieux, fondé sur la technique, l’expérience et la volonté de faire les choses correctement. Nous avançons avec la même méthode depuis toujours : comprendre le besoin, produire proprement, tenir les délais et rester un partenaire sur lequel on peut compter.

Il servizio di altissima qualità che da sempre la contraddistingue, certificato dal riconoscimento dell'Eccellenza Artigiana, è frutto di entusiasmo, competenza e molta dedizione.
La caratteristica principale del servizio offerto è il fatto di realizzare tutti i prodotti in modo artigianale e interamente su misura.
L'azienda offre inoltre un servizio completo, a 360°: dal progetto di massima ai calcoli strutturali, dal prototipo al prodotto finito, dalla posa in opera per i clienti della zona alla spedizione in tutta Italia ed anche in Europa.
Personale giovane e altamente qualificato, è in grado di trasformare le idee del cliente in creazioni uniche e raffinate attraverso tecniche sia tradizionali che all'avanguardia.
L'ambiente di lavoro energico ed affiatato non ha paura di nessuna sfida e affronta ogni novità con entusiasmo e positività.
Lo dimostra il fatto che la Vetreria Dimensione Vetro e Grafica S.a.s. è stata (nel 2015) la prima azienda in Italia a costruire un sito e-commerce al servizio totale del cliente: possibilità di scegliere il proprio prodotto, configurarlo da zero inserendo misure e lavorazioni personalizzate, effettuare l'acquisto direttamente online scegliendo metodo di pagamento e località di spedizione.

Ursula Futura, design studio and premium glassware brand,  plays with the everchanging nature of its alter ego - fluid like glass. The studio’s experimental pieces are created through the abstraction of observations translated into functional objects. Nature, science, and moments of wonder are often the starting point for the playful fantasy creations of Ursula Futura. Interested in the expression of emotions through objects, her designs are about raising a smile, spreading joy, and piquing curiosity. Fascinated by the magical material glass and its water-like properties, its fragility, and at the same time its strength, Ursula Futura made the material the center of her design practice. The production and process are often impulsive and in close collaboration with the glass artisans.

Name: LANGHAM GLASS LIMITED
Description:
Langham Glass was set up as a tourist attraction in the small village of Langham, hence the name. Many thousands of people walked through the doors until Langham Glass felt there was a need to move premises, and so in 2005 we moved to Tattersett Business Park, near Fakenham. The site gave us a larger work area, and this in turn lead to further work within the corporate market.

In 2013, Langham Glass once again relocated into a more central position, within the popular market town of Fakenham. This new site has meant we have been able to expand our restaurant and gift shop, giving us the capacity to be able to stock made in Britain products, alongside our own crystal which is all made on site. We are also able to welcome our sister company, 741 Awards, which now has a showroom within our gift shop, showcasing their high quality crystal awards and trophies.

Langham Glass descends from King’s Lynn Glass, which was set up by Ronnie Stennet-Wilson and which Paul Miller joined as a young man. Paul learned his trade from top European glassmakers brought in to start the company, and became a Master Glassmaker at the age of 21. Later, Wedgwood bought King’s Lynn Glass, and during this time, Paul designed and developed many of the animals and paperweights which are sought after by collectors today. Looking towards the future, Paul, together with his wife Sue, planned to set up their own glassmaking business.
After nearly a year of searching for suitable premises, in 1979 Langham Glass was born in the village of Langham in barn buildings. The Great Barn was chosen for the glasshouse for it’s height, and became the centre of the complex. A steel gallery was installed around the glasshouse, to enable visitors to move along and see different pieces being made by different glassmakers. The object was, and still is, to produce the finest handmade crystal possible. Gradually Langham Glass has established an identity and reputation for which we are well known.

Netra Niti  (Nxtgen Netra Niti) is a pioneering initiative led by India’s top pediatric optometrists, dedicated to tackling childhood myopia (nearsightedness) before it leads to vision loss. We are not just an eye care provider — we are a national movement to fight childhood blindness


 What We Do

At Netra Niti, we bring together clinical expertise, community outreach, and technology to protect children’s eyesight:

 Specialized Pediatric Vision Care
 School & Community Eye Health Programs
 Evidence-Based Myopia Management Treatments
 Parent & Teacher Education Initiatives
 Digital & Mobile Eye Care Innovations

 Our Mission

Our mission is to prevent childhood blindness by ensuring early detection, treatment, and education.
We focus on protecting children’s eyesight today, to secure their futures tomorrow.

 Regular Eye Check-Ups in Schools & Communities
 Customized, Evidence-Based Treatments for Every Child
 Training Programs for Parents and Teachers
 Digital Monitoring, AI-Based Tracking & Mobile Vision Care Units

 Our Vision

We believe in a future where every child can see clearly and live without the fear of preventable vision loss.
Our vision is to empower families, schools, and communities to take action against myopia.

 No Child Suffers from Preventable Vision Loss
 Schools Become the First Line of Defense Against Myopia
 Parents Are Empowered with Knowledge to Act Early
 Communities Embrace Eye Health as a Core Part of Child Well-Being

 Why Netra Niti?

 India’s First Structured Childhood Myopia Prevention Network
 Led by Pediatric Optometry Experts
 Focused on Awareness, Early Detection & Prevention
 Blending Traditional Eye Care with Digital Innovations

 Learn more: https://netraniti.com/

Name: HARIO Group
Description:
Founded in 1921, HARIO is a Tokyo-based heatproof glass manufacturer with over a century of history. 
Since its inception, HARIO has planned, manufactured, and sold heatproof glass, creating products that customers cherish. Combining expertise, innovation, and quality, we remain the only manufacturer in Japan with a heatproof glass factory, ensuring the highest standards in every product we produce.

From our beginnings in laboratory glassware, HARIO has expanded into a wide range of products that enhance daily life, from homes and cafés to industrial and scientific applications. 
Whether for coffee, matcha, tea, or kitchenware, HARIO glass reflects our long-standing commitment to careful design and refined glass processing techniques.

[About Our Business]
Building on our heatproof glass expertise, HARIO began making coffee siphons and later expanded to a diverse lineup of products. Today, we produce industrial glass for applications such as automotive light lenses, as well as home and lifestyle products, including coffee and tea accessories, microwave-safe cookware, and other kitchenware.

[About Our Global Presence]
With 9 offices across 8 countries, including Japan, the United States, the Netherlands, China, South Korea, Taiwan, Singapore, and Australia, HARIO delivers its products and expertise worldwide. 
Through this international network, HARIO products reach over 80 countries, bringing Japanese heatproof glass to homes, cafés, and industries around the globe.

[About Our Commitment]
HARIO Group continues its tradition of expertise and innovation, creating products that enrich everyday life and remain favorites for generations to come.
