 Savoir-Faire Artisanal : Chaque pièce Re Verre est façonnée avec soin dans notre atelier nantais. L'artisanat est au cœur de notre démarche, créant ainsi des objets uniques et respectueux de l'environnement.

 Découvrez notre Processus : Plongez dans les secrets du surcyclage du verre. Depuis la collecte des bouteilles jusqu'à leur transformation en objets artistiques, chaque étape est une célébration de la créativité et de l'engagement écologique.

 Engagement Zéro Déchet : Re Verre s'engage à réduire l'impact environnemental en favorisant une approche zéro déchet. Chaque bouteille transformée représente une victoire pour un mode de vie plus durable.

 Où Nous Trouver : Retrouvez nos créations uniques dans la boutique web www.re-verre.fr . Découvrez comment le surcyclage du verre peut devenir une pièce centrale de l'art de vivre.

 Notre Mission : Re Verre a pour mission de démontrer que la beauté peut émerger du recyclage. Chaque objet inutile peut devenir une œuvre d'art, chaque geste compte dans la préservation de notre planète.

Merci de faire partie de l'aventure Re Verre de Bouteille. Ensemble, créons un monde où la créativité rencontre la durabilité !  #ReVerre #ArtisanatDurable #Surcyclage

Name: Grupo São Cristóvão
Description:
Em 1986, nossa jornada teve início na cidade de Betim, onde, a princípio, nos dedicávamos à instalação de vidro comum. Com o passar dos anos, buscamos constantemente o aprimoramento de nossos conhecimentos e, consequentemente, evoluímos para a instalação de vidros temperados. Devido ao aumento da demanda e à logística desafiadora de adquirir vidro temperado de fontes externas, começamos a considerar a ideia de estabelecer nosso próprio processo de beneficiamento de vidro.

Foi em 2008 que concretizamos esse objetivo, inaugurando a São Cristovão Tempera, localizada no bairro Chácara Santo Antônio, tornando-se pioneira em tempera de vidros em Betim. Nossa vidraçaria original continuou operando próxima ao centro da cidade, continuando a atender nossos clientes que confiavam em nossa habilidade e mão de obra especializada. Na unidade de tempera, expandimos nossos serviços para a distribuição de vidro temperado e o beneficiamento de espelhos, atendendo assim às cidades circunvizinhas.

Em 2013, ampliamos nossas atividades, adicionando a distribuição de chaparias para lojas de mobiliário, serralherias, vidraçarias e outros setores relacionados. Em 2016, a unidade de vidraçaria também passou a fabricar e instalar esquadrias de alumínio para Betim e suas áreas circundantes.

Com o passar dos anos, o espaço na unidade de tempera tornou-se insuficiente para atender às crescentes demandas, o que nos levou a adquirir a unidade em Bandeirinhas. A partir desse ponto, começamos a distribuir chapas e acessórios, garantindo um suprimento eficiente para nossos clientes.

Hoje, nossas operações estão distribuídas da seguinte forma:

Instalação e Vidraçaria São Cristóvão
Endereço: Rua do Rosário, 1068 - Angola - Betim

Unidade de Tempera e Beneficiamento:
Endereço: Rua dos Angicos, 70 - Chácara Santo Antônio - Betim

Distribuição de Vidros e Acessórios:
Endereço: Avenida Fausto Ribeiro da Silva, nº 693 - Distrito Industrial Bandeirinhas, Betim

FONDATA NEL 1979, AMPLIATA ALLA FINE DEGLI ANNI ’80, SVILUPPATA NEL ’90 E FORTEMENTE RINNOVATA NEGLI ANNI 2000, LA MONTANARI GLASS RIVESTE UN RUOLO DI PRIMARIA IMPORTANZA NEL MERCATO DELLA PRODUZIONE DEL VETRO DI ALTA QUALITÀ.

Name: Werkman Tech
Description:
At Werkman Tech, we are leading the world in Vacuum Insulated Glass technology and Window and Door Systems. We’re known for transforming industry standards with advanced manufacturing techniques. 

What we offer:

Vacuum Insulated Glass Ranges

Heritage 8.3mm Vacuum Range
Platinium 10.3mm Vacuum Range
Ultimate 12.3mm Flat & Curved Vacuum Range

GVG90 WINDOW AND DOOR SYSTEMS
Our award-winning GVG90 frame, a Passive House Institute Certified Component, offers world-class performance with a Uf value of 1.0 W/m²K. It features multi-layered insulation, an airtight seal, and an RC3 security locking system, ensuring optimal energy efficiency and security. Unlike average double-glazed windows that last only 5 to 10 years, Werkman Tech's vacuum-insulated glass units last over 50 years.

ADVANCED SOLAR GLASS
We specialise in producing oversized, irregular shaped, and curved vacuum insulated glass units. As the exclusive distributor of advanced solar glass and vertical solar panels in the UK and Europe, we ensure unparalleled quality and innovation for all your glazing needs. Our state-of-the-art operational hub spans 26,000 sqm and boasts a daily production capacity of 1200 sqm of vacuum-insulated glass units.

WERKMAN TECH'S VERTICAL SOLAR PANELS
Our vertical solar panels transform building facades into efficient solar energy sources. Utilising advanced nanotechnology, these durable panels convert sunlight from vertical surfaces, making them ideal for urban and high-rise buildings. They offer a sustainable solution for reducing energy costs and carbon footprints.

If you're a window company looking to expand your offerings and lead the market with cutting-edge products, connect with me or contact me at Werkman Tech. 

We are looking for top window companies to become the sole distributor of our innovative Window and doors ranges within their county.

Name: SULTEMPERA LDA
Description:
A Sultêmpera é uma vidreira que actua no mercado da transformação do vidro
desde 2007 no entanto possui mais de 40 anos de experiência na área.
O fundador da Sultêmpera, Sr. António Vinagre, foi pioneiro na “arte” de
transformação do vidro na zona do Barlavento Algarvio tendo sido condecorado pela
Câmara Municipal de Portimão pelo seu contributo no desenvolvimento da Industria
Vidreira nessa zona do Algarve.
No inicio foi aberta uma pequena loja que se dedicava apenas à revenda, mas
em 2008 deu-se o salto com a aquisição de máquinas industriais automáticas de corte
de vidro que impulsionou o crescimento da empresa.
A acompanhar o processo evolutivo, no inicio do Ano de 2009 começamos a ser
também produtores de Vidro Duplo cumprindo com os requisitos da marcação CE.
Neste momento estamos num processo de Certificação do Produto e
implantação de um Sistema de Gestão de Qualidade.
Investimos na qualificação e formação contínua dos nossos colaboradores,
conseguindo desta forma prestar um serviço com maior profissionalismo e qualidade.
A aposta na modernização impulsionou um crescimento da empresa, quer em
quantidades, quer em qualidade dos produtos produzidos e serviços prestados.

Name: Glass Alliance Europe
Description:
Glass Alliance Europe is the European Alliance of Glass Industries. It has the unique feature of regrouping all the glass industries to work on common issues. It is composed of 14 national glass associations and of the 5 main sectors of the glass industries: container glass, flat glass, special glass, domestic glass and continuous filament glass fibres.
These sectors are very different, be it in terms of manufacturing process, products, markets, economics of the sectors and manufacturers but they all have in common to transform raw materials into glass by a process of melting.

In addition, thanks to the unlimited opportunities offered by the glass substance, all sectors are characterized by heavy investments in research and development to make available glass products fit for a sustainable, resource-efficient, low-carbon and culturally vibrant European society. Just think of it: fully recyclable bottles & jars, energy efficient glazing and windows, weight-lightening continuous filament glass fibres (CFGF) in reinforced plastic applications such as wind blades, flaconnage, tableware and art work, special glass (photovoltaic glass modules, glass for iphones, televisions and monitors, lighting glass, optical glass, laboratory and technical glassware and glass ceramic (cookware), etc.

Aware of the great added-value of their products, the European glass industries come together in Glass Alliance Europe to highlight the importance of glass making across Europe and to promote an economic and policy environment allowing European-based glass manufacturing industries to continue flourishing and providing Europe with an innovative, stylish and sustainable material that is present in every aspect of our daily lives.

تم تجهيز مصانعنا بأحدث التقنيات، ويعمل بها فرق فنية وإدارية ماهرة. هؤلاء الفرق مدربون بشكل دقيق لضمان الدقة والمعايير الفنية الصارمة، مما يضمن دمج الحرفية والكفاءة مع الأساليب المتطورة. من خلال الاستفادة من أحدث التطورات في تصنيع الزجاج والألومنيوم، نحن ملتزمون بتقديم منتجات تضع معايير جديدة للجودة والموثوقية.

Name: Glasfabrik Lamberts
Description: Founded in 1887, Glasfabrik LAMBERTS has devoted themselves to the manufacturing of cast glass which is glass formed by rolling processes. The family-owned company is the only European cast glass manufacturer that is not bound to any group and is one of the biggest factories with modern facilities and state-of-the art machinery. Furthermore, we are the only cast glass company in the world to manufacture all types of existing cast glass. Our products range from LINIT U-glass, a special and U-shaped rolled glass, ornamental glass (also as special ornamental glass for facades), antimony-free solar glass (optimised cast glass for solar power generation since 1993) to wired glass and wired ornamental glass. All our products are solely manufactured in our main factory in Wunsiedel, Germany, according to the highest quality standards by a workforce that fosters family tradition. In addition, we ensure the hightes possible environmental sustainability (EcoGlass) during the production of our standard glasses. LAMBERTS is the first and only cast glass company to manufacture all glass types using an oxygen-fired melting furnace which is the most ecologically sustainable method available. This pioneer step was already implemented in the 1990s due to our deep conviction that production processes should be evaluated and improved in terms of environmental friendliness. We are also constantly widening our portfolio of glass surfaces to meet the growing demands of the architects for the most aesthetic solutions.

Name: Doering Berlin
Description:
from simple cylindrical curved glass to complex polyaxial forms, from the curved

Custom-made architectural glass from Döring is used in façade construction or in lifts, door systems, balustrades and overhead glazing units. Curved glass also plays an important role in interior design and furnishings. The portfolio ranges from curved glass partitions, full-glass doors, showcases and glass furniture items to versatile glass units for shop furnishings, the refrigeration appliance industry and the hotel and restaurant sector.

Diversity with format
The requirements posed for glass today are extremely demanding. Modern glass must not only perform a wide range of functions – e.g. heat insulation, safety, noise reduction and sun protection – it must also support the realization of ambitious architectural visions. Today’s glass products are not simply flat. They may be curved in conical, spherical, elliptical or asymmetrical and polyaxial configurations. The production of these types of glass in keeping with contemporary functional and aesthetic standards poses a major challenge. In addition to state-of-the art machinery and equipment, the employees of vandaglas Döring rely on their keen sensitivity, their experience and a feeling for the material in order to produce perfect glass and achieve the delicate balance between the requirements of superior-quality design, maximum functionality and precise curve geometry A diverse range of glass products:
• CurvedPerform Mono | curved single-pane float glass 
• CurvedPerform Protect | curved laminated safety glass for enhanced security in doors, lifts, partition walls, facades and more
• CurvedPerform Safe | curved tempered safety glass for everyday and unusual applications
• CurvedPerform Design | curved float glass with impressive satined, enamelled or other finishes
• IsoPerform / TriplePerform Curved | double- and triple insulation glazing that that combines heat insulation with security, sun protection and/or noise reduction

Name: H2GLASS
Description:
The Glass Decarbonisation Challenge
In the next 30 years, the glass industry - like other European industries - must be completely decarbonised. The lifetime of a glass furnace is about 12-15 years. Innovations for glass production are therefore urgently needed now, because the year 2050 is only 2 furnaces away.

H2GLASS aims to develop the solutions that glass manufacturers need to meet climate targets and make their sector sustainable by replacing fossil fuels with 100% hydrogen ensuring the required product quality and manages this safely. 

How will we achieve this? 
- 5 on-site industrial use-cases (Steklarna Hrastnik, Vetrobalsamo, Zignago Vetro, PTML Pilkington, Owens Corning representing 98 % of EU glass production + replicability demonstrator for the aluminium industry (Hydro Havrand)
- 100% green H2 supply through a portable electrolyser
- Application of digital twin technologies and development of smart production processes for predictive maintenance and easier monitoring of the system

Name: KONATIC
Description:
Located in France (Lyon) and in the United States (Miami), KONATIC designs and sells outstanding equipment for the glass industry. With more than 15 years of R&D, KONATIC is committed to providing valuable technology at the right price.

Hot-end sensors:

- SMARTGOB: to control the weight with closed loop regulation and vizualise the shape of each gob
- SPYRO: to control the temperature of the blow and blank molds and neck rings with closed loop regulation
- TRINITY: hot-end sensor to monitor the glass distribution, to reject critical defects and accurate dimensional control with AI 

Laboratory machines:

- NANO:  laboratory machine to measure the hot-end coating (body and under the finish) without index fluid
- TIN READER: hand-held device to measure the hot-end coating next to the coating hood
- FUSION MACHINA: exclusive distributor of a laboratory machine developed by Laser Metrologie with automatic counting of seeds, bubbles and blisters, Useful to monitor the level of seeds in the furnace with automatic counting

Traceability sensors:
- PRECISION: laboratory machine installed at hot-end to measure the quality of the datamatrix code
- HEXAGON: in-line machine to install at cold-end or at filling lines to read in-line the datamatrix codes (non-contat technology)
- SPIN READER: one camera to install on a rotary machine to read the datamatrix code on glass bottles
- APP for mobile phone to read the datamatrix code
 
Current customers: INBEV, OI, VERALLIA, ARDAGH, VETROPACK, BA GLASS,...

Looking for more information ? Don't hesitate to contact us at contact@konatic.com

Name: New Temper
Description:
New Temper é sinônimo de qualidade total em vidro, sendo a primeira empresa do ramo a conseguir, no Rio de Janeiro, o selo do INMETRO. Todo esse sucesso teve início em 1997, quando seus fundadores deram início à um projeto que tinha como metas principais a qualidade nos produtos e a excelência no atendimento. Foi com esse pensamento, que a empresa cresceu, conquistou uma rede de distribuidores em todo grande rio.
O dinamismo e a constante vontade de crescer deram impulso a mais uma conquista da New Temper: a inauguração da New Temper Noroeste, em Rio das Ostras, em 2007. Mais uma vez pensando na melhoria do atendimento, foi investido nessa nova unidade com 5.484m² de área construída, num terreno de 15.000m². Cobrindo toda a região noroeste do estado do Rio de Janeiro e estendendo a sua atuação até Minas Gerais e Espírito Santo, este empreendimento gerou dezenas de empregos diretos e novos negócios na região.
Antes de mais nada, como se pode perceber, a New Temper é uma empresa que possui responsabilidade social, investe no setor e acima de tudo, possui a confiança de distribuidores, clientes e fornecedores. A participação em eventos como Casa Cor e Morar Mais por Menos, demonstra o prestígio e a confiabilidade que conquistou no mercado.

Name: CristalCare
Description:
Innovative long term glass protection. 
Innovadora protección del vidrio a largo plazo

No (nano)coating! 
#Bathroom and #interior #glass
For all indoor applications, CristalCare is not only lime, dirt and strong water repellent, but also has a strong antibacterial effect. CristalCare offers advanced protection for, for example: shower walls and cabins, sliding glass walls and interior doors, etc.
#Balustrade glass
As a result of applying CristalCare to the balustrade glass, CristalCare’s innovative glass finishing creates a strong molecular bond with the atomic structure of the glass. 
Nevertheless, the original glass properties are preserved after the special treatment. The extremely long period that the glass is protected also contributes to the green initiative for a significant reduction in the use of water and (aggressive) cleaning agents.

#Marine glass
Marine glass is just as susceptible to corrosion and tarnishing as metal. Here too, CristalCare is a powerful and sustainable solution. Despite the harsh and extreme sea conditions, CristalCare also proves its innovative glass protection here. Lime, salt and dirt don’t stand a chance!

Name: Hybridized
Description:
Some products improve buildings. Some ideas improve the entire value chain.
To solve the climate challenges of the construction industry, we need more than better materials. We need solutions that actually work — today. Solutions that deliver real impact, while fitting into the way the industry already operates. That’s where we come in.

Hybridized is not just developing the next generation of insulating glass — we’re making it possible to upgrade to lower emissions and higher performance, without changing everything else. Our glass units have the same dimensions as traditional double glazing and can be installed in existing frames. No structural changes. Just better glass – and smaller footprints.
Using a production method that combines glass with functional films, we offer a low-weight, low-emission, high-performance alternative — with built-in logic for reuse. We work closely with manufacturers, advisors, and property developers to align both product and process with tomorrow’s requirements.

The world doesn’t need more visions. It needs solutions that work in reality. Hybridized is not here to take over the industry — we’re here to make it work better. Together. Our job is to make the right choice the easy one.
Hybridized – Smarter glass. Real impact.

Sammanfattningsvis har Aluminiumservice sedan 2002 varit din pålitliga partner för att förvandla utomhusutrymmen till funktionella och estetiskt tilltalande områden. Vi är dedikerade till att erbjuda högkvalitativa lösningar med noggrannhet och omsorg om våra kunders behov och önskemål. Välj Aluminiumservice för att ta din utomhusupplevelse till en ny nivå.

Name: Fenster Doktor
Description:
Fensterdoktor AG: Ihr Experte für Fensterreparaturen und -service 

Wenn es um Ihre Fenster geht, ist die Fensterdoktor AG Ihr zuverlässiger Partner in der Schweiz. Egal, ob es sich um eine schnelle Reparatur nach einem Einbruchschaden, den Wechsel von Dichtungen oder den Einbau von Insektenschutzgittern handelt – wir bieten Ihnen einen ganzheitlichen Service, der keine Wünsche offen lässt.

Unsere Dienstleistungen umfassen:

- Ersatzverglasungen: Wir sorgen dafür, dass Ihre Fenster wieder wie neu aussehen.

- Einbruchschaden-Sofortreparaturen: Schnelle Hilfe, wenn es darauf ankommt.

-Dichtungswechsel: Für eine bessere Energieeffizienz und Dichtheit Ihrer Fenster.

-Insektenschutzgitter: Schutz vor ungebetenen Gästen in Ihrem Zuhause.

- Mechanische Reparaturen: Von defekten Fenstergriffen bis zu komplexen Mechaniken – wir reparieren es!

Vertrauen Sie auf unsere Expertise und lassen Sie uns Ihre Fenster wieder in Bestform bringen. Bei Fragen oder für einen Termin, stehen wir Ihnen jederzeit gerne zur Verfügung.

 www.fensterdoktor.ch

Name: Sglass.si
Description:
We are a Slovenian company that offers the revolutionary Smart Glass and Smart PDLC film window darkening technique. Your privacy is just a click away.

Smart glass technology consists of a special film laminated to the glass itself. It consists of special molecules that change to a transparent state when exposed to electricity.

If you would like to darken existing glass surfaces, we also offer a self-adhesive smart film (Smart PDLC film), which works in the same way as smart glass.

Smart glass is an energy-saving technology that provides 99% UV resistance, better sound insulation, and is made from nature-friendly materials.

Both techniques are also suitable for advertising on glass surfaces.

Name: Bojar Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Jak to się stało, że nasze szyby są w Waszych oknach? 

Przygoda naszej firmy rozpoczęła się w 1997 r. w Ełku, gdzie rozpoczęliśmy działalność jako dystrybutorzy profili PVC i akcesoriów do okien. Dobrze myślicie, mamy już 25 lat. 

Jako pełna pasji firma rodzinna, już od początku naszego funkcjonowania wykorzystywaliśmy okazję, które pomagały nam zwiększyć  swój potencjał. 

Dzięki temu od 2003 r. staliśmy się  kompleksowym dostawcą i rozpoczęliśmy produkcję szyb zespolonych, budując jednocześnie nowy, nowoczesny zakład produkcyjny z maszynami do obróbki szkła. 

I tak z tą samą pasją, która doprowadziła Nas do założenia firmy, działamy do dziś. Odpowiadając na Wasze potrzeby, ciągle poszerzamy naszą ofertę i wprowadzamy nowe produkty.

Name: Sepehr Safety Glass Co. (Member of GGI)
Description:
Gilan Glass was established in 1981 in order to participate in the market of automotive, construction, and industrial glass production, and North Safety Glass actory was launched in 1982 in the form of Gilan Glass Industry Group Development Plan in industrial city of Rasht .

At that time, due to political and economic conditions in the country, the production of this factory was focused on automotive glass .

Although the equipment installed in the factory of this group had high capabilities for industrial and construction glass production, because of the country’s need to develop exports, automotive glass production became a priority. In 2001, the new site of this group in Kaveh Industrial City, named Sepehr Imen Shisheh (Sepehr Safety glass), was started up with modern European production lines to produce new generation of automotive glass and meet the needs of the automotive industry. In 2012, in order to complete the plan and cover innovations in construction industry, considering the valuable experience of managers and experts, the group attempted to set up construction glass production site with the world's most advanced automatic machinery. Today, we are proud to supply a variety of facades, doors and windows, and decorative glass with highest quality. Name: PSGLASS
Description:
PSG is a result of the business activity of the Papadopoulos family since 1975 when Panagiotis Papadopoulos settled in Thessaloniki and started with a small glass shop.

Since the beginning, the company focused on innovation. In 1979 his brother George joined the company and in 1982, were the first to produce double glass panes in Greece. During a decade in which the construction industry was booming, Panagiotis Papadopoulos moved the business to the industrial area in Sindos, where it is still found, The automated production of double glazing panes began there, as well as the architectural application on glass.

During that time, technologies related to glass panes evolved drastically, thus led to the introduction of laminated glass by the company in the country in 1997. This addition was evidence of the company’s groundbreaking vision. In 2004, PSG brought the first line for screen printing glass panel in jumbo dimension.

In 2006, the company was established as one of the foremost vertical integration companies in the Balkans. As a result, the company still has access to all needed applications, having experience, knowledge and the will to succeed throughout all its years.
After 2018, Alexandros and Tasos Papadopoulos took over the administration of the company, increasing the production rate and the human resources of the company. There was a rapid increase in the number of members that comprise PSG with the employment of 35 new members, as a result of the intensified production activity.

In 2020, the company established a national logistics network with 2 to 3 days delivery of the processed glasses

Description:

This website is organized to help educate school district officials and school designers about fire-rated glazing technologies that make safer facilities. The content that you will find here is a result of our own research derived from data that is available to the public. We have endeavored to present the latest information.

PRL’s architectural metal fabrication machinery includes brake presses up to 12′ long. We stock a full line of stainless steel, brass and anodized aluminum sheets. Name: BAHIA VIDROS OFICIAL
Description:
A Bahia Vidros atua no mercado de industrialização, beneficiamento e distribuição de vidros desde 2005. Atendendo os setores de construção civil, serralheria, movelaria, arquitetura e decoração.

Os investimentos em tecnologia e equipamentos de última geração para atender os mais altos padrões de qualidade, vem dando destaque a Bahia Vidros no mercado. Localizada estrategicamente em Santo Antônio de Jesus/BA, um elo entre diversas regiões, a Bahia Vidros Temperados atende diversos estados como: Bahia, Sergipe, Alagoas, Pernambuco, Paraíba, Minas Gerais e Espirito Santo. Com mão-de-obra especializada e frota própria, a Bahia Vidros faz entregas em qualquer lugar de forma rápida e pontual.

Name: CGRecycle
Description:
CGRecycle is a brand that specializes in promoting the responsible disposal and recycling of glassware. Their recycled glassware is not only environmentally-friendly but also stylish and functional.

Looking for a sustainable alternative to plastic cups? CGRecycle offers a range of recycled glassware products that are durable, safe, and eco-friendly.

With CGRecycle's recycled glassware, you can enjoy your favorite beverages while also contributing to a cleaner, greener planet. Their products are made from high-quality recycled glass, making them an excellent choice for sustainable living.

At CGRecycle, we believe that every little action counts when it comes to saving the planet. By choosing our recycled glassware, you're making a small but significant step towards a more sustainable future.

Name: MIDI MIROITERIE
Description:
MIDI MIROITERIE est une entreprise familiale fondée à Sète au milieu des années 1930.
Spécialisée dans la fabrication de vitrage (double vitrage, vitrage isolant, trempé, feuilleté...) Midi miroiterie compte aujourd'hui parmi les principaux acteurs dans son secteur.
A la pointe de l'innovation, la philosophie du groupe s'appuie sur la réactivité, le contact avec ses clients et la qualité de sa production.
Midi Miroiterie rayonne sur 14 départements du grand Sud.
Membre du réseau Climalit Partner de Saint Gobain et certifié par Cekal, le groupe Midi Miroiterie dispose des labels de références dans les métiers du vitrage.
Midi Miroiterie, c'est la force d'une industrie solidement ancrée dans son secteur et l'agilité d'une ETI familiale au service de ses clients.
La promesse relationnelle s'appuie sur un haut niveau de technicité, des partenariats forts, et une réactivité optimisée.
La fabrication des vitrages est entièrement réalisée sur les deux sites situés à Frontignan (34) d'une superficie totale de 7000m2.
Les 60 collaborateurs du Groupe composé de Midi Miroiterie et de sa filiale Trempglass s'engagent au quotidien dans une démarche d'excellence au bénéfice des clients, professionnels dans les métiers du bâtiment.

Name: SWARCO Indusferica
Description:
We leverage the universal benefits of glass beads for your special industry applications, in energy-efficient ways.

Processing and refining flat glass cullet into micro glass beads is SWARCO Indusfericas' core competence. With over five decades of experience and continuous research and development activities, SWARCO has always been at the forefront and set new standards in the glass beads industry.  Glass beads can be used in a wide range of products to increase the material properties. They are also used for surface and water treatment.

Name: Vetraria D'Adda S.P.A.
Description:
Vetraria D’Adda è un azienda leader nella distribuzione del vetro piano in grandi lastre, in casse ed in nudo pacchi.

È inoltre attivo il servizio di vendita per le lastre sciolte, le casse miste e le misure fisse. La distribuzione del vetro è effettuata in modo capillare e costante tramite una flotta di mezzi propri. 

La vetraria D’Adda ha due magazzini adibiti a deposito e stoccaggio di vetro, dotati delle più avanzate tecnologie e di un personale altamente specializzato. Uno dei nostri punti di forza è l'alto mix prodotti che ci permette di soddisfare le più disparate richieste in tempi molto brevi.

La nostra missione quotidiana è la massima soddisfazione dei clienti. Servizio, disponibilità, qualità e puntualità sono gli obiettivi che perseguiamo giorno per giorno.

I nostri valori sono la trasparenza, l'onestà, la correttezza, l'integrità, il miglioramento continuo, la soddisfazione del cliente, la precisione e la puntualità. Questi sono i punti cardine che ci guidano nelle nostre scelte presenti e future e che valorizzano i rapporti di partnership con la nostra clientela.

Name: Jakobsen Design
Description: The brand was founded in 2010 by product designer Martin Jakobsen. His work is mainly influenced by minimalism and a penchant for finding innovative solutions. Brand philosophy is based on detailed work in terms of creating a simple, yet functional and aesthetic design.

Name: Quidam
Description: Quidam è il risultato dell’evoluzione di un’esperienza quarantennale nella lavorazione del vetro piano. Affermata nella produzione di vetri speciali per l’edilizia, ha acquisito esperienza nelle lavorazioni per l’architettura, l’interior design e i complementi d’arredo. L’elevata padronanza tecnologica e il costante aggiornamento permettono un’innovazione produttiva che soddisfa le mutevoli necessità degli architetti, dei designer e delle aziende. Dinamismo, innovazione e creatività sono il “carburante” che alimenta la continua evoluzione tecnologica di Quidam. La sfida nelle lavorazioni di grandi dimensioni e la piena autonomia su tutte le tecniche applicate, sono la garanzia di un servizio unico e completo.

Name: Interglass B.V.
Description:
Interglass wil laten zien wat de mogelijkheden zijn over de toepasbaarheid van glas in interieurs, bedrijven en utiliteitsbouw. Wij geloven in het gebruik van glas, omdat het een duurzaam en veelzijdig product is. Door maatwerk kan glas op veel verschillende manieren worden toegepast.

Wij doen dit door met onze klanten mee te denken, en zo tot unieke oplossingen te komen. Door onze toewijding en innovatieve manier van denken willen wij samen met de klant komen tot een kwalitatief perfect resultaat.

Wij zijn een bedrijf dat gespecialiseerd is in het toepassen van glas. Bij ons kunt u terecht voor glazen deuren, douchewanden, glazen achterwanden, balkonbeglazing, balustrades, beloopbaar glas, spiegels, verlicht glas en privacy glas. Ook serres, tuinkamers, glazen winkelpuien en kantoorinrichtingen behoren tot de mogelijkheden. 

Bent u op zoek naar een jong, enthousiast en ambitieus bedrijf dat met u meedenkt en u helpt met het realiseren van uw ideeën? Dan bent u bij Interglass aan het juiste adres.

Name: Transparent Overseas
Description:
Established in the year 1996, Transparent overseas is a renowned manufacturer exporter of an enchanting range of Handcrafted Glass Decorative Items which are known for their mesmerizing designs, flawless finish and attractive looks. Our range is the result of fine workmanship of our craftsmen, who have the proficiency to design these decorative products as per the demands of the clients.

Out of that Transparent Overseas is the parent company, a 100% E.O.U. unit, incorporated in 1996. Directly or indirectly we are associated with the glass industries for last 30 years. Transparent is a ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and OSHAS 18001 certified company. Besides already approved by all reputed customer New developments and innovation are our passion and this passion is accomplished by dedicated Transparent team. We not only deal with Transparent articles but are also Transparent in communication, action and performance.

In order to offer an impeccable range and meet the bulk requirements of our clients, we have set up a state-of-the-art infrastructure. Our unit is facilitated with hi-tech machines and equipment such as Finishing Equipment, Annealing Controllers & Grinding Machines that allow us to manufacture an unmatched range of Handcrafted Glass Decorative Items. Owing to our fascinating range and customization capabilities, we have been able to garner a huge client base in Sweden, UK, USA, Spain, Europe, Italy, Australia etc.

Under the able guidance of our M.D Mr. Mukesh Kumar Bansal, we have been able to carve in the industry. Their rich industry experience and continuous supervision has enabled us to establish ourselves in the global market.

Our range reflects the rich Indian heritage and beautifies the interiors added to. Available in multiple designs, texture, finishes, colors and sizes, our range can also be tailor made as per the requirements of our clients. Moreover, we also have the competence to meet the bulk requirements of our clients.

Name: Aksum Glass
Description: Aksum Glass is a premier division of the AKSUM Group of Companies, specializing in high-quality, innovative glass solutions tailored to meet the unique demands of the security, manufacturing, and environmental sectors. Renowned for its expertise in producing advanced bulletproof and armored glass, Aksum Glass serves diverse industries, including defense.

Name: IWAS Products - Upcycling Platform
Description:
We're Iwas, and we're driven by a simple yet powerful idea: upcycling is the future. We believe in transforming waste into valuable resources, crafting innovative solutions, and inspiring a more sustainable world.

What Sets Us Apart?

Expert Upcycling: We excel in transforming waste into high-quality upcycled glassware and teakwood products, reducing environmental impact.

Sustainable Solutions: We don't just create products; we offer comprehensive upcycling solutions for businesses, including:

Gifting Solutions: Unique, personalized corporate gifts made from upcycled materials.

Retail Collections: Eco-friendly, stylish products tailored for retail businesses, available as co-branded or private label collections.

Hospitality Solutions: Custom glassware and teakwood products designed to enhance guest experiences in hotels, restaurants, and other hospitality businesses.

Our 100% fully owned boutique factory focuses on improving our eco footprint while fostering entrepreneurial spirit among our workers.

Community of Change: We see upcycling as a movement. By promoting education and collaborating with passionate partners, we aim to create a ripple effect, driving change and fostering a more sustainable future.

Name: GREEN GLASS INDUSTRIES
Description:

At Green Glass Industries LLC, we specialize in a range of services, including facade solutions, interior solutions, glass processing, securities solutions, fire-safety solutions, and creation in glass. We are proud to have built a reputation for excellence and reliability in the industry. Stay connected with us on LinkedIn to learn more about our latest projects and services. Thank you for choosing Green Glass Industries LLC!
Location: Ras Al Khaimah, Ras Al Khaimah

Name: Farukhi Glass Industries
Description:
With a legacy spanning over 38 years, Farukhi Glass Industries stands as a trusted name in the heart of India's glass-making hub—Firozabad, Uttar Pradesh. Established in December 1986, we are a pioneering partnership firm rooted in tradition, craftsmanship, and innovation.

Specializing in the manufacturing of glass bangles, we operate under the broader category of non-metallic mineral products, contributing to both cultural heritage and modern glassware demand. Our facility, located along Agra Road in Village Dholpura, is equipped to meet the evolving needs of customers across India and beyond.

At Farukhi, we blend generational expertise with evolving techniques to preserve the art of glassmaking while ensuring consistent quality and scalable production.

Name: Vidriería Calello

Desde entonces, nos hemos convertido en líderes en el mercado en términos de calidad y cumplimiento gracias a la utilización de maquinaria electromecánica para el procesamiento de vidrios y espejos. 

Nuestros valores de integridad, compromiso y transparencia nos acompañan desde que Francisco Calello y Teresa Alessandri abrieron su local por primera vez.

Name: Hard Glass

Name: VAIDER GROUP AG
Description: The Vaider Group can take pride in a well-branched network in the European and global markets of the glass industry. Name: GlassArt Design

Name: Aadhi Glass Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Aadhi Glass Pvt. Ltd. is a premier mirror manufacturing company dedicated to delivering top-quality aluminium-coated mirrors to the market. Based in the SIPCOT Industrial Park, Hosur, Tamil Nadu, the company has established itself as a trusted name in the mirror industry by combining advanced technology, expert craftsmanship, and a customer-centric approach. Unlike traditional glass manufacturers, Aadhi Glass specializes in transforming sheet glass into premium-grade mirrors through a series of meticulous coating and finishing processes.

Industry Leadership and Vision:
Founded under the leadership of Mr. Narayana Raju, Aadhi Glass Pvt. Ltd. is committed to innovation and excellence. The company’s state-of-the-art manufacturing facility, equipped with advanced machinery imported from Germany and China, reflects its vision to set new benchmarks in mirror quality and production efficiency. With a strong focus on sustainability and cost-effectiveness, Aadhi Glass aims to redefine the mirror industry by offering products that are both high-quality and eco-friendly.

Cutting-Edge Technology
At the heart of Aadhi Glass’s operations is its advanced aluminium mirror line, a technology that ensures precision and durability in every product. The facility’s production capacity of 60 tons per day allows the company to cater to large-scale orders while maintaining quick turnaround times. This high level of efficiency not only meets market demands but also positions Aadhi Glass as a reliable partner for businesses across industries.

Specialized Processes
Aadhi Glass transforms raw sheet glass into high-quality mirrors through a series of specialized processes, including aluminum coating, quality inspections, and finishing. These processes are designed to ensure the mirrors meet international standards for durability, clarity, and aesthetic appeal. The focus on aluminum-coated mirrors provides a cost-effective alternative to silver-coated mirrors, with enhanced longevity.

Name: Vetrerie Di Empoli
Description:
Produzione tradizionale di vetri artistici per la tavola. Da oltre 80 anni, impegnati a realizzare sempre nuove collezioni, innovative e originali.
La storia di Vetrerie di Empoli mostra che siamo nati come vetrai, ma anche come dettaglianti. Per questo sappiamo cosa offrire ai nostri clienti. Nel negozio di via Montenapoleone proviamo le nuove linee con una clientela internazionale e raffinata, prima di inserirle nel nostro assortimento. La relazione quotidiana con i nostri clienti ci ha insegnato molto: non solo desiderano un bel prodotto, ma un oggetto che affermi la loro personalità!

Name: Martina Nykodýmová
Description:
V roce 1972 jsem se narodila ve slovenských Malackách. Od mých 7 let jsem žila ve Mlýnech v obci Kytlice. Tatínek byl hranař skla a teta sklo malovala. Už jako malá jsem přišla do styku se sklem, hlavně jako materiálem k dalšímu zušlechťování. V roce 1990 jsem se vyučila na Středním odborném učilišti sklářském v Novém Boru malířskou skla, a o sedmnáct let později, v roce 2007 na Vyšší odborné škole sklářské a Střední škole, také v Novém Boru, vystudovala obor- Sklářský průmysl.

Celý profesní život mám spojený se sklem, ale až od roku 2019 se věnuji svému dávnému snu, autorské tvorbě. Vyrábím skleněné plastiky a reliéfy, tavené ve formách. Mým cílem je, aby má tvorba měla magickou sílu. Naplňuje mě tvořit světlem, barevností a celkovým dojmem krásné a příjemné okamžiky. Prostřednictvím mého díla dám sklu možnost projevit a promluvit jeho duši.

Name: Arie Romijn Beglazingsmaterialen B.V.

Name: Quality Glass and Mirror Service
Description:
Founded in 1985, Quality Glass and Mirror Service is a full service glass and aluminum fabrication company servicing the five state region around Omaha, Nebraska. We take pride in providing quality glass products to a broad wholesale customer base, working with designers and architects, contractors, and owners to deliver the best quality product available, tailored to each project. We have a history of success across a wide variety of glass products: from insulated glass windows on a high rise building, to patio doors, standard shower doors, frameless heavy glass, customer mirrors, and more.

Whether you need one customer piece of glass or have a large commercial or residential project, give us a call and experience the Quality difference: shorter lead times, product of the highest quality, and extremely knowledgeable staff. We take Quality seriously.

With cutting-edge infrastructure and in-house capabilities, we are an elite Saint-Gobain processor, committed to quality, innovation, and timely execution. From residential homes to iconic commercial landmarks, our projects speak of precision, performance, and trust.

Name: Zabsan Glass
Description:
Glass bottles and jars are being produced by Zabsan Glass. The production includes a furnace with a daily capacity of 250 tons, designed by Horn, and it is equipped with Lahti technology for the Batch plant.

At present, two AIS Emhart machines, specifically 10 SC models, are operating at full capacity. Subsequently, the bottles undergo annealing in the Antonnini machines and are inspected using IRIS machines for quality assurance. The Cold end machines employed follow MSK technology.

Name: Alpine Glass Denver
Description:
Alpine Glass has been locally owned and operated since 1968 while serving the greater Denver, Colorado area. We are a commercial contract glazing company specializing in aluminum storefronts, curtain walls, commercial contract glazing and custom ordered glass projects.
 
         With an extensive background in the commercial glass and glazing industry, we employ experts in the industry to provide superior workmanship, meticulous attentiveness and trained coordination to help produce a high quality finished product. We set the standard in the industry by providing quality service, on time delivery and guaranteed satisfaction.

Alpine Glass opened its doors for business in Thornton, Colorado in 1968 with just a few employees and a few service trucks. In our early years we generated core business values that consisted of integrity, honesty and dependability. Here at Alpine Glass, we have been able to continuously hold weight to those values to this day which specifically shows when it comes to our respectable relationships with contractors and suppliers that have been building over the years.

Name: Em Vidros

Name: Meet The GUYS
Description:
This Page is a Showcase of the Equipment and Services offered by the G.U.Y.S (Glass Up-and-coming Young Suppliers). 

The GUYS support the glass industry as entrepreneurial and enthusiastic smaller companies that have some great offerings to help glass plant in such areas as efficiency, quality, and safety. 

However, because they are the 'smaller voice' in the glass industry compared to the GIANTS (who of course you know about), their offerings sometimes go unnoticed, except by a few glass companies who recognise the value they offer. For the rest, their value to the glass plant operation may never be recognised, unless of course they join up with of one of the GIANTS, perhaps many years later on.

The objective of this page is to make you aware of what is available from the GUYS to help your glass plant operation NOW. This page provides community links so you can easily access more information about the products and services of the GUYS featured here.

This Page will also offer some initial evaluations of their offerings to help you see which of the GUYS you align with most and which can meet your industry needs the best.

Why wait for the GIANTS to recognise their value and then offer you the same products with the branding of the GIANTS and many years later when you could have had the benefits well before such a time? 

The community links will help you easily dig deeper and get any further information you need, perhaps prior to making contact with on of the GUYS featured.

It is inside the Posts and Articles on this Page where you will find the links to Groups with a Community of like-minded glass plant operations people and more information to peruse at your leisure.

Support the GUYS who are there to support your drive for glass plant operational excellence. 

This could be the start of a journey of mutually beneficial relationship with one (or more) of the GUYS featured here. 

More to follow in future, keep coming back!

Name: Huta Szkła Kryształowego Julia
Description:
Huta Julia to polska, rodzinna firma i unikalny na skalę europejską producent szkła szlifowanego w Polsce. Historia Julii sięga 1866 roku i wiąże się nierozerwalnie z dwoma niemieckimi producentami szkła i kryształu: hutą Josephine ze Szklarskiej Poręby oraz hutą Fritza Heckerta z Piechowic.  Nieprzerwanie od stu pięćdziesięciu lat Julia produkuje unikalne i wysokiej jakości szkło szlifowane, łącząc najlepsze, oparte na tradycyjnej technologii, doświadczenia rzemieślnicze z nowoczesnymi rozwiązaniami. 

Zachowanie dziedzictwa Huty Julii poprzez kontynuację tradycyjnych, kryształowych szlifów i form oraz łączenie wzorów z nowoczesnym designem i nowoczesną technologią - to genius loci miejsca.  

Huta Julia to również magiczne miejsce w sercu Karkonoszy, zachwycająca atrakcja turystyczna, która zaprasza na: 
- zwiedzanie huty
- warsztaty dla dzieci i dorosłych rozwijające umiejętności pracy ze szkłem i szlifem 
- odwiedzenie Krystalium - edukacyjnego centrum szklanych opowieści
- zakupy w dwóch sklepach firmowych.

Huta Julia to miejsce w Karkonoszach, w którym zarówno dzieci, jak i dorośli mogą doświadczyć niezwykłych wrażeń związanych z produkcją szkła kryształowego - nie tylko obserwując proces produkcji, ale również uczestnicząc w warsztatach i zwiedzając Krystalium. 

Równolegle do nurtu turystycznego Huta Julia rozwija nowe linie produktów kryształowych, tworzy reedycje popularnych w okresie powojennym wzorów kryształowych oraz współpracuje z wieloma uznanymi, polskimi projektantami szkła i biżuterii.

• la rénovation, la mise sous double vitrage, l’entretien de vitraux existants (appartements Haussmanniens, cages d’escaliers, hôtels, restaurants, …)

Nous travaillons étroitement avec les architectes et décorateurs d’intérieurs, entreprises du bâtiment, agents immobiliers et artisans ainsi qu’en direct auprès de particuliers.

Notre mission est de rendre le vitrail accessible à tous en proposant des créations sur mesure adaptées à chaque projet. Aussi, nous avons à coeur de mêler tradition et modernité afin d’offrir des pièces uniques dans des styles variés (Contemporain, Art Deco, Art Nouveau, …).

La confidentialité, la réactivité et l’excellence sont nos piliers, ainsi nous mettons notre savoir-faire à votre service pour vous accompagner à chaque étape de la conception à la pose afin de garantir votre entière satisfaction.

Etapes d’une commande : 
1. Après une première prise de contact, nous soumettrons à votre appréciation des croquis accompagnés d’un devis.
2. Dès le devis accepté, nous nous rencontrerons afin de choisir les verres et confirmer les dimensions. La production pourra alors commencer !
3. Quelques semaines plus tard, nous pourrons enfin intervenir chez vous pour la pose.

Nous collaborons avec des artistes pour concevoir des oeuvres originales ainsi qu’avec des artisans qualifiés dans divers corps de métiers pour créer des espaces riches en couleurs et atmosphères.

Contactez-nous dès aujourd’hui pour obtenir un devis gratuit personnalisé sous 48h et donnez vie à votre projet de vitrail !

Il mercato nazionale di riferimento era legato al settore dell'edilizia, ma la volontà di diversificare ed esplorare nuove aree di business, ha permesso a Nuova Protex di orientare le proprie strategie su diversi settori, ottenendo anche la certificazione di Qualità ISO 9000 nel 1993.

Oggi Nuova Protex esporta in Europa oltre il 70% dei suoi prodotti e guarda con sempre maggiore interesse allo sviluppo oltreoceano il quale sta incrementando in maniera esponenziale.
Con più di 100.000 mq di vetro venduto all'anno, l’azienda è oggi una realtà dinamica e flessibile, pronta a soddisfare le esigenze del cliente con soluzioni di elevata qualità.

Nuova Protex è una delle aziende fondatrici di Made in Italy, una realtà nata per promuovere competitività e innovazione delle imprese del territorio italiano.

Our plant was founded in 2010 in Hasyaa Industrial Zone in the city of Homs. This strategic location, at the heart of Syria, provides us with a logistical advantage, allowing us to be consistently reliable in serving our clients’ needs nationally and internationally.

Name: Supaglass Industries
Description:
Supaglass Industries has been established since 2011.  We are a locally owned and operated company specialising in delivering high quality glazing products to the building industry and to the general public. This includes:

•	Custom curtain wall systems,
•	Skylights,
•	Commercial grade single and double glazed windows and doors,
•	Residential single and double glazed windows and doors,
•	Frameless door systems, including auto doors and pivot doors,
•	Commercial aluminium partition wall systems,
•	Shop front glazing


Supaglass Industries are specialists in the manufacturing of double glazed glass units, water jet cutting and glass toughening, all of which are conducted in house by our experienced team of glazing industry specialists. Our in house team of window fabricators are dedicated to delivering premium quality window and door units custom made to the clients specifications.

Our vision is to become Canberra’s leading glazing industry specialist focusing on improving the thermal efficiency of buildings in Australia. All glass units are designed to match or exceed the required specifications and are tailor made to suit the Canberra climate.

We are dedicated to delivering a high level of quality products and customer service to all of our clients and take pride in being able to deliver our projects from estimation to delivery in house. Strength through recommendation has enabled us to expand our operations, invest back into the company ensuring our product is the leader in its field. Along with our regular work, Supaglass Industries take on challenging and technical projects that are the most complex in the industry. We have expertise in trouble shooting and consultation when technical design issues arise making us the first choice for many local building firms for their projects.

Name: ZANATTA VETRO S.r.l.
Description:
Since its foundation in 1972, Zanatta Vetro, with its pioneering spirit, has established itself as a premium glass fabricator, first of insulating glass and then, thanks to continuous investments in new equipment over the years, of oversize insulating, heat treated and laminated glass, focusing on the architectural, naval and interior glass markets.
The extensive experience of its 80 employees with superior technical skills, combined with a passion for the material and modern production methods using the state-of-the-art automated technology, provide a comprehensive glass fabrication system capable of producing customized solutions in almost any shape and size to the highest level of perfection, guaranteeing high reliability and meeting the delivery dates agreed.

Beginning 2023, Zanatta Vetro has joined the Brombal Group, a pool of Italian companies that are leaders in the production of luxury windows and doors with a strong focus on international markets. With this operation, Zanatta Vetro renews its ambition to satisfy the global market of excellence.

Today, Zanatta Vetro from its historic 376,700 sq.ft. (35,000m2) headquarters in Montebelluna (TV)- Italy, where the offices, factory and warehouse are currently located, offers customized fullservice solutions, transforming flat glass to create:
• Tempered, laminated and heat soaked glass up to 7500x3210mm | 295x126”.
• Insulating glass for commercial projects up to 7500x3210mm | 295x126”.
• Screen-printed glass up to 2600x5200 mm | 204x102”.

Name: Frameless Glass Curtains FGC
Description: Established in 2009, Frameless Glass Curtains Managing Director, Gary Beresford set about improving the conventical slide and fold doors. Substantial investment in creating what we believe to the perfect slide and fold door followed. We designing new hardware, suitable glass units to enhance the frameless concept and engineering the product for the ultimate in long-term reliability.  Only in this way would our product compete with the long guarantees and performance requirements of the UK home improvement market and provide a better all-round product.  Using a unique Patented 20mm toughened glass spacer, the doors have no vertical mullions between the individual panes to obscure a view- they are almost invisible. Based in Kent, our company has satisfied thousands of homeowners who have benefited from our specially designed and manufactured glass frameless doors. Our competitively priced doors are utilised across both domestic and commercial applications and have been highly recommended by numerous satisfied customers.

Name: Fratelli Tosi snc
Description:
Welcome to the atelier of Venetian mirrors
Fratelli Tosi and Fratelli Barbini are ambassadors in the world and point of reference in Murano for the production of authentic Venetian mirrors, reproduction of antique mirrors, modern mirrors, applique mirrors, glass furniture and TV mirrors. All the Murano glass object produced in our artistic workshop are customised and made to measure, even when they come from the out designs or even starting from the specific project of a designer or architect.

Silvering perfection carried out using only pure silver, the accuracy of engravings and grindings that are exclusively hand finished, the glittering universe of colours and the care taken in the final assembly make every Tosi creation an indisputable masterpiece. The ancient history of the Venetian mirror has always been appreciated all over the world not only for its beauty but also as a real object of art and investment for houses, villas, hotels or private collectors. Fratelli Tosi & Fratelli Barbini produces luxurious mirrors even with the most complex shapes. Directly in our Murano glass workshop we create individual items and important products made of artistic Murano glass for special orders that are exported all over the world. Discover our collections of Venetian mirrors and choose the mirror model you prefer. We will make it unique through the perfection of silver plating using only pure silver, the precision of the engravings and grinding exclusively finished by hand on the glass and the sparkling universe of colours and care taken in the final assembly. Every Murano glass creation thus becomes an indisputable masterpiece of Venetian art. Looking for a Venetian mirror for your living room, hall or hotel? Discover our collections and enter the magical world of Venetian art now.

Name: Glas Herzog GmbH
Description:
Glas Herzog GmbH ist ein traditionsreiches Familienunternehmen, welches 1948 gegründet wurde und hat sich seitdem zu einem führenden Anbieter von Isolierglas entwickelt. Mit 90 Mitarbeitern und modernen Produktionsanlagen bietet Glas Herzog GmbH qualitativ hochwertige Lösungen für Fenster, Türen, Fassaden und vieles mehr. Das Lieferprogramm umfasst nahezu die komplette Isolierglaspalette aus Zweifach- und Dreifach-Isoliergläsern der CLIMAPLUS- und CLIMATOP-Familie. In Kombination mit Einscheiben- und Verbund-Sicherheitsglas und weiteren Funktionen wie Sonnenschutz sind die Produkte wahre Multifunktionsgläser, die den unterschiedlichsten Anforderungen und Wünschen von Bauherren und Architekten gerecht werden. Die Firma legt großen Wert auf hohe Qualität, Innovation, Nachhaltigkeit und Kundenzufriedenheit und ist stolz auf ihre langjährige Erfahrung und Kompetenz im Flachglas Bereich.


Die Isolierglasproduktion von Glas Herzog läuft vollautomatisch – täglich werden über 1.000 Scheiben gefertigt. Besondere Produkte sind ISOLETTE, das Jalousienisolierglas für variablen, wartungsfreien Sonnen- und Blendschutz, sowie GLASTHERM, ein beheizbares Isolierglas zur Steigerung des Wohnkomforts bei großen Glasflächen, zum Beispiel bei Wintergärten und Schwimmbädern. Ein weiterer Schwerpunkt der Firma Glas Herzog ist die Spezialisierung auf Isoliergläser für Haustüren verschiedenster Aufbauten, darunter auch Zweifach-, Dreifach- und Vierfach-Isolierverglasungen. Das erfahrene Team von Glas Herzog steht Ihnen stets mit seiner außerordentlichen Kompetenz beratend zur Seite

Name: Mirror Works Inc.
Description:
For over three decades, Mirror Works has been quietly transforming spaces across the Ottawa Valley - one pane, one reflection, one enclosure at a time.

We believe that glass isn’t just a material - it’s a statement. It reflects light, opens up space, and adds a sense of calm and sophistication. That’s why we take the time to understand your vision, offer expert advice, and deliver results that are unique. We’re not just in the business of glass. We’re in the business of clarity, craftsmanship, and creating environments that feel expansive, elegant, and unmistakably yours. 

We’ve seen trends come and go. Regardless if it's a residential or commercial space, whether you’re renovating a bathroom, refreshing an office, or adding a bold feature wall to your home, our team is here to guide you through every step, from concept to installation. From custom shower enclosures that turn bathrooms into spa-like retreats, to decorative mirrors that amplify light and style, to sleek railings, stairs and closet doors that blend form with function, our work is designed to elevate. 

What sets Mirror Works apart is our commitment to personalized service, competitive pricing, and installations that are as seamless as the glass we install. Every project is a chance to bring clarity, elegance, and precision into someone’s space and life. We’re proud to be the go-to source for homeowners, designers, contractors and builders who want more than just a product. 

Ottawa is growing, and so are the expectations for quality. What hasn’t changed is our commitment to craftsmanship, thoughtful design, and service. So, if you’re planning a renovation, dreaming up a bold new feature wall, or simply want to brighten your space with a mirror that reflects your style - let’s talk. 

 Discover the difference clarity can make
 Serving Ottawa and National Capital Region
 sales@mirrorworks.com

CPGA, founded in 1995 by glass artist Cindy Poole, blends creative glass design excellence with sustainability. We showcase Western Australia's natural beauty through layers of glass, offering eco-conscious solutions and experiences to enhance the world's environmental and social footprint.

We transform ideas and concepts into meaningful objects and experiences that embellish personal or professional spaces. Our product line is characterized by beauty, functionality, and uniqueness.

Sustainable Innovation
Our innovative, sustainable approach has made a mark across Western Australia's artistic, touristic, and eco-responsible sectors. Our impressive array of zero-waste-driven products and services demonstrates the potential of circular economy and closed-loop business models that harmonize profitability and environmental stewardship.

Our Expertise
Glass Art: Crafted eco-sensitive glass artworks.

Sustainable Design: Pursuing a zero-waste approach.

Recycling: Reimagining the glass waste value.

Creative Design: Merging innovation, knowledge, and design into a product line that elevates your space.

Kiln-Formed Art Glass: Extracting value from glass waste, including bottle-waste, via kiln-formed art glass mastery.
Partnerships & Personalized Orders
We collaborate with businesses and individuals, delivering design solutions that embody environmental responsibility and meet ESG objectives. Our carefully crafted pieces enhance brands with personalized thank-you gifts, celebrating Australian-made, inherent beauty and provenance.

Our specialized services include personalized tombstone awards, corporate gifts, and bespoke branded merchandise, fostering enduring alliances and positively impacting the environment.

Experiential Gallery & Tours

Nous avons à cœur d'accompagner nos clients, que vous soyez architecte, artisans, promoteur immobilier ou particulier, avec des solutions qui allient esthétique, sécurité et durabilité.

The company was originally based in a former ships chandler’s warehouse on the ports Dock St, but by 1997 increased output and demand for product, enabled the mover to larger premises on nearby Copse Rd.

Name: The Vacuum Glazing Network Ltd
Description: Sustainable and affordable vacuum glazing, the perfect retrofit solution for both period buildings and as an alternative to triple glazing.  Due to the fact vacuum glazing can be manufactured to fit just about any frame profile, it is quickly becoming the perfect product to bring all buildings up to  recommended energy efficiency ratings, therefore supporting the drive to meet Net Zero targets and ensuring healthier buildings. With U-values as low as 0.47W/m2K, sound reduction of up to 41 decibels, toughened and available in a variety of shapes and bespoke sizes, PassivGlas is a great addition to any building. PassivGlas can be retrofitted into the frames of existing buildings making window upgrades quicker, cheaper and less disruptive than other upgrade options. Perfect for schools, offices, public buildings and curtain walling projects. PassivGlas, when used in high performing frames, can even exceed Passive House standards. Vacuum glazing is being increasingly accepted by conservation officers around the country, with some amazing projects being undertaken in all areas of the UK.  Contact us to find out how vacuum glazing could be a great addition to your project no matter how big or small. Vacuum glazing can be an amazing tool to support the drive to bring UK buildings to higher standards that are already being met in many countries around the world. 80% of the buildings we have in the UK will still be in use in 2050. With a 15 year guarantee and 25/30 year life expectancy, vacuum glazing is the perfect window upgrade solution.

PLANT INFRASTUCTURE AND MACHINES

GLASS OPTIMISATION AND CAD CUTTING
BTS-37/26 from LISEC, Austria, and Rubi-306C from TUROMAS, Spain are two most reliable, robust and highly accurate machines for cutting the glass panels as per optimization.by glass optimizer.
TEMPERING LINE
2 tempering lines, NG-2442, North Glass and Glasston TC-2860 furnace, 2.8m x 6.0m loading capacity and capability to temper triple silver glasses. Production capacity is 50000 Sqm/month.
INSULATING LINE
Insulated Glazing units consist of two or three glass window panes separated by a gas filled space to reduce heat/sound transfe. Production capacity is 10000 Sqm/month.
LAMINATION LINE
Lamination Line from Glassmeister has capacity to produce 5000 Sqm/month.
UPVC DOOR & WINDOW LINE
YILMAZ, Turkey Line consist of fully automatic line to produce UPVC doors and windows. Production capacity of this line is 30000 Sqft/month.

Name: Rotaglass Oto Cam A.Ş.
Description:
Güvenli Sürüş İçin Yenilikçi Çözümler...
2017 yılında sektöre büyük bir tutku ve özveriyle adım atan Rotaglass Oto Cam, kısa sürede oto cam sektöründe fark yaratan bir firma olmayı başardı. Gelişime ve yeniliğe verdiği önem sayesinde, güncel teknolojik yatırımlarla donatılmış altyapısıyla sektörde öncü firmalar arasında yer alıyor. Bu sayede, hem güvenlik hem de kalite odaklı çözümleriyle birçok firma ve kullanıcı tarafından güvenilir ve başarılı bir iş ortağı olarak tanınıyor.

Rotaglass Oto Cam, cam değişimi ve oto cam hizmetlerinde sadece kaliteli işçilik sunmakla kalmıyor; aynı zamanda, kullanılan sarf malzemelerinde uygun fiyat politikasıyla bayilerine erişilebilir çözümler sunuyor. Bayilerine sunduğu avantajlı fiyatlar sayesinde, cam değişimi süreçlerinde maliyetleri azaltarak müşteri memnuniyetini artırıyor.

Sektördeki büyüme ivmesini hızlandıran bir diğer önemli etken ise sigorta şirketleri ile kurduğu güçlü iş birlikleridir. Sigorta firmalarıyla her geçen gün artan anlaşmaları sayesinde, araç sahiplerine güvenli ve ekonomik çözümler sunarak sektörde rekabetçi konumunu pekiştiriyor. Rotaglass Oto Cam, yenilikçi ve müşteri odaklı yaklaşımıyla oto cam sektöründe geleceğe güvenle bakan bir marka olmaya devam ediyor.

Dream Glass UK are a dedicated and innovative market leader for Switchable Glass (commonly referred to as intelligent glass, privacy glass, smart glass, and electric glass technology). In addition to privacy glass, Dream Glass UK are also specialised in the manufacturing and supply of a wide range of decorative glass. In line with its policy to better serve its clients, Dream Glass UK currently collaborates with selected glass manufacturing plants in the UK and abroad. Due to the continuous growth Dream Glass Group (DGG) have experienced, in 2009 DGG established its own R&D facility in the field of Polymer Dispersed Liquid Crystals (PDLC). Parallel to this, during the past years, DGG has cooperated with renowned research facilities, such as Cambridge University.

Throughout the years, we have come to fully understand privacy glass technology as we have invested a great deal of resources in our R&D Department. Our continued development and research in the privacy glass industry has allowed us to meet the fast growing and changing needs of our clients. Ground-breaking investigations and continuous product development have placed Dream Glass UK at the forefront of the industry with great success.

Description:
Da oltre 40 anni, Serex è un punto di riferimento nel settore della lavorazione del vetro e offre una risposta completa e specifica a tutte le esigenze tecniche, pratiche e di sicurezza che riguardano il vetro e le sue applicazioni. 
Produce vetrate isolanti progettate per integrarsi perfettamente in sistemi speciali, come facciate continue, facciate strutturali a tutto vetro e facciate a fissaggio puntuale, ma anche lavorazioni speciali in vetro per l’interior design, porte e bussole, scale e parapetti, pavimenti calpestabili e non solo. 
Una sede altamente tecnologica di 6000 mq a Torviscosa (Udine), professionalità e qualità - ricercata con passione anche attraverso un importante percorso di certificazione - garantiscono risposte concrete, creative e flessibili ad architetti, designer e a tutti coloro che vogliono dare valore alle loro realizzazioni sfruttando a pieno le grandi potenzialità del vetro. I nostri servizi coprono tutte le fasi della realizzazione, dalla progettazione alla messa in opera, passando per la consulenza normativa. Da noi, il cliente è seguito e consigliato: insieme, arriviamo sempre alla soluzione desiderata.

Name: microfab GmbH
Description:
microfab GmbH ist der Laser-Jobshop mit Fokus auf Glaswafer- und Glassubstrat-Bearbeitung – insbesondere für waferbasierte Optik-Komponenten und Meta-Optics. 

Wir dicing/trennen Wafer bis zu Einzelteilen ab 0,5 × 0,5 mm, schneiden technisches Glas in Freiform, setzen Notches/Ausklinkungen und bohren ab 150 µm; ebenso bearbeiten wir Glassubstrate bis 1,2 × 0,8 m. 
Für Funktionsschichten auf Glas (z. B. ITO/ZnO/SnO₂) bieten wir präzise Strukturierung sowie laserbasiertes Reinigen/Abtragen. 
Zusätzlich bearbeiten wir Metalloberflächen (Reinigen, Strukturieren, Abtragen).

Von Machbarkeit & Parameterentwicklung über Prototypen und Kleinserien bis zur 100% Qualitätskontrolle inkl. Analyselabor (Mikroskopie, Messtechnik, Oberflächenanalyse). Saubere Handhabung/Verpackung unter Flowbox sowie Logistik auf Wunsch.

Anfragen bitte an sales@microfab.eu

Name: New Miami Window Film
Description:
We have great honor to introduce our Company as one of the leading window film companies in Egypt, where it has greatly contributed to the industrialization process. We diversified early and expanded successfully into the following fields:

-SOLAR WINDOW FILM
Solar window film is designed to let natural light in and keep harmful UV radiation and the intense glare and heat of the sun out. With solar window film, you can enjoy the benefits of unrestricted views without the loss of privacy, protect your furnishings, carpets and fabrics from fading and reduce your home’s energy consumption.

-SECURITY WINDOW FILM
Safety and security window film increase the strength of glass and will hold broken glass together after impact. Burglars often gain access to a property through a glass window, door or door panel, glass safety film and glass protective films help prevent access to your property by reinforcing the glass.

-FROSTED WINDOW FILM
Ideal for bathrooms, office doors and glass walls, dividers and partitions, frosted window film is a cost effective solution that provides privacy and reduces glare without sacrificing natural light. Particularly effect for increasing safety in your home or business, frosted window film ensures glass is seen before it is felt.

-DECORATIVE WINDOW FILM
Add a touch of elegance to your home or office space with decorative window film. Available in a range of colors, patterns and designs, decorative window film allows you to add a personal touch to your home or office space. Limited only by your imagination, decorative window film can be applied to bathrooms, office doors and glass walls, dividers or partitions and a feature door or window.

.
-QUALITY WINDOW TINTING & PROFESSIONAL INSTALLATIONS
New Miami specializes in the supply and installation of a wide range of high quality window film and window tint products for commercial and residential customers in and around Egypt.

Description:
Australia Sunny Glass Group Limited (ASGG) (NSX:AG1) is one of Australia’s leading manufacturers and suppliers of specialist architectural glass products to the commercial and residential building industry, predominantly in the east coast markets of New South Wales and Victoria. 

The Group’s key value proposition is its ability to source low cost, high quality raw materials (locally and abroad) to use in its fully automated processing plant that is highly-efficient, accurate and scalable, as well as a glass contracting solutions division which focuses on providing integrated glass supply solutions for façades of medium to large commercial development projects. 

The Group services customers ranging from small or special purpose commercial and residential construction, through to large commercial products. It has recently completed work under a major commercial glass supply contract for the Panorama residential apartment and retail development in Box Hill, east of the Melbourne’s CBD. This project comprised 31 floors and approximately 380 residences, giving the Group substantial credibility and demonstrating its capability to manage and deliver projects of this scale. 

The Company also actively progresses R&D activities with a focus on development of cyclone resistant glass using new laminating and bonding techniques.

1. Flat Float glass cutting to size

2. Laminated glass cutting to size

Name: maxividro
Description:
Em 94 a Maxividro surge no sector do vidro orientada para a distribuição, quer no mercado nacional quer noutras geografias. Aposta desde logo em mercados de elevado potencial de crescimento como o Brasil, Cuba, Angola, Moçambique e ainda Cabo Verde, fazendo da exportação uma área determinante para o seu crescimento sustentado.

Também nesse ano, a Maxividro adquire parte da Vidromax, empresa industrial especialista na transformação de vidro plano. A evolução das duas organizações ditou uma posição de dominância da Maxividro na Vidromax em 1998, o mesmo ano em que a aposta produtiva recaiu no vidro duplo, com forte investimento numa nova unidade de transformação.

Hoje a holding Activa, S.G.P.S. inclui a Maxividro, a Vidromax e a Maxividro Ibérica e opera na transformação de todas as categorias de vidro para a construção. Este grupo empresarial cresceu alavancado numa sólida sinergia entre a experiência comercial da Maxividro e o profundo conhecimento tecnológico na área produtiva da Vidromax, sendo a internacionalização a mais recente resposta à demanda dos mercados onde tem actividade.

A internalização dos diferentes processos de transformação do vidro garantiu a capacidade crescente de produção de vidros que configuram soluções técnicas contemporâneas, com redução de custos energéticos e performances térmicas e acústicas optimizadas.

Orientadas para o mercado da construção e arquitectura, as empresas do Grupo oferecem hoje soluções que satisfazem os mais exigentes e criativos projectos de construção, quer nos aspectos da segurança, do controlo solar, do isolamento acústico, quer nas propostas de arquitectura e decoração. Também como elemento estrutural – pilares, vigas e pisos – ou ainda em aplicações inovadoras como Vidro Curvo ou Vidro Duplo com persianas incorporadas, ou ainda como material de revestimento em edifícios, as respostas da Activa acompanham, ou antecipam, tendências no cada vez mais exigente e desenvolvido mercado da construção.

Somos a maior laminadora e distribuidora de vidros com a utilização da tecnologia Uvekol da América do Sul, temperadora de vidros e uma das empresas mais versáteis do mercado nacional, o que nos garantiu a conquista de diversos prêmios concedidos pelo setor vidreiro e outras entidades representativas.

Atribuímos nossos resultados positivos alcançados à dedicação e interesse de nosso pessoal, que encarou bem a missão do UVEKOL,  a empresa a estar à frente de seu tempo, conquistando pela qualidade, bom atendimento e credibilidade.

Entendemos que bom atendimento não inclui apenas a atenção dedicada, mas sim: conhecimento técnico, rapidez na execução do serviço ou produção do item solicitado, e utilização de equipamentos de ponta. Além da qualidade final que é garantida pelo aperfeiçoamento contínuo, pelo treinamento constante e pela tecnologia adotada.

Além dos vidros temperados e laminados produzimos também vidros insulados (ou duplos) multilaminados, laminados de temperados, serigrafados, craquelados, jateados e vidros pintados.

Nossa unidade produtiva, instalada em São Paulo, trabalha com matérias primas certificadas, com garantia de fábrica, que atendem às normas da ABNT e contribuem para acentuar o diferencial de qualidade de nossos produtos.

Name: Glaz Bridge s.r.o.
Description:
Projekt Glaz Bridge je ojedinělý unikát. Dává možnost milovníkům umění a sběratelům pořídit si nový umělecký objekt, který ale není jen uměleckým dílem. Je to trvalá nadčasová vzpomínka s hodnotou, která s postupem času narůstá.

Náš objekt, který dokážeme navrhnout, vytvořit prototyp, vyrobit jej, případně i vystavit a u kterého zaručíme, že je zcela unikátní; propojuje vizuální umělce různých směrů společně s předními skláři. Naši umělci a jejich zručnost při tvorbě tak nebývalých předmětů skloubí krásu, umění a pietu v jedinečné dílo.

Objekt, který je i investicí do umění.

Objekt, který je zároveň dále obchodovatelný.

Objekt, který je stejně jako závěť, řešením pro uchování vlastních ostatků, nebo ostatků milované osoby a to buď jen části, nebo celé zpopelněné hmoty, ať už trvale, či krátkodobě.

Objekt, který se dá také rozdělit na několik částí pro více pozůstalých. 

Objekt, který lze převážet a může na rozdíl od hrobky cestovat s námi či se stěhovat.

Náš projekt velebí téma umírání a bere pietu jako důstojnou oslavu. Umění transformuje smutek do krásy uměleckého předmětu a do oslavy vzpomínek, kterým opět dává půvab a čarovnost.

Glaz Bridge je udržitelné a funkční řešení současné doby. Je unikátní v komplexním řešení a postavené na ojedinělosti, půvabu, kvalitě a perfektním servisem spojeným s jeho realizací.
