Name: Patriot Glass Solutions
Description:
Patriot Glass Solutions is the proud owner of C-Bond products. We protect commercial buildings, government agencies, educational institutions, and personal homes or offices. Patriot Glass Solutions' advanced, scientifically proven technology protects against looting, rioting, burglars, gunfire, forced entry, bomb blast, hurricane flying debris, or severe storm damage. 

Window Film Solution and Ballistic Security Film System - Two Uniquely Superior Products. 

C-Bond Secure is unique in its nanotechnology and ability to strengthen the glass. We focus on reducing cure times and adding efficiency to business window film applications. This window film solution is built for commercial use and fit for both the retail industry and residential housing. C-Bond Secure window film solution improves the adhesion of any window film. It also increases glass strength and flexibility, eliminates fogging, and has zero visual distortion.

C-Bond BRS is unique in its one-way ballistic firing technology. Unlike other solutions, our superior one-way approach allows bullets to exit through the glass outward but remains bullet-resistant to shots fired inward. When used in conjunction with C-Bond Secure, it increases window strength. Top in security for protecting those inside the building. Bullet resistance holds the window intact when fired upon, allowing those inside time to call for help and get to safety.

Name: LiteZone Glass Inc.
Description:
LiteZone is a next generation, award winning, ultra energy efficient insulating glass unit (IGU) that makes possible the world’s most energy efficient and longest lasting windows. The widespread use of LiteZone would dramatically reduce the energy required to heat and cool buildings and would significantly reduce building CO2 emissions.

Currently available LiteZone IGUs can achieve up to R17.2, U=0.0581 (NFRC method) with a 60-year lifespan, making it the most sustainable IGU available and the most economic over the life of a building.

LiteZone Glass Inc. manufactures LiteZone insulating glass units in Edmonton, Alberta for windows and curtain walls in both residential and non-residential buildings for sale throughout Canada and the USA. LiteZone will soon become available in Europe, Asia, and eventually the entire world.

LiteZone Glass Inc. only manufactures insulating glass units, not windows or curtain walls, however, LiteZone is offered as an option by a growing number of quality window and curtain wall manufacturers.

We will be happy to assist you with selecting the best LiteZone insulating glass for your needs and will make recommendations for the various window and curtain wall framing system options best suited for your project.

Let's have a conversation about your commercial or residential insulated glass unit requirements.

We fully appreciate what is expected of us and where we fit into the chain of playing our part in making the world a better place.

What is important in life is to contribute to society rather than just go through the motions, and it is great to make a difference. On the one hand, we are local, high quality, open-minded bespoke glassblowers of borosilicate glass tubing who will attempt whatever is requested. On the other hand, we are a global supply and distribution centre of world leading brands of laboratory glassware. We have a highly experienced local skill base with the ability to call upon our global network when it is required to scale up.

In order to remain competitive, we have needed to embrace globalisation. Whilst we could hand-make every single item ourselves, global pricing pressures preclude us from so doing. As glassblowers we recognise quality and have thus carefully chosen our suppliers accordingly.

We carry more than one brand of product so that we can accommodate the different requirements and priorities of our extremely varied clientele.

It is the only manufacturer in the country catering to the local and neighboring countries’ requirements.

Kioo currently serves 100 plus customers in 14 countries in sectors like Beer, Spirits & Soft Drinks, supplying to all major global giants in the region. The company meets 100% of Tanzanian demand and then exports the production mainly to the EAC, SADC & Indian Ocean Island countries. Kioo uses locally available minerals and natural gas to make a proud Tanzanian value-added product.

Mission.
To meet all the requirements of our customers on time and in full.

To create value for all our stakeholders and be an integral partner to the surrounding community

Name: NODIS
Description:
At Nodis, we provide the world’s only color smart glass technology. Smart glass is glass with light transmission properties that can be changed when voltage is applied. With Nodis electronically controlled glass, the color and tint of any window, sunroof or skylight by electrically aligning nano-particles in a thin film within the glass or plastic. With the touch of a button, users can instantly change or tune the transparency of glass to help keep out harsh sunlight and 95% of harmful UV rays. Our technology effectively blocks UV and infrared rays regardless of whether the glass is in its clear or tinted state, helping keep cars, planes, yachts, homes, offices and artwork cooler and protected. Nodis smart glass is a critical enabler to smart building energy and comfort management.  
We license our color smart glass technology to glass manufacturers and provide nanoparticles to enable customer production of Nodis-based smart glass.

Name: Pearsons Glass Limited
Description:
Pearsons Glass was founded in Liverpool, England in 1901 as the family firm J Pearson and Company, specialising in silvering, bevelling and the manufacture of cabinet doors.
Since then Pearsons has continued to grow its Processing capabilities and in the early 1980's expanded in to Stained Glass, becoming the go to company for all Stained-glass artist around the country. Able to supply them a wide selection of materials and ancillaries from a single source.

Processing Division
The manufacturing and processing are based in a 25,000 sq. ft. factory just a mile north of the world-famous Liverpool Pier Head, in a developing area of the city. 
Processes include the traditional cutting, shaping, polishing, bevelling, drilling and sandblasting, as well as painting, printing, specialist laminating, UV bonding and toughening.
We pride ourselves on the flexibility we must have to achieve these aims, which is helped using the most modern machinery available within the industry and our continued investment in training our staff.

Stained & Art Glass Division
Until the early 1980s, there was no one-stop location from which coloured glass artist could obtain their supplies, including ancillary items such as lead came and tools. Pearsons Glass were amongst the pioneers in setting up that facility. Having incorporated James Hetley & Co. and Bohle Art Glass into our company, we are now proud to be by far the largest supplier of these products in the UK.

Description:
Il 2022 è l’anno scelto dalle Nazioni Unite per celebrare il vetro a livello mondiale, attraverso il 2022 United Nations International Year of Glass. L’Italia detiene una posizione di eccellenza nel panorama internazionale nella lavorazione del vetro, sia a livello artistico, sia a livello industriale. Le realtà più importanti che si occupano di vetro in Italia oggi hanno deciso di fare sistema e presentarsi unite per realizzare nel 2022 il più significativo evento europeo sul vetro.
The Venice Glass Week e Vision Milan Glass Week si uniscono sinergicamente e danno vita alla nuova manifestazione The Italian Glass Weeks, per portare l’attenzione internazionale di Istituzioni, imprese e consumatori, sulle peculiarità uniche ed inimitabili della filiera del vetro italiana.
Dal 10 al 25 Settembre 2022 un grande ed unico Festival della durata di due settimane, con Milano e Venezia poli attrattivi di livello internazionale: appuntamenti dedicati al vetro artistico - sia storico che contemporaneo - organizzati da musei, fondazioni e istituzioni, ma anche da aziende del design e privati.
Molti gli eventi dedicati a buyer, operatori professionali, investitori e collezionisti, sia italiani che stranieri, che vogliono porre attenzione e appetibilità anche del mercato internazionale.
#Italyfortheinternationalyearofglass2022
#italyfortheIYOG2022

Name: Chem Science Inc
Description:
OUR STORY

In the early 2000’s, a group of innovative and dedicated engineers and chemists founded a company that envisioned the availability of affordable Laboratory Glassware with greater quality in comparison to the well-known Suppliers in North America. With persistence and keenness, the aim to establish their name among the Pharmaceutical Industries and the Educational Sector was achieved and the TLG Brand was launched. In the current years, our series of Volumetric Products became recognized for their sturdiness, exceptional quality, and great economical savings, while being designed to facilitate the work of our clients. 

THE SIGNIFICANCE OF OUR NAME

In the past decades, TLG has been establishing its footprint in the world of Pharmaceutical Industries, Higher Education Institutions, and Research and Development Laboratories. Throughout the years, Chem Science Inc continues to uphold our commitment – to provide our clientele with the highest quality Laboratory Glassware at affordable and competitive prices.

OUR COMMITMENT – QUALITY, SERVICE, RELIABILITY

Chem Science Inc family encompasses professional and dedicated chemists, engineers, and glassblowers who always strive to produce top quality Laboratory Glassware while bringing innovative ideas and using Borosilicate 3.3 glass tubing. Our commitment is that each TLG product has been made with the utmost attention to detail, making it reliable and durable, delivering high quality at affordable prices, while always providing great service.

THE MAKING OF TLG LABORATORY GLASSWARE

Since the launch of our TLG brand, Chem Science Inc has set out to manufacture Laboratory Glassware using only the highest quality Borosilicate 3.3 glass tubing. As there are abundant varieties of Borosilicate 3.3 glass available, only those that pass our rigorous selection examination are used in the production of TLG Laboratory Glassware. Likewise, our renowned line of Volumetric Products, such as Volumetric Flasks, Volumetric Pipettes, and Measuring Cylinders with Class A standards meeting USP Parameters, offers incomparable experience, helping to ease your work and research.

OUR VALUES

The success of Chem Science Inc. has been founded on FIVE core values:
1. Excellence : We strive for the highest standards of technical, corporate, and personal achievement.
2. Service : We are committed to providing each client with the highest professionalism, consideration, and satisfaction.
3. Integrity : We aspire to be ethical and earn the trust of each client.
4. Teamwork : We believe in working collaboratively with others to achieve common goals.
5. Development : We aim to build lasting professional relationships, embrace new ideas and encourage professional growth.

PRODUCTS AND SERVICES

Our services include custom orders, allowing you to create pieces that perfectly fit your vision, as well as the restoration of antique mirrors, preserving their historical and artistic value.

OUR MISSION
Our mission is to preserve the rich heritage of Venetian mirror and chandelier-making while continuously innovating to meet the needs of modern interiors. We are dedicated to delivering exceptional quality and personalised service, ensuring every client receives a masterpiece that will be cherished for generations.

ACHIEVEMENTS
Our dedication to excellence has been recognised with numerous awards and accolades. We have had the privilege of collaborating with esteemed designers and have been featured in prominent publications. Our mirrors and chandeliers adorn some of the most prestigious homes and establishments around the world.

Thank you for visiting our profile. We invite you to explore our collection and discover the artistry and passion that define Ongaro&Fuga.

Name: Bilcam Bilimsel Cam Sanayi
Description:
Şirketimiz 1984 yılında kuruldu. Borosilikat cam boruları ile ülkemizin; İlaç, Kimya, Boya, Gıda, Arıtma, Metalürji, Elektrik sanayi, Hastane ve Üniversite laboratuvarlarının cam ihtiyacını karşılamaktadır.

Bizleri en çok sevindiren müşteri memnuniyeti olup, bu memnuniyet firmamızın en önemli amacı olmuştur. Şirketimizin kurucusu ve Gn Md. Hidayet Yılmaz’ın 54 yılı aşkın birikimleri ile şirketimize oldukça aşama kazandırmıştır. Hava kurutucu kaplarının ve akış kontrol camlarının, KESME VE TAŞLAMA gerektiren yüzey ve boyutlarını, geliştirdiğimiz sıfırdan teknoloji ile %2 toleranslara kadar inebilmiş durumdayız. Bu teknoloji ile metal, camla birlikte daha kolay buluşmaktadır.

Şirketimizin kurucu ortağı murahhas azası Hidayet YILMAZ, camcılık serüvenine, 1967 yılında camcılık okulunda cam eğitimi ile başlamış olup, daha sonra Şişe Cam’ın Paşabahçe cam fabrikasında cam züccaciye (cam bardak, tabak, vazo, mutfak cam ürünleri, şişe, ev aksesuarları, aydınlatma cam ürünleri ve antik cam kristal ürünleri) üretiminde cam sanatını geliştirmiştir. İlerleyen yıllarda, 1975’te kısa bir süre ve yine Şişe cam fabrikasının Topkapı’daki teknik cam fabrikası tesislerinde Laboratuvar Cam malzemeleri üretiminde eğitim alarak cam sektöründe alan değiştirmiştir. 1975’te TÜBİTAK-MAM' da Görev alarak, AR-GE çalışmalarında laboratuvar cam sanatını da iyice pekiştirmiştir. Tüm bu birikimlerini ülkemiz sanayiine katkı sunmak için 1984'te İstanbul Ticaret Odası saflarında, üretimine başlamış, ülkemizin sanayilerinin, ülkemizin hastanelerinin, fen okullarının ve üniversitelerin, AR-GE Çalışmalarının Laboratuvar cam malzemelerini (analiz cihazları, cam boru, cam silindir, cam balon, gözetleme camı, borosilikat, cam boru, cam kurutma kapları, kuartz boru ve ürünleri, kuartz cam levha, kuartz cam cihazları, cam şişe, cam aksesuar) üretmeye başlamış ve halen tüm hızıyla üretimin rotasını belirlemeye devam etmektedir.

Description:
Looking for a unique gift? 
Can't find what you want on the high street? 
Your search is over! 
Buying a unique gift or commission should be an exciting prospect and we are here to help.
At Allister Malcolm Glass Ltd we design and make glassware from our studio in the heart of the Black Country.
We are a small, family run business proud to use traditional glassmaking skills and tools harking back hundreds of years. 
We are proud to have a highly skilled team in the studio helping us to produce giftware, antique restoration, awards/trophies, sculptures, lighting and bespoke commissions.

We also offer a range of studio experiences and workshops

We’ve converted our glass furnace to electric. Annealing ovens are now electric and very soon we will have the first electric reheating chamber in action. We aim to have a fully working electric hot glass studio very soon. We’ve reduced our carbon footprint on a huge scale by ceasing to use fossil fuels so far. Our next step from May 2024 we will be powering the studio on 100% renewable energy too.

Our competence lies in creating and selling scientific and industrial glass components from leading global manufacturers' highest quality raw materials. On request, we can also manufacture glass parts using European Borosilicate Glass 3.3 tubing by DIN ISO 3585 and ASTM E438 Type I, Class A specifications. This devotion ensures precision, exceptional optical qualities, and conformity with worldwide equipment makers.

Our strong team of experienced engineers, technicians, and quality control specialize in understanding the Glass at its best; we forge the Glass with the precise mixture of craftsmanship of Potter, Blacksmith, & Goldsmith with a blend of engineering; this is what defines us as 'The Transparent Specialist' in supplying high-quality glass products.

We offer expertise in the design, engineering, fabrication, installation, and commissioning of Pilot Plant/Mini-Plant and Standard Distillation Units for Research & Development. Our equipment is well-suited for chemical, pharmaceutical, and other industries.

All glass parts are designed, fabricated, tested & installed as per international norms like ISO 3585, 3586, EN BS 1595, AD 2000 Merkblatt.
Glass pilot plant parts are available with CE Certification, improving the product's value.

We manufacture various glass equipment for the Indian and global markets.

Name: A Second Round Glass LLC
Description:
At A Second Round Glass, every bottle tells a story.

What began as a small weekend hobby in a Montgomery, Texas garage has grown into a woman-owned, family-operated brand built on creativity, craftsmanship, and community. We rescue post-consumer bottles once destined for the landfill and give them a second life as premium, handcrafted drinkware — each piece cut, fire-polished, and finished by hand.

Our mission is simple: to give recovered glass a second life by transforming them into premium drinkware that supports community, sustainability and inspires connection. Every rescued bottle represents a second chance — for the glass, for our planet, and for the connections shared around it.

We believe sustainability should be both functional and beautiful. Through intentional design and careful craftsmanship, we transform what others discard into meaningful pieces that celebrate life’s moments, big and small. Whether it’s a personalized wedding set, a custom-engraved gift, or a handcrafted collection for your home or business, each glass is thoughtfully designed to tell your story and reflect your style.

We’re proud to be part of a growing movement that values creativity, local collaboration, and environmental responsibility. From working alongside Texas makers and businesses to partnering with sustainability-driven organizations, we’re constantly inspired by the people who share our belief that change can start small — even with something as simple as a bottle.

Each glass we create is a reminder that sustainability isn’t just a trend — it’s a mindset. By choosing A Second Round Glass, you’re not just purchasing drinkware; you’re becoming part of a community that values quality, impact, and connection.

We’re honored to raise a glass — handcrafted, upcycled, and made with purpose — to a world where beauty and sustainability go hand in hand.

Cheers to second chances!

Name: Invitec - Innovación Vidrio Técnico
Description:
INVITEC - INNOVACIÓN VIDRIO TÉCNICO
Somos una cristalería vitoriana fundada en 2002. Inicialmente, la compañía operaba en un pequeño pabellón de 520m² en Uritiasolo, Vitoria-Gasteiz. Con el tiempo, debido al crecimiento sostenido, la demanda del mercado y la visión de la dirección de la empresa por la apuesta en la innovación de los vidrios técnicos, nos trasladamos en 2006 a las actuales instalaciones en el Polígono Industrial de Subillabide, estratégicamente ubicado en la ruta Madrid-Paris, este parque empresarial se encuentra entre los municipios de Iruña de Oca y Vitoria-Gasteiz.
En la actualidad, mantenemos la esencia de nuestro origen, somos una cristalería que ha ido incorporando las últimas tecnologías del sector del vidrio para satisfacer las necesidades de los clientes y seguir innovando en las bondades del vidrio.

CRISTALERIA EN VITORIA-GASTEIZ
Dada nuestra amplia trayectoria y apuesta por la última tecnología del sector, el mercado nos posiciona como expertos cristaleros especializados en corte, manipulación y comercialización de vidrio. Tal es así que en Invitec, Innovación de Vidrio Técnico, somos los únicos fabricantes de vidrio en Álava que comercializa la prestigiosa marca Climalit. Este posicionamiento nos permite suministrar vidrio por todo el País Vasco, Navarra, Logroño y sus territorios limítrofes, así como a Francia.

REFERENTES EN EL PAÍS VASCO
En Invitec, como expertos cristaleros, apostamos continuamente por la calidad en nuestros trabajos, de ahí que ofrezcamos colaboración y asesoramiento técnico a arquitectos, constructores, decoradores y particulares para realizar todo tipo de obras y reformas, siguiendo las normas de calidad y seguridad estipuladas por la industria del vidrio.

Name: RAP Beijing Trading Ltd
Description:
RONDOT Asia Pacific (RAP) was established in April 2018 in central Beijing.

The company is 100% owned by Rondot Group. It is a comprehensive office set up in Beijing to serve the Chinese glass container industry providing integrated sales, after-sales, and technical support services. At present, RAP provides equipment, spare parts, and technical support services to more than 40 domestic glass makers.

RAP has brought leading production concepts of European and American industries into China's glass industry. Advanced production equipment, high-end management, and technical concepts from Britain, France, Germany, the Netherlands, and the United States have been effectively introduced to many of China's medium and high-end glass container plants. It has promoted the development and innovation of China's glass industry, from air-cooled camera in furnace, shear blades, stainless steel scoops, IS machine spare parts to hot end coating, transfers, stackers, lehr, cold end spray systems, and decorating machines.

Nos últimos anos a VIDRO SOUTO tem conseguido dotar-se de tecnologias de última geração (forno de tempera, CNC de cinco eixos), que têm permitido alcançar resultados muito positivos e um crescimento notável, mesmo com influência de todos os fatores externos negativos que assolam a economia global. Neste momento emprega 49 trabalhadores sendo que está a preparar um novo investimento que prevê um aumento de área industrial de mais 3mil m2, e a duplicação da sua capacidade produtiva. Dentro do leque dos produtos especiais que produz estão todo o tipo de vidros simples, duplos, triplos, planos ou curvos, com todas as possibilidades de maquinação, furos, tempera, pintura/serigrafia vitrificada, aquecimento, colagem UV, laminagem…
Dentro destas soluções diferenciadas sublinhamos que temos na nossa empresa a capacidade de produção de vidros curvos temperados (curvo termo-endurecido, curvo temperado/laminado de alta segurança, duplo), onde obtém produtos únicos e aplicações muito especiais, como por exemplo portas circulares, guardas de proteção curvas, escadas em caracol, entre outros. De forma a prestamos um melhor serviço, dispomos de uma máquina de última geração para uma medição precisa.

Name: Flexible LC Lens
Description:
SFI develops, manufactures and sells flexible Liquid Crystal films, which is based on Crystal Clear Switch (CCS) technology. CCS provides comprehensive design-to-manufacturing LC solutions. We offer dynamic flexible LC lenses for the new generation of Augmented Reality glasses, Goggles, Glasses, Visors, Helmets, Strobe Glasses, Sun Glasses and more.

Our flexible LC lenses enables a dynamic range of visible light transmission (VLT) electrically controlled by a low AC voltage of less than 10V.

Moreover, our unique Flexible LC technology is based on a Normally Open operation mode, while no voltage applied (OFF state) the Flexible LC is transparent and when applying voltage( ON state) , the Flexible LC will gradually tint.

Main Advantages of our Flexible LC film are in cutting glare, blocking heat, rejecting harmful UV radiation and providing comfort shading conditions for the user.

Quotes are based on the top of the line 2205 Duplex Stainless Steel spigots engineered for strength, durability and quality. 

Our spigots are manufactured from duplex 2205 (S32205). There are two grades of 2205, which are S31803 and S32205. The S32205 has a higher corrosion resistance and a higher tensile strength, furthermore the U channel on the spigots are 120 mm instead of 100mm to ensure greater stability.

Name: Memmo-Venezia
Description:
The brand has its roots in the millenary history of Venice, where the art of glass blowing is still handed down inside the furnace and at the same time represents a reality that has been able to look beyond, searching for new techniques that could bring together the stiffness of glass with the softness and warmth of fabrics. Once again the Venetian designer Enzo Berti has stimulated the search for harmony not only on an aesthetic level but also on a productive level, calling into question millenary certainties and demonstrating that much can still be created and achieved.

It took more than five hundred years from the first filigree rods, to see the birth of a new technique of spinning and blowing rods.

“In my way of approaching the product, I very often wonder why, in many cases, the method has never been questioned, if it is ever possible to see the material from another perspective in order to go beyond what has always been done.” “My desire has been to revalorize crystal glass through glass rods so as to seek not only transparency but also three-dimensionality.” Enzo Berti.

In spinning, the fusion of each color is unique and unrepeatable. Monochromatic rods and crystal, combined with a new approach, create glass threads with unique colors and movements. From these new “murrine”, which had never been made until now, a path of research was then opened up in order to make it possible to heat them to the temperature necessary to be blown into objects, even the large ones, while still maintaining the spinning and remaining juxtaposed without the use of crystal or other glass. “Here, too, research, attempts and experience were intertwined, giving rise to shapes that until now no one had yet been able to create with polychrome rods”, Enzo Berti recalls.

The technique of glass spinning, exclusively registered as an innovation and regularly deposited with patent requested, uses from about 500 meters of siliceous yarn for each individual glass object produced.

Name: Abrisa Technologies - HEF Photonics
Description:
Abrisa Technologies is a global leader in specialty glass fabrication and precision optical thin-film coatings, serving diverse industries including aerospace, defense, medical, industrial, and display technologies. With vertically integrated, ISO-9001 and ITAR-certified U.S. facilities, we deliver turnkey, high-performance glass and optics solutions—from prototype to high-volume OEM production.

Our Total Solution approach streamlines your supply chain with single-source accountability, expert engineering, and extensive in-house capabilities. We maintain a robust inventory of technical glass and offer fast, flexible production tailored to demanding technical and aesthetic requirements.

Fabrication Expertise: Precision cutting, drilling, edging, dicing, waterjet machining, polishing, sandblasting, thin-glass machining (<0.1 mm), strength treatments (HIE chemical ion-exchange, heat strengthening), and specialty finishes like screen printing, etching, branding, and soldering.

Optical Coating Solutions: Advanced thin-film coatings from UV (~200 nm) to far IR (~20 µm), including AR, ITO/IMITO conductive coatings, laser-line, NIR/VIS, broadband, hot/cold mirrors, filters (neutral density, bandpass, IR/UV), plus specialty coatings such as anti-fingerprint, anti-fog, hydrophobic, and autoclave-compatible finishes.

In 2025, Abrisa Technologies expanded its capabilities and East Coast presence, adding premium etched anti-glare and technical glass expertise.

From concept through delivery, Abrisa is committed to quality, reliability, and performance, making us your trusted partner for innovative glass and optics solutions.

The backbone of our company, being our employees have worked hand in hand with us for many years to develop their skills in glass production, sales and marketing. At the same time, we continue to build our team to ensure our glassware becomes more beautiful and durable and brings sparkle into people’s lives around the world every day.

We are one of the few glass manufacturers in the world that have mastered the manufacturing process to produce a one-piece stem and bowl (pulled stem). Description:

**Precision and Efficiency**

Whether concentrating extracts, recovering solvents, or conducting chemical synthesis, our equipment delivers unmatched precision and control. With user-friendly interfaces, safety features, and customizable options, our products enhance productivity and safety in your laboratory.

**Innovative Solutions**

Our lab reactors, made with premium borosilicate glass, provide excellent visibility and chemical resistance. Designed for various applications, from synthesis to distillation, they offer precise control over temperature, pressure, and stirring. Modular components and robust safety features enable researchers and industrial professionals to achieve reproducible results easily.

**Why Choose Aarohi Enterprise?**

**Unmatched Quality:** High-quality materials and advanced manufacturing ensure durability and top performance.
**Customization:** Tailored solutions meet specific laboratory requirements.
- **Comprehensive Support:** Strong after-sales support with spare parts and services.
**Versatility:** Scalable and adaptable products for diverse needs.

Join the many satisfied customers who trust Aarohi Enterprise for their scientific equipment needs. Explore our product catalog and discover how we support your research and production goals with innovative, reliable, and efficient solutions.

Name: Hellma
Description:

Customers around the world appreciate Hellma for its high performance, exceptional consulting competence and well-proven products. 100% Made in Germany.

Products and services of the Hellma Analytics and Hellma Solutions brands provide the basis for precise and reliable measurement results in laboratory and process and thus safe and high-quality end products in the chemical, pharmaceutical, life science, food and beverage, cosmetics, environment, energy, technology and research industries. 

HELLMA ANALYTICS provides a broad product portfolio for optical components and solutions in glass and quartz glass for UV/Vis/NIR/MIR/IR/Raman spectroscopy and cytometry. Its high-quality precision products provide the basis for achieving reliable measurement results in production, quality assurance and research. Within this division, Hellma offers the world’s largest range of cuvettes for UV/VIS absorption and fluorescence measurements used in analytical instruments and systems optical immersion probes for molecule spectroscopy.

HELLMA SOLUTIONS stands for application-focused solutions for measurement tasks in spectroscopic analysis. The service portfolio ranges from solution consulting to the selection of system components, modules and software, from calibration and method development to process integration as well as maintenance and service. Our clients benefit from a customized offer to solve their measurement task. The business unit is operating independently of specific instrumentation technology in cooperation with various network partners.

Description:
Willkommen bei Eckelt, wo Komplexität auf Transparenz trifft. 

Mit Eckelt wählen Sie einen leistungsstarken Partner für innovative Fassadenverglasungen aus einer Hand. Mit unserer umfangreichen Produktpalette an vorgespannten, laminierten, siebbedruckten, emaillierten und Isoliergläsern bis zu einer Größe von 8 x 3,21 Metern sind wir die Brücke zwischen Ihren Herausforderungen und der optimalen Lösung. 

Unsere Zertifizierungen nach ISO 9001 und 14001 belegen unser Engagement für hohe Qualitätsstandards, nachhaltiges Unternehmertum und effizientes Energiemanagement.

Das Herzstück von Eckelt sind unsere engagierten Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter. Sie sind begeistert vom Werkstoff Glas und seinen unendlichen Möglichkeiten. Unser hochprofessionelles Team unterstützt Sie in jeder Phase Ihrer anspruchsvollen Projekte mit dem Service, den Sie für den Erfolg Ihres Unternehmens verdienen.

Wir sind der Spezialist für komplexe und logistisch anspruchsvolle Fassadenprojekte und genießen das Vertrauen von Kunden auf der ganzen Welt. In den letzten 100 Jahren haben wir erfolgreiche internationale Geschäftsbeziehungen mit namhaften Bauunternehmen und Architekten in mehr als 50 Ländern aufgebaut und Lösungen für spektakuläre Gebäudehüllen und internationale Wahrzeichen geliefert.

Glas aus Steyr wurde weltweit in zahlreichen herausragenden Bauwerken eingesetzt, darunter der DC Tower in Wien, das Ars Electronica Center in Linz, die BMW Welt in München, die Bergstation der Zugspitze, das neue Akropolis Museum in Athen, die begehbare Etage des Eiffelturms in Paris und die symbolträchtige Station am Ground Zero in New York.

Werde Teil unseres Teams: https://www.eckelt.at/karriere

Name: WEINERT Industries South Africa
Description:
WEINERT has engaged systematically with photonics, which is one of the key technologies of the 21st century.
The WEINERT Group is a leading provider of ultrapure Fused Silica, preforms, and rods, as well as optical fibers, cables, assemblies, and special components.

We see photonics as an enabling technology for our customers’ ideas and problem-solving solutions. Whether standardized with corresponding regional approvals or specific and entirely novel approaches to problem-solving, we provide you with competent, professional support.

In doing so, we offer a unique product portfolio at every stage along the value chain: from Fused Silica to preform and the drawn fibers through to fiber optical cables and complete fiber optic systems with optical components that we have developed in-house. Along this value chain, we can adjust and optimize many factors independently according to your requirements without needing support from external partners.

Name: Verallia Chile
Description: Expertos en el diseño, fabricación y reciclaje de envases de vidrio, brindamos soluciones saludables, estéticas y sostenibles a 10,000 empresas en todo el mundo.
Location: Rengo, Región del Libertador Bernardo O`Higgins

Name: HALDYN GLASS LIMITED
Description:
Established in 1964 at Goregaon, Mumbai, Haldyn is synonymous with Glass today and the most preferred choice of many in India and abroad. In the year 1991, we shifted our base to the picturesque village of Gavasad near Baroda in Gujarat. Our present Unit is a state-of-the-Art Automatic Plant and is well connected to all the important towns and cities of India.
Manufacturing of quality glass is ensured by proper glass conditioning with the aid of Automatic Temperature Control System for fore-hearths. Furnaces are built with high quality imported refractories, Electronic Furnace Control equipment including CC cameras imported from Europe which are installed inside the furnaces. I.S. machines are electronically controlled. CAD-CAM facility is used for designing and manufacturing of the moulds. In-house foundry helps in producing quality material for moulds. Containers manufactured by us go through various stages of stringent quality tests including Thermal Shock, Pressure and Stress Tests. Captive Power Generation Plant using clean fuel (natural gas) ensures uninterrupted power supply.
We have two Plants in the same premises – with a capacity to produce 480 tons clear glass containers per day . The bigger Plant has 9 IS machines with both 10 and 8 sections SG,DG,TG . At present we produce clear glass containers in the range of 50 ml to 1000ml as per the design and choice of our valued clients. Our objective is to contribute to global environmental conservation through development of environment-friendly glass containers.

Name: eckelt - a vandaglas company
Description:
Willkommen bei Eckelt, wo Komplexität auf Transparenz trifft. 

Mit Eckelt wählen Sie einen leistungsstarken Partner für innovative Fassadenverglasungen aus einer Hand. Mit unserer umfangreichen Produktpalette an vorgespannten, laminierten, siebbedruckten, emaillierten und Isoliergläsern bis zu einer Größe von 8 x 3,21 Metern sind wir die Brücke zwischen Ihren Herausforderungen und der optimalen Lösung. 

Unsere Zertifizierungen nach ISO 9001 und 14001 belegen unser Engagement für hohe Qualitätsstandards, nachhaltiges Unternehmertum und effizientes Energiemanagement.

Das Herzstück von Eckelt sind unsere engagierten Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter. Sie sind begeistert vom Werkstoff Glas und seinen unendlichen Möglichkeiten. Name: Brownhills Glass
Description:
Brownhills Glass is one of the UK's leading independent glass merchants and processors, serving trade customers, architects, interior designers, construction professionals and private home owners throughout the West Midlands and beyond.

Our range of products and services is unrivalled, from the supply of plain glass from stock, to sophisticated processing, and everything in between.

We hold extensive stocks of plain glass, safety glass, fire glass and horticultural glass, available for next day delivery using our own fleet of vehicles. And we have a range of state-of-the-art glass processing machinery in-house to cut, shape, polish, mirror, bevel and drill glass.

This combination of products and facilities means that we can meet all architectural glass needs, from clear float and Low E glass for double glazing to large expanses of laminated safety glass for shop fronts and office buildings; from horticultural glass for domestic and commercial greenhouses, to stunning balustraded walkways and staircases, and much more.

Our glass products are also used extensively in interior schemes; think of a mirror wall in a gym or dance studio, elegant glass shelving and display units in retail outlets, office partitioning or a glass topped table in your home.

The message is simple, really: If it's possible in glass, we can produce it!

Please call us on 01922 749910 or email quotes@brownhillsglass.com for a no obligation discussion of your requirements and free estimate.

Name: Verallia Deutschland AG
Description:
Bei Verallia ist unser Purpose (Unternehmenszweck) Glas neu zu denken – für eine nachhaltige Zukunft. Wir möchten neu definieren, wie Glas produziert, wiederverwendet und recycelt wird, um es zum nachhaltigsten Verpackungsmaterial der Welt zu machen. Wir arbeiten für eine gemeinsame Sache mit unseren Kunden, Lieferanten und anderen Partners entlang der Wertschöpfungskette, um neue gesunde und nachhaltige Lösungen für alle zu entwickeln.
Mit rund 10.000 Beschäftigten und 32 Glasproduktionsstätten in elf Ländern sind wir der führende europäische und der weltweit drittgrößte Hersteller von Glasbehältern für Lebensmittel und Getränke, der innovative, maßgeschneiderte und umweltfreundliche Lösungen für mehr als 10.000 Kunden rund um die Welt bietet.
Verallia hat 2020 mehr als 16 Milliarden Flaschen und Gläser produziert und einen Umsatz von 2,5 Milliarden Euro erzielt. Verallia ist im Segment A des Euronext an der Paris Börse gelistet (Ticker: VRLA – ISIN: FR0013447729) und gehört den SBF 120, CAC Mid 60, CAC Mid & Small et CAC All-Tradable Indizes an.
Für mehr Informationen besuchen Sie de.verallia.com.

Name: Sesku Glass and Glazing
Description: We value professionalism and a commitment to our customers, setting us apart as a leading Glass manufacturer based in Normanton, West Yorkshire. We cater to each job’s specific needs, and guarantee satisfaction with all our work. We are proud of the quality of our work and offer several services including Glass manufacturing, Replacement Glass including Double Glazed Unit, Single Glazed Toughened Glass as well as replacement Windows and Doors all of which have been designed to enhance style, performance, and security. We now offer a new service of encapsulated stained glass

Name: Panorama Lumon
Description:
Somos una empresa especializada en brindar las mejores soluciones y productos en lo que a cierres de cristales se refiere, aprovechando al máximo los espacios y generando nuevos ambientes para disfrutar en familia durante todo el año. 
Somos representante de cierres de cristales plegables Lumon Finlandia, y ofrecemos soluciones a medida para el cierre y habitaciones de terrazas, quinchos y pérgolas.

Nuestro propósito:

Otorgar el producto de la mayor calidad.
Dar las mejores respuestas a las exigencias o demandas que nuestros clientes requieren.
Honestidad hacia nuestros colaboradores y clientes.
Respeto al medio ambiente.
Formar al mejor equipo técnico y profesional, comprometiéndolos con nuestros clientes.
Cumplir cabalmente nuestros compromisos adquiridos.

Name: Ace Glass Incorporated
Description:
Ace Glass Incorporated, founded in 1936 in Vineland, New Jersey, is a leading U.S. manufacturer of scientific glassware, laboratory equipment, and custom-engineered lab apparatus. For nearly 90 years, we’ve supported researchers, engineers, and scientists across chemical, pharmaceutical, biotech, and academic fields — with our products cited in thousands of publications, patents, and breakthrough discoveries.

We provide a comprehensive portfolio of borosilicate glassware, jacketed reactors, and glass process systems, ranging from benchtop setups to reactors up to 200 liters. Our systems can be paired with advanced temperature control, automation, and process accessories for complete lab-scale reaction and filtration solutions.

Our in-house custom glass fabrication team collaborates directly with customers to design and build unique, complex, or specialized apparatus with exceptional craftsmanship and technical support — ensuring every experiment can be optimized for performance and precision.

Ace Glass proudly manufactures in the USA and partners with industry leaders to enhance our product offerings and deliver fully integrated laboratory solutions.

What We’re Known For

 U.S.-made scientific glassware & reactors
 Specialists in chemical processing & scale-up systems
 Experts in custom laboratory glass design & fabrication
 Trusted worldwide by life sciences, academia, biotech, pharma & chemical research

If you need reliable, high-performance glassware or complete reactor systems for demanding applications, Ace Glass is your partner for innovation, durability, and precision.

 Learn more: www.aceglass.com

Name: MOS GLASS
Description:
MOS Glass is a leading and independent glass processor that provides a wide range of glass solutions for commercial and high-rise residential building facade industry. 

MOS Glass offers an extensive know-how on architectural glass products that has different aesthetic appearance, color, light transmission, reflection, heat and solar control, acoustic insulation and fire protection properties.

Name: OSG
Description:
OSG is a specialist glass manufacturer that develops a wide range of glass products, including armored safety glass such as bullet-resistant windows, curved, flat, laminated, and insulated.

As a global company with an international client base, we provide customized glass solutions for various industry sectors.

Our expertise covers all areas of glass processing for defense & security and transportation sectors as well as special applications for other industries - architectural, solar etc.

Revolutionary transparent armor technologies, advanced LCD glass systems (ScreeneX), solar systems and many others has been developed by OSG team to answer customer needs.

Through continuous research, development and testing, we have perfected our quality process and by pushing the limits of our products’ capabilities, we are always striving to pioneer and implement new technologies for the diverse sectors we serve.

Name: NORMAG Lab & Process Glass
Description:
NORMAG, 𝗮 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝘁 𝗼𝗳 𝗚𝗠𝗠 𝗣𝗳𝗮𝘂𝗱𝗹𝗲𝗿, is a leader in 𝗶𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗟𝗮𝗯 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗰𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗚𝗹𝗮𝘀𝘀 𝘀𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 for the pharmaceutical and chemical industries. With a strong focus on high-quality Borosilicate glass 3.3, we deliver a wide range of equipment for 𝗹𝗮𝗯𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀, 𝗽𝗶𝗹𝗼𝘁 𝗽𝗹𝗮𝗻𝘁𝘀, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗳𝗮𝗰𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗲𝘀.

What sets us apart is our ability to leverage 100+ 𝘆𝗲𝗮𝗿𝘀 𝗼𝗳 𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝘀𝗲 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘁𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗼𝗹𝗼𝗴𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗰𝗮𝗽𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗲𝘀 within GMM Pfaudler. Beyond glass solutions, we offer customers access to corrosion-resistant materials like enamel, fluoropolymers, and alloys, alongside advanced technologies in agitated vessels, thermal separation, filtration, and drying. This integrated approach ensures we provide end-to-end process solutions tailored to the global chemical process market.

With years of industry expertise, our team of engineers and technicians works closely with you from design to installation, ensuring the most effective and comprehensive process solutions. 

Whether you need specialized components or complete apparatus, Pfaudler Normag Systems ensures 𝗽𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻, 𝗶𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗿𝗲𝗹𝗶𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 for every project.

Name: EVERLAM
Description:
EVERLAM is an innovative producer of high-quality Polyvinyl Butyral (PVB) interlayer for laminated architectural safety glass, driven by an entrepreneurial spirit that puts customers at the heart of its business. We propose high-value solutions, comprising quality PVB films that are supported by outstanding technical expertise and service excellence. 
EVERLAM PVB interlayer is based on a special polymer. When used in glass laminates, it provides, safety, security, sound and UV protection, and long-term stability in outdoor applications. Available in a range of clear and colored products as well as acoustic and stiff solutions, and in different widths and thicknesses, EVERLAM PVB interlayer is used by glass laminators worldwide to produce attractive, durable and high-quality safety glass for indoor and outdoor applications. 
Our portfolio includes EVERLAM CLEAR, EVERLAM WHITE and EVERLAM COLORED PVB interlayer as well as EVERLAM QUIET, our acoustic offering and EVERLAM SUPER TOUGH, our stiff PVB film solution and EVERLAM COOL, our new solar control PVB film.
As a company, EVERLAM started in 2015 with an experienced team backed by solid resources and committed to deliver the best products and services to its customers. 
Our production facility, located in Hamm-Uentrop, is where EVERLAM’s PVB sheet extrusion products have been manufactured for over 25 years. Reputed throughout the glass laminating industry for outstanding quality, the plant holds many customer approvals as well as ISO 9001 certification. 
The brand new EVERLAM Centre of Competence in Mechelen, Belgium, undertakes R&D and provides laboratory and technical support for customers around the world. With a strong sales and supply chain organizations spanning across EMEA, the Americas and Asia, EVERLAM has the capabilities needed to support customers worldwide. 
www.everlam.com

Name: Groglass
Description:
Groglass is a producer of anti-reflective coatings on glass that are designed for applications where visibility and light transmission are of utmost importance. 

With 20 years of expertise in picture framing, electronic display, cold storage, lighting, and architecture, Groglass is the most versatile and highest-quality anti-reflective glass coating producer.

Name: Arc Americas
Description:
A world leader in tableware, Arc Americas has been servicing North, Central and South America with innovative and sustainable glass solutions to enjoy eating, drinking and home experiences since 1976. In 1982, our US glass manufacturing facility was built in the heart of Millville, NJ where we produce about 1 million pieces of glass every day.

Over the decades, we are proud to have created long relationships with a multitude of well known large globalists to independents; from candle jars to custom promotional beverage glasses, to collections for some of the largest US retailers, to beautiful and durable tableware for a plethora of hospitality partners. Our Luminarc, Arcoroc, Cristal d'Arques Paris and Chef&Sommelier brands are designed for both individuals and professionals.

Arc was founded in 1825 in Arques, France, which is still home to the group’s global headquarters and one of the world’s largest glass production plants. Today, Arc’s footprint extends across the world, with factories in the USA, China and the UAE and sales in over 160 countries. For nearly 200 years, we have continuously evolved and have stayed at the forefront of the industry by innovating manufacturing techniques, incorporating cutting-edge technologies, developing and improving new designs and materials, and pushing the boundaries of our own creative visions. All of these key areas of focus have helped us to grow to become a world leader in the tabletop industry. 

Committed to a Corporate Social Responsibility approach, the Arc group invested 4.1 million euros in research & development in 2019 and reduced its CO2 emissions by 26% per ton of glass produced between 2010 and 2019. The Arc group also actively contributes to the transition to a new circular economy model, in particular by offering innovative and sustainable glass containers as an alternative to single-use plastic. 

Innovative glass for a better world.

Ready to join us or benefit from the expertise of our teams?

Name: Alphial
Description:
Alphial is a trusted partner in the production of primary glass packaging for the pharmaceutical and biotech industries. With over 60 years of experience and a solid international footprint, we supply vials and ampoules for liquid, powder, and sterile drug formulations, along with specialized sterilization and depyrogenation services.

Our mission is to support the global healthcare supply chain by ensuring quality, reliability, and continuous technological innovation. With four manufacturing sites across Italy, an annual output exceeding 1 billion units, and internationally recognized certifications, we stand as a strategic partner for pharmaceutical companies focused on safety and sustainability.

Because behind every effective cures lies a container designed with the same care as the medicine it holds.

Name: RÜCKL
Description:
Cut lead crystal | Bohemian craftsmanship | 300 year old tradition in glassmaking

RÜCKL CRYSTAL is connected to a 300 year long tradition in glass making as a family. The glass making family Rückl came to Bohemia at the turn of the 17th and 18th centuries, most probably from what is now Switzerland. The glasswork was built in Nižbor near Beroun in 1903 and has been operating since.

In the interwar period the plants produced virtually the entire range of home and decorative glassware; that being crystal glass and lead crystal, clear or coloured, cut, polished or painted. The glassworks’ good name, both at home and abroad, was supported by their serious social policy and successful cooperation with artists, prestigious drinks and decorative glass designers, among whom were professor Drahoňovský and Ludvika Smrčková. 

The quality of the work and the extensive range of goods placed the Nižbor glassworks among the best for cut lead crystal in the Czech Republic. Guided tours are organised of the production plants at the glassworks.

Name: RUBIN GLASS FACTORY
Description:
With over 60 years of history in glassmaking, Rubin is one of the most advanced and established glass producers in the Balkan region. We combine our vast experience and traditions with the latest technological advancements in the industry to produce glass packaging of perfect quality.

Showcasing our commitment to excellence and sustainability, we adhere to global standards like ISO 45001:2018 for safe workplaces, ISO 50001:2018 for energy efficiency, and FSSC 22000 for food safety. These certifications reflect our dedication to employee well-being, energy optimization, and delivering safe, high-quality products, reinforcing trust and driving continuous improvement.

Name: Univerre Pro Uva SA
Description: Univerre creates added value for customers through truly excellent products and services. Based on decades of experience with traditional and innovative glass products, and based on a broad, high-end selection of bottles, jars, and drinking glasses, we empower customers to realize their own differentiating glass solutions in a superior and consistent quality. Our tailored services for business customers cover the entire value chain of glass packaging, from development of individual or personalized packaging design to printing, distribution, cleaning, and re-use. Univerre product and design expertise empowers customers to realize their creativity, with endless possibilities to bring unique offerings to their markets. The introduction of innovative technologies and customer specific services beyond glass packaging ensures that our customers get the best products in the market. Through perfection in every dimension we aim to become the quality reference for glass in Europe.

Name: Sejal Glass UAE
Description:
SEJAL Glass and Glass Manufacturing LLC is an entity of the SEJAL GROUP , INDIA . SEJAL GLASS is professionally driven group with a legacy of over 30 years in the GLASS BUSINESSS and has completed more than 1000 projects around the GLOBE  .
We take QUALITY and CUSTOMER SERVICE as a top priority . Therefore , we have enforced high - end quality standards to ensure that our customers receive nothing but the best .  SEJAL Glass offering a wide range of products such as , Architectural Glass , Decorative Glass , Media Glass around  the WORLD.
Location: RAS AL KHAIMAH , RAS AL KHAIMAH

Name: Linde Vidros
Description:
A Linde Vidros é uma indústria beneficiadora de vidro localizada na cidade de Rio Negro, Paraná. Fundada em 1966 está a mais de 50 anos no mercado, e desde a sua fundação, vem investindo em inovações tecnológicas, trazendo soluções atuais para as vidraçarias, serralherias, esquadrias e construtoras.

A empresa que começou com uma distribuidora de vidros, hoje conta com uma estrutura de 10.500m² na fábrica onde é beneficiado o vidro. No ano de 2016 foi inaugurada uma nova unidade de 6.500m² para fabricação do vidro laminado com PVB em autoclave.

Foi através da sua grande gama de produtos e qualidade de serviços que a empresa ficou conhecida, pois trabalhamos com todo tipo de processamento em vidro plano.

Com uma equipe experiente e devidamente treinada, a Linde Vidros está sempre pronta para melhor atende-lo, desde o seu contato para compra, passando pelo setor de projetos até o pós-vendas.

Todo o processo produtivo passa por avaliações sempre buscando melhorias nos produtos. Devido ao alto padrão de qualidade nossa empresa é uma das pioneiras a conseguir a certificação do INMETRO em vidros temperado.

Name: Glass Fibre Europe
Description:
Glass Fibre Europe, founded in 1987, is the voice of the European continuous filament glass fibre industry. It is composed of 8 companies: 3B the fibreglass company, Envalior, FYSOL SAS, Johns Manville, Nippon Electric Glass, Owens Corning, Saint-Gobain Vetrotex and Valmiera Glass. Glass Fibre Europe represents all the major producers of continuous filament glass fibre in Europe.

Glass Fibre Europe is a committed partner to the European Union, interacting on behalf of its members with European institutions, media, non-governmental organisations and other stakeholders. Glass Fibre Europe is registered in the EU Transparency Register under n°635608817518-09.

Name: Kunxing Glass-Dongguan City Kunxing Glass CO.,LTD
Description:
KunXing Glass Company referred as "KXG" which is a reputable glass deep-processing corporation in China. Company provide innovative solutions for consumers. These products are found in all aspects of construction, transportation, infrastructure and industrial applications and relevant to our daily lives.

Kunxing Glass is a team of highly qualified experts in the field of professional glass deep processing technology. Serving the construction industry for more than 20 years, KXG provides high-end architectural visualization services for architects, designers, and developers. We are not only passionate about the quality and effect of glass, but also serving high-end buildings.

Our toughened glass, laminated glass, insulated glass are used in many different area. It's all about reliability. With consistent quality and consistent delivery, we make our customers feel safe when assigning projects to us, feel comfortable in the production process, and be happy with the end result. This is why KXG is more distinctive.

KXG sincerely establishes good partnerships with customers all over the world to achieve a win-win situation!

Name: Vetrobalsamo Spa
Description:
Vetrobalsamo Spa è un'azienda, a capitale interamente italiano, che produce bottiglie speciali.
Nata nel 1938 come officina artigianale, si estende su 300.000 metri quadrati a Sesto San Giovanni, connaturandosi per le scelte ecosostenibili compiute, come vetreria urbana, bene integrata nel tessuto cittadino.
Specializzata nella creazione di bottiglie personalizzate, Vetrobalsamo è in grado di dare risposta ad ogni esigenza del cliente, anche il più meticoloso, guidandolo alla definizione della forma della propria bottiglia, fino alla sua piena soddisfazione.
Produciamo oltre mezzo milione di bottiglie al giorno in vetro Maya e Bianco, per il mercato nazionale ed europeo del vino, della birra, dell'olio e di ogni altro tipo di bevanda.
Forniamo lotti di produzione a partire da 20.000 pezzi e, per produzioni di notevole entità, garantiamo al cliente la possibilità di un ritiro graduale dai nostri magazzini, capaci di oltre 60 milioni di pezzi.
La prima vetreria in Italia ad aver installato, nel 1998, forni ad ossicombustione, Vetrobalsamo produce bottiglie con impronta carbonica alleggerita, consentendo ai clienti di presentarsi al mercato in condizioni di assoluta preminenza in tema di sostenibilità ambientale.
Vetrobalsamo infine è in grado di consegnare la merce con un semplice preavviso di 24 ore in tutta Italia; 48/72 ore nel resto d'Europa.
Eccellenza della qualità e impronta carbonica più leggera. Le bottiglie Vetrobalsamo pesano meno sull'ambiente!

Name: Marmara Cam Sanayi A.Ş.
Description:
Marmara Cam Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş. bugün Türkiye'de ki otomatik cam ambalaj kapları üretiminde ülkenin 3. büyük üretim tesisidir. Teknolojik gelişmeleri yakından takip edip cam üretimi ile ilgili en son ve en gelişmiş teknolojiyi kullanan kuruluşumuz, cam ambalaj kapları ve züccaciye ürünleri kategorisinde müşterilerine ürün çeşidi konusunda geniş bir yelpaze ile hizmet sunmaktadır.
 
Müşteri odaklı ve çevreye saygılı üretim gerçekleştirmeyi ilke edinmiş olan Marmara Cam Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş.'nin kalitesi, ISO9001 kalite güvence standartları ve ISO22000 gıda güvenliği standartları ile tescillenmiştir. 

Marmara Cam Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş. cam üretimi konusundaki deneyimleri, müşterilerinden aldığı güven duygusu ve destek, kurum politikaları, istikrarı, hayata geçirdiği büyük ve önemli yatırımları ile ülke ekonomisine sağlamış olduğu olumlu katkının gururunu taşımaktadır.

Name: Reis Packaging Europe GmbH
Description:

Name: KCC Glass Corporation (KCC글라스)
Description:
Creating a world of happiness for all around the globe – this is the future KCC GLASS Corporation envisions.

Established on January 2, 2020, as a spin-off from KCC Corporation, KCC GLASS Corporation aims to enhance management efficiency in our core areas—Glass, HomeCC, Flooring, Film, and Interior Stone. This strategic move also aims to improve our agility in responding to market and policy shifts, focusing on our B2C business.
Our commitment is to lead the global market by developing unique, high-value-added products. We leverage energy-efficient and eco-friendly technologies in the architectural material and glass industries, building on our rich history of innovation.
Our total interior brand, HomeCC, is dedicated to creating better living environments for our customers. We understand their needs and utilize our technical expertise in architectural and interior design materials to earn their trust. Our goal is to provide each customer with their ideal living space.
As we move forward, enhancing our corporate value is our priority. We aim to achieve this by improving our business quality competitiveness and focusing on customer satisfaction management.
With our profound understanding of construction and interior material techniques, coupled with a deep insight into customer needs, KCC Glass is committed to creating ideal living environments. As a comprehensive interior brand, HomeCC bases its commitment on trust, extensive technical expertise, and a keen insight into customer needs.
In December 2020, we strengthened our position as a leading glass and interior manufacturer by merging with Korea Autoglass Corp., a manufacturer of automotive safety glass. This merger serves as a growth engine, improving our competitive edge by integrating the core competencies of both companies.
Looking ahead, we will continue to sharpen our competitive edges and enhance customer satisfaction to boost our corporate value. We are grateful for your continued support and interest.

Name: Clear Armor
Description:
When lives are at risk, minutes matter. Our mission is to enhance the well-being of our communities by building a safe and secure environment through the application of our high-performance security glass laminate and critical life skills training.  

As the sole supplier, manufacturer, and installer of our world-patented, optically clear and aesthetically pleasing laminates, we can transform glass on buildings into one-way armor that stands up to multiple threat levels. Our products protect and serve numerous industries including education, government, banking, police, military, corporations, and other facilities where active threats and security laminates are vital for protection.  

Clear-Armor Forced Entry (SL-15), Crowd Riot (SL-31), and Bullet Resistant (BR) laminate products are sold exclusively by Clear-Armor for professional and business use only and can be installed anywhere in the world. Clear-Armor is GSA and Federal CAGE code approved, world-patented, and backed by a limited lifetime warranty.

Description:
Oceania Glass is Australia’s Architectural Glass Maker and just like you, Australia is our home too. We operate a float line in Dandenong South, Melbourne, producing around 165,000 tonnes of flat glass each year, more than the weight of three Sydney Harbour Bridges. We have distribution centres in Melbourne, Sydney, Perth and Brisbane.

We make, manufacture, and distribute Australia’s leading glass brands for Australian glass processors, architects, designers, and the community we live in. The majority of our products are manufactured locally or, where required, carefully sourced from overseas to ensure they comply with Australian Standards. We are committed to creating a sustainable business and are certified by ISO 14001 Environmental Management System and ISO 9001 Quality Management System. Name: Nafis Glass
Description:
Nafis Glass was built in a 25 hectare land in Takestan industrial zone Of Qazvin province and was launched at the beginning of 2016.
This factory which has been accomplished  with the help of Iranian engineering and labor force, is equipped with the most modern machines.
This plant is designed for two, white and colored furnaces of soda lime type with 8 production lines.
The furnaces with 8 production lines are in a hall with an area of 30,000 square meters and the pulling rate of the furnaces is about 360 tons per day each.
The project of establishing Nafis glass (non public) was started in order to provide part of the growing needs of industries to different kinds of glass bottles and jars in Takestan industrial zone in 2010 and lunched in 2014 .
This plant was established in a land area of 25 hectares.
The foundation of its production halls with the warehouses are over a hundred thousand square meters.
The first phase of the plant has a single 360-ton furnace with 4 production lines and about one and half million of bottles and jars are produced daily in different colors.
Due to the high quality of the products, part of the factory capacity of the plant is allocated for export abroad.
By setting up the second phase of the plant in the near future, the final capacity production will increase by a hundred percent to 720 tons a day.

Name: AIVE - Associação dos Industriais de Vidro de Embalagem
Description:
A AIVE - Associação dos Industriais de Vidro de Embalagem é uma associação empresarial com o objetivo promover a indústria fabricante de embalagens de vidro e contribuir para o progresso técnico e económico do país.

Desde 1975 que tem como objetivos o estudo, a promoção e a defesa dos interesses relativos à indústria da produção do vidro.

Além disso, a associação representa, em Portugal, a Friends of Glass - um fórum europeu de consumidores que promove a escolha de produtos embalados em vidro e a posterior reciclagem destas embalagens após a utilização; assim como é membro fundador da Plataforma Vidro+, uma iniciativa que visa criar um compromisso entre os diferentes agentes da cadeia de valor do vidro de embalagem que atuam no mercado nacional, definindo metas e objetivos para promover o aumento da taxa de reciclagem do vidro em Portugal.

Saiba mais sobre a AIVE aqui: https://aive.pt/
---
AIVE - Association of Packaging Glass Industries is a business association with the aim of promoting the glass packaging manufacturing industry and contributing to the country's technical and economic progress.

Since 1975, its objectives have been the study, promotion and defense of interests relating to the glass production industry.

Furthermore, the association represents in Portugal Friends of Glass - a European consumer forum that promotes the choice of products packaged in glass and the subsequent recycling of these packaging after use; as well as being a founding member of the Plataforma Vidro+, an initiative that aims to create a commitment between the different agents in the packaging glass value chain that operate in the national market, defining goals and objectives to promote an increase in the glass recycling rate in Portugal.

Find out more about AIVE here: https://aive.pt/

Spécialiste de l’installation sur mesure, Detton intervient dans l’agencement intérieur, en réalisant cabines de douche, verrières, crédences de cuisine et miroirs. Nous assurons également le remplacement de casse ainsi que l’installation de châssis fixes, coulissants, fenêtres et portes, en intégrant des technologies innovantes pour une protection thermique, phonique et acoustique optimale.

Notre activité de négoce propose une large gamme de produits verriers façonnés ou non, pièces métalliques, produits d’étanchéité et structures aluminium prêtes à poser. En parallèle, notre département décoration conçoit des meubles et miroirs décoratifs sur mesure, ainsi que des solutions de signalétique sur verre.

Grâce à son expertise et son exigence de qualité, la Miroiterie DETTON accompagne particuliers et professionnels dans leurs projets, en conjuguant esthétique, performance et innovation.

Name: Anhui Fengyang Huaihe Glass Co., Ltd.
Description:
Daily glass "Diamond" glass factory was founded in the mid-17th century during the reign of Qianlong, but Emperor Qianlong praised the shining glass as "crystal". The English missionaries soon named the glass "Diamond" because no one in the Qing Palace could speak English, so they gradually called it "Daimon". At the outbreak of World War I, "Diamond" followed the missionaries across the sea to the headquarters of Scotland, a small city full of Humanities and arts, Glasgow, which was once one of the birthplaces of the Renaissance.

With the unremitting efforts of missionaries, the products processed by Diamond not only have unique and exquisite style, but also have the characteristics of health, environmental protection, practicality and beauty, noble and elegant. This also makes the products of Diamond quickly get the consensus and favor of consumers in European countries and become the first choice of many royal nobles.

Today, the inheritors of Diamond bring their exquisite product technology and design ideas back to China, making Diamond fit in with Anhui's leading glassware enterprises and successfully establish a long-term cooperative relationship. We will work harder to bring "Diamond", a product that has gone through the vicissitudes of history and the influence of Western literature and art, to every customer who trusts us.

Name: Sucker

Sucker: Sip Sustainably, Live Elegantly

At Sucker, we believe that every sip should reflect a commitment to both style and sustainability. Born from a shared passion to combat ocean pollution, our journey began with a simple yet powerful realization: the impact of our choices on the planet. Plastic straws have become one of the top ten contributors to ocean waste, with up to 8.3 billion plastic straws finding their way into our oceans annually, wreaking havoc on marine life and ecosystems.

In response, we crafted elegant, reusable glass straws that not only enhance your drinking experience but also serve as a statement of environmental stewardship. Each straw is a conscious choice to reduce plastic waste and promote a cleaner, healthier planet.

Our commitment extends beyond product design. We proudly make annual donations to 'Our Seas Our Future,' a New Zealand-based charity dedicated to preserving and protecting our oceans for generations to come.

Join us in making a difference, one sip at a time. Choose sophistication. Choose sustainability. Choose Sucker.

Glass is Good was founded with a vision to elevate Thailand’s glass industry to international standards. We believe that glass is not merely a building material but a vital element that creates experiences and reflects the true value of every space.

Throughout our journey, we have continuously developed and delivered premium-quality products ranging from anti-corrosion illuminated mirrors and magnetic glass whiteboards to bespoke glass solutions designed to meet the needs of high-end residential projects, luxury hotels, flagship retail stores, and leading office developments. Meticulous attention to detail in every step is the hallmark of our commitment.

At Glass is Good, we believe that beauty and durability must coexist. Contemporary design combined with safety standards and environmental responsibility forms the core principle that guides our work.

We aspire to be present in every moment of our clients’ lives, from inspiring design concepts to seamless delivery and after-sales support, ensuring that every space adorned with our glass embodies enduring value, elegance, and lasting impressions.

With the trust of distinguished partners and clients, Glass is Good aims to be recognized as a leader in glass innovation across every market we operate in. We are committed to moving forward sustainably with transparency, integrity, and a strong sense of responsibility in every decision we make.

Name: Aluminiumservice AB
Description:
Aluminiumservice grundades år 2002 med ett tydligt mål: att skapa eleganta och robusta inglasningar samt vinterträdgårdar av högsta kvalitet.

Vi specialiserar oss på att förvandla balkonger och altaner till bekväma och skyddade utrymmen. 

En av våra mest imponerande prestationer är tillverkning av vik- och skjutpartier. Vi är stolta över att använda Schücos välrenommerade profilsystem, vilket är synonymt med överlägsen kvalitet. Dessa är inte bara praktiska, de är också fullständigt isolerade för att säkerställa en behaglig inomhusmiljö, oavsett väderförhållandena utanför. Med våra vik- och skjutväggar kan du njuta av utomhuslivet inifrån ditt eget hem.

Vi erbjuder även underhållsfria villafönster med aluminiumkarmar i vårt sortiment. Våra fönster är inte bara eleganta utan också lättskötta. Naturligtvis tar vi hand om hela installationsprocessen åt dig, så du kan luta dig tillbaka och njuta av ditt nya fönster utan krångel.

Sammanfattningsvis har Aluminiumservice sedan 2002 varit din pålitliga partner för att förvandla utomhusutrymmen till funktionella och estetiskt tilltalande områden. Vi är dedikerade till att erbjuda högkvalitativa lösningar med noggrannhet och omsorg om våra kunders behov och önskemål. Välj Aluminiumservice för att ta din utomhusupplevelse till en ny nivå.

Name: Defender Glass Monterrey by Solar Gard
Wolf-Dierk Lohnitz glas + spiegel KG
Description:
In der Nähe der Messestadt Leipzig gelegenen Gemeinde Machern befindet sich die Betriebsstätte der Firma Wolf-Dierk Lohnitz glas+spiegel KG. Das Familienunternehmen entwickelte sich, nunmehr schon in zweiter Generation, in den drei Jahrzehnten seines Bestehens vom Handwerksbetrieb zum mittelständischen Unternehmen.

Als Meister im Glasveredlerhandwerk ist Sohn Mario Lohnitz von Anfang an involviert und führt seit dem Jahr 2011 die Geschäfte selbständig.

Gestützt auf einen beständigen Stamm von qualifizierten und motivierten Mitarbeitern ist so der Fortbestand der Firma gesichert. Darüber hinaus wächst der Betrieb mit den rasch wechselnden Marktbedürfnissen.

Stetige Modernisierung der Produktionsanlagen sowie Aus- und Weiterbildung der Mitarbeiter sind die Grundlage für eine hohe Qualität der Produkte und die damit einhergehende Zufriedenheit der Kunden.

Als Flachglasverarbeiter mit Schwerpunkt auf der Glasveredelung hat sich die Firma auch überregional einen Namen gemacht. Fachliche Beratung erfährt man daher nicht nur am Stammsitz in Machern, sondern auch überregional durch das Verkaufsbüro in Rostock.

So werden Glas- und Spiegelerzeugnisse für Kunden von Flensburg bis zum Bodensee hergestellt und geliefert, aber auch in angrenzende Länder exportiert.

Name: Massimiliano Pisinelli
Description:
About Us
While creating the Massimiliano brand, we made it our mission to share with you the story of ancient glass art a crystal tale stretching from Bohemia to IstanbuL and the dreams captured in glass.
Our journey from sand to art began in the city of Prague, the starting point of our adventure. In this land of originality and timeless elegance, we step into the secret workshops of traditional glass masters and design some of the most exquisite pieces of cultural heritage. The final touches of each creation are completed in Istanbul, the unique crossroads and sole heir of Eastern and Western civilizations. Here, we choose the colors that will breathe soul into our pieces and witness how crystal transforms into colorful dreams. We do not pursue craftsmanship that will gather dust on a shelf, but rather an enduring aesthetic that will be part of your daily life, always in the frame. True to the mission that shapes our brand identity, our designs gain value as they take place in your cherished memories.
As the Massimiliano family, we dream beyond glass and aspire to be present in every phase of your life through the manifestation of beauty in our creations.
With hopes of meeting in dreams made of glass...

Name: Gavridis Glass
Description: With over 70 years of experience within the glass industry, Gavridis Glass has built a reputation for providing an on time, highly professional service. Gavridis  brand name was firstly introduced within the glass sector in 1948, when George Gavridis started working on the cutting, processing and the installation of glass. He started his business on rented premises of 60 sq.m., by making his first engraved designs on glass using handmade tools. Later, the workshop evolved into a factory, under the trading name, “George Gavridis – Glass and Mirrors”. In the assistance of mechanical equipment and experienced craftsmen, he focused on the construction industry, which was booming at the time. His energy and passion were transferred to his two sons, Christos and Panagiotis, who succeeded him in 1980. They, in turn, added their academic and technical knowledge, as well as their fresh ideas, which constituted the magical recipe for their company’s success. With a new bigger investment in mechanical equipment and trained human resources, the company expanded and it developed a strong activity within the architectural industry. At the same time, it was involved in the designing and manufacturing of glass in the field of professional equipment, construction & ship. In addition, it expanded its premises and now it operates in a privately-owned space of 2,000 sq.m.

Name: Hestia Egemen Cam ve Sanat Atölyesi
Description:
Hestia Egemen Cam Atölyesi,
2017 yılında Beykoz'da kurulan Hestia Egemen Cam Atölyesi, geleneksel cam üfleme sanatını modern tasarım anlayışıyla harmanlayan yaratıcı bir sanat ve deneyim merkezidir. Girişimci Elif Çelik ve Kültür Bakanlığı onaylı cam sanatçısı Mehmet Kömürcü’nün ortak tutkularıyla hayata geçen atölye, cam sanatına sadece üretim açısından değil, aynı zamanda deneyim ve eğitim odaklı bir perspektifle yaklaşır.

El yapımı vazo, bardak, tabak, aydınlatma objeleri, cam heykeller ve mücevherler gibi özgün eserlerin üretildiği Hestia’da her parça zarafetin ve emeğin izlerini taşır. Modern tasarımlarla yeniden yorumlanan geleneksel teknikler sayesinde Hestia, sanatseverler ve özgün ürün arayışında olanlar için benzersiz bir buluşma noktası sunar.

Atölyemiz, ziyaretçilere açık cam üfleme deneyimleri ve atölye turlarıyla, camın büyüleyici dönüşüm sürecine birebir tanıklık etme ve dahil olma imkanı sunar. Bu yönüyle sadece bir üretim alanı değil; aynı zamanda ilham veren, öğretici ve unutulmaz bir sanat deneyimi merkezidir.

Türkiye’nin saygın organizasyonlarında ve uluslararası etkinliklerde yer alarak cam sanatının güçlü bir temsilcisi hâline gelen Hestia, her geçen gün büyümeye ve gelişmeye devam etmektedir.

Camın sihirli dünyasında yaratıcı bir yolculuğa çıkmak isteyen herkesi Hestia’ya davet ediyoruz.

Name: Chris Johnson Glass - Studio Zayante
Description:
Chris Johnson is a Santa Cruz County-based artist who has been working in the medium of blown glass for over twenty years. 

After several years of study and an apprenticeship, Chris established his own unique style and developed a passion for creating striking colors which his work is known for. Chris opened his first studio in Santa Cruz in 2005, in the arts corridor of 17th Avenue, then expanded to a larger nearby space that allowed him to begin teaching.

Chris continues to teach regular classes in beginning and advanced forms in his Davenport studio, which he moved to in 2018, taking over the historic building in which the famous Lundberg Glass studio operated for more than fifty years. The Davenport studio features an on-site gallery that showcases Chris’s work as well as the work of his apprentices and other local glass artists.

About The Work
Working with traditional Italian “off-hand” glass-blowing techniques, Chris’s goal is always to bring forward the beautiful relationship between light and color that is unique to glass.
Chris’s work is expressionist and vibrant, and his endless exploration of color results in work that is exciting, unique, and ever-changing.
