Name: Mk General Trading Llc
Description:
Designing functional homes with aesthetic appeal involves several key principles and practices:
1. Functionality : This is the foundation of any well-designed home. Spaces should be practical and serve their intended purposes effectively. This might involve considerations such as the layout of rooms, storage solutions, traffic flow, and ease of use.
2. Aesthetic Appeal : Beyond functionality, the visual aspects of a space are crucial. Aesthetic appeal involves creating harmonious and visually pleasing environments. This includes considerations such as color schemes, furniture selection, lighting design, and decorative elements that contribute to the overall atmosphere and style of the home.
3. Thoughtful Design : This encompasses a holistic approach to design that takes into account the needs and preferences of the inhabitants. It involves understanding how people will use the space and designing accordingly to enhance their daily lives.
4. Personalization : Transforming spaces into personalized reflections of style and comfort means creating environments that resonate with the personalities and lifestyles of the occupants. 
5. Inspiration and Creativity : A well-designed home can inspire creativity and foster a sense of well-being. Thoughtfully designed spaces can encourage creativity by providing environments that are conducive to concentration, relaxation, and innovation.
6. Transformation: Design has the power to transform not only physical spaces but also the way people feel and interact within those spaces. It can elevate moods, improve functionality, and create memorable experiences for those who inhabit the home.
In essence, creating functional homes with aesthetic appeal involves a balance of practicality and beauty, thoughtful consideration of the inhabitants' needs, and the ability transform spaces into personalized havens that inspire and enhance daily life.

WU‑Tex bietet maßgeschneiderte Lösungen zum effektiven Vogelschutz an Glas- und Fassadenflächen. Das Serviceangebot beginnt mit einer individuellen Beratung. Ein persönlicher Ansprechpartner begleitet Kunden von der Erstberatung bis zur Umsetzung.

Die professionelle Anbringung von Vogelschutzfolien erfolgt je nach Bedarf entweder vor der Verglasung beim Hersteller oder nachträglich auf bestehende Fenster- und Fassadenflächen. Alternativ kann der Vogelschutz direkt in den Glasaufbau integriert werden, ideal auch für architektonisch anspruchsvolle Gebäude.

Alle eingesetzten Produkte sind nachweislich hochwirksam, langlebig und umweltfreundlich. So liegt der Anteil der sichtbaren Schutzmuster bei weniger als 1% der Glasfläche, was sowohl Vögel schützt als auch ästhetische Ansprüche erfüllt.

Auch nach der Montage steht WU‑Tex seinen Kunden mit persönlichem After-Sales-Service zur Seite. Das Unternehmen richtet sich an Privat- wie Geschäftskunden und unterstützt sowohl Neubau- als auch Sanierungsprojekte – stets mit dem Ziel, stilvolle und nachhaltige Lösungen für mehr Vogelschutz im Alltag zu etablieren.

Name: BilirCam San Tic A.Ş
Description:
Bilircam olarak, köklerimiz 1950'li yıllarda Çankırı'dan İstanbul'a uzanıyor. 1972 yılında Beyoğlu Tarlabaşı’nda ilk işyerimizi açarak cam sektörüne adım attık. 1978’de başladığımız ayna üretimini, Türkiye genelindeki 67 ile kendi dağıtım ağımızla ulaştırdık. 1980’li yıllarda cam ithalatına geçerek Alman VEGLA, Fransız SENGOBEN, Amerikan SPECTRUM gibi dünya markalarından cam ürünleri getirdik ve sektörde kısa sürede öncü bir konuma geldik.

1982’de ŞİŞECAM bayiliğini alarak ISICAM üretimine başladık ve bu alanda önemli bir başarı elde ettik. 
1990 yılında babamızın vefatının ardından, ailemizin en büyüğü Gazi Çeştan, onun yokluğunu aratmayarak bize liderlik etti. Ağabeyimizin üstün ticaret anlayışı ve tecrübesi, şirketimizi başarıyla yönlendirerek bugünlere taşıdı ve yolumuza ışık tutmaya devam etmektedir. Onun rehberliğiyle firmamız, her zaman kaliteyi ve müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutarak sektörümüzdeki güçlü konumunu korumaktadır.

İthal cam alanında, özellikle renkli cam ve vitray camları ile sektörde öncü bir konumdayız. Yurt dışından ithal ettiğimiz bu camlarla, Türkiye genelinde estetik ve dekoratif çözümler sunmaktayız.

1998 yılında FIRATPEN bayiliği ile plastik pencere üretimine adım attık ve kısa sürede başarı göstererek sıralamada üst basamaklara çıktık. Aynı dönemde Gaziosmanpaşa’da showroom açarak iş hacmimizi genişlettik. 1991’den itibaren Tekirdağ Yeniçiftlik bölgesinde arsa alım satımına başladık ve bu alandaki yatırımlarımızı sürdürmekteyiz.

Geçmişten günümüze kaliteden ödün vermeden, sektördeki yenilikleri ve müşteri memnuniyetini öncelik alarak hizmet vermeye devam ediyoruz.

Name: ArtNouveauGlass
Description:
Antal Vasile: Master of Glass Art
Antal Vasile, born on July 10, 1950, in the village of Pădurea Neagră, Județul Bihor, Romania, is a renowned glass artist blending tradition with modern brilliance. Starting at age 15 as an apprentice in one of Romania's oldest glass factories, his passion for glassmaking quickly took shape.

After 15 years honing his skills at a glass factory in Cluj, Antal established his own workshop. He specializes in Pâte de Verre, Cameo Glass, Glass Sculpting, and Glass Blowing. His work is influenced by the Art Nouveau movement, drawing inspiration from artists like Émile Gallé and Daum Nancy.

Antal's creations are celebrated for their intricate beauty and storytelling. His cameo glass pieces feature detailed carvings with layered colors, while his pâte de verre works involve casting glass powder into delicate, translucent molds. These masterpieces reflect the rich traditions of Romanian glassmaking and the elegance of Art Nouveau.

Antal's artistry lies in infusing each piece with wonder and narrative. His vases, sculptures, and decorative items are not just functional objects but works of art that invite viewers to appreciate their intricate details and craftsmanship.

Antal Vasile's legacy is one of dedication and creativity. His work continues to inspire, offering a window into the timeless beauty of glass art. Whether you are a collector or an art lover, exploring Antal Vasile's creations is a journey into the heart of artistic brilliance.

Experience the enchanting world of Antal Vasile by visiting his gallery and witnessing the magic of his glass art firsthand. Each piece is a testament to the enduring legacy of a master glass artist.

Name: VETRERIA BRESSAN
Description:
In the distant year of 1973, Vetreria Bressan was born, a historic and renowned family-run company that, for over forty years, has been dedicated to the processing and transformation of flat glass. This versatile and durable material boasts undisputed functional and aesthetic qualities, increasingly sought after for residential, commercial, and industrial furnishings.

Over the years, Vetreria Bressan, based in Creazzo, just a stone's throw away from the center of Vicenza, has operated as a true tailor of glass, meticulously crafting each creation to measure down to the smallest detail. It has elevated the art of glassmaking to large-scale elite production.

The company's commitment to individual needs drives its focus on research and investment in technological innovation, catering to private clients seeking to enhance their homes, businesses looking to personalize their spaces, and professionals seeking new ideas for business projects.

Vetreria Bressan's strength lies in its deep-rooted experience in the industry, expertly blending quality, innovation, development, and artisanal tradition. It employs the most advanced techniques for flat glass processing, prioritizing the excellence of Made in Italy.

Each new project stems from careful and meticulous analysis, with the primary goal of fully satisfying the customer, helping to turn their idea into reality with a touch of uniqueness and originality that only an artisan can provide.

At our headquarters, our technicians are available for personalized consultations.

In più, la creatività incessante e avanguardista del team continua a realizzare progetti che trasformano l’ambiente con soluzioni in vetro stratificato colorato oppure satinato, riflettente oppure rinforzato, vetro stampato, con design moderni, argentati normali e di sicurezza, e accessori, che rispecchiano una consolidata capacità di realizzare prodotti mirati in grado di trasmettere agli occhi di chi guarda che nessun luogo è bello come la propria casa.

Name: SpolKovac
Description:
Spoločnosť Kováč je dynamicky sa rozvíjajúca firma, ktorá má v oblasti
kompletného opracovania plochého a výroby izolačného skla viacročné skúsenosti. 

Vznikla v roku 1991 a za toto obdobie svojho pôsobenia sa dokázala plnohodnotne začleniť na trh spracovateľov plochého skla. 

Patrí medzi najrýchlejšie rastúce firmy na Slovensku, o čom svedči približne 30 percentný medziročný nárast tržieb. Medzi hlavné ciele spoločnosti Kováč patrí „spokojnosť zákazníkov, a preto sa snaží splniť svojim klientom ich požiadavky s čo najvyššou pridanou hodnotou“. 

Spoločnosť Kováč sa snaží plne prispôsobiť potrebám klientov, pričom jej cieľom je, aby sa stala ich preferovaným dodávateľom. 

Misiou spoločnosti je zabezpečiť svojim klientom nielen plnohodnotný prístup k informačným technológiám ale aj aby tieto technológie dokázali plnohodnotne využívať. 

Preto medzi jej hlavné hodnoty patrí: prispievanie k celkovej informovanosti a spokojnosti zákazníka, profesionálny prístup, inovatívnosť, vzdelávanie, rozvoj a rast spoločnosti a v neposledom rade dodržovanie etického štandardu.
Spoločnosť Kováč  produkuje kvalitné produkty pre 270 odberateľov v rámci Slovenska, Česka , Rakúska, Maďarska a Nemecka. 

V rámci svojho portfólia spoločnosť Kováč zabezpečuje pre svojich klientov tri typy služieb: kompletné opracovanie plochého skla, výrobu izolačného skla, služby pre verejnosť a to pre odberateľov nielen v rámci tuzemska ale v súčasnosti sa úspešne presadzuje aj na zahraničných trhoch.

Name: Kca @ AynaSanatı
Description:
Firmamız, 1986 yılında Çaglayan’ da KCA AynaSanatı adı altında ticaret hayatına başlamıştır. O yıllardaki teknolojik imkânlar ölçüsünde Cam ve Ayna sektöründe kaliteli çalışmalara imza atmıştır.

KCAAynaSanatı Mobilya sektöründe kullanılan cam ve aynaların kesimi ve işlenmesi, Cam aksesuar imalatı, Cam mobilya, Cam masa, Cam sehpa, TV sehpaları, Zigon sehpalar, Cam-ayna boyama ve kumlamaları ile müşterilerinden gelen her türlü isteğe göre özel tasarımlar üretme konularında faaliyet göstermektedir.

Artan talepleri karşılayabilmek için, 1999 yılından itibaren İkitelli Başakşehir Mobilyacılar Sitesi’nde 4 katlı yeni İmalathane ve Showroom bölümünü faaliyete geçiren firmamız; bu taleplere büyük ölçüde cevap verme olanağı bulmuştur. 2003 yılında ayna tasarım ve ayna aksesuar alanında da imalata başlayan firmamız, yurt dışına açılma niyetini ortaya çıkarmıştır. Bu bağlamda başta İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir, Adana, Antalya olmak üzere çeşitli illerimizde tanıtım amaçlı fuarlara katıldık. 

Firmamız Türkiye genelinde bugünü kadar 19 fuarda ürünlerini tüketicilerin beğenisine sunmuştur. Alanında uzman ve güler yüzlü kadromuzla, sizleri Kca@AynaSanati.com.E ticaret sitemizi ziyaret edebilirsiniz.

Name: Dickinson Glass Studio and Showroom
Description:
Dickinson Glass honors the tradition of craft and venetian glass-making techniques, provides education encompassing an ancient art, and produces elegant products to enrich the lives of those in the community.

Dickinson Glass is a handcrafted glass line by local glass artist and designer, Michael Dickinson. With each glass made by hand from his current studio in the heart of Marin, he honors traditional venetian techniques while incorporating contemporary scientific approaches. His current body of work is a collection of time spent sculpting, manipulating, and shaping primarily hollow forms and sculpture. Leading workshops around the Bay Area, he strives to connect maker and consumer, highlighting the importance of the tradition of craft through education and relationships. He is a faculty member at The Crucible, Bay Area Glass Institute, and has hosted live demonstrations for Stanford University among other organizations. His work has been exhibited nationally, showcased in galleries and curated stores, and is included in a number of private collections.

Name: Atelier Žampach
Description:
Atelier Žampach nese jméno po svém zakladateli, malíři, sochaři a sklářskému designérovi Stanislavu Žampachovi. Ten ve sklářské tvorbě spojuje své kamenosochařské i malířské umění. Techniku pískování, kterou si zdokonalil v Japonsku, pozvedl na špičkovou výtvarnou disciplínu a svůj osobitý rukopis přenesl na každé své dílo.
 
 „Všechny produkty mají svůj příběh …“. Ten začíná myšlenkou v umělcově hlavě, pokračuje kresbou a tvorbou šablony pro reliéfní pískování a zkušenou rukou je pak přenesen na sklo, jemuž dodá jedinečnou a nenapodobitelnou tvář. „Inspirace je všude, jen ji člověk musí vnímat  …..“  Přenášet živou přírodu do zdánlivě neživého skla je pro nás velkou výzvou. Téměř na každém výrobku najdete stylizaci přírody, k níž máme hlubokou úctu a obdiv. 
 
Rodinný atelier tvoří jedinečné umělecké sklo s nadčasovým designem již od roku 1990.  Zpočátku byl zaměřen na design pro sklárny a obchodní společnosti z celého světa, např. Meiwa Trading Tokyo, Kurata Craft Glass Tsukiyono-Japonsko, May Company-USA. Od roku 1997 se však atelier zaměřil více na vlastní vývoj, produkci a prodej reliéfně pískovaného skla. 

V roce 2018 převzal atelier Ondřej Žampach, který pokračuje v tradici svého otce. Prioritou je dodávat na trh novinky, ale taky zachovávat i starší sortiment. Každodenní výzvou je hledání cest k využití moderních technologií pro zdokonalování kvality výrobního procesu a v neposlední řadě také designu a výroby vlastních obalů. 
 
Pro své záměry objednává atelier sklo dle vlastních návrhů v mnoha českých i zahraničních sklárnách, popř. vybírá zajímavé a neohleděné tvary, které tyto sklárny nabízejí. Výrobky atelieru Žampach jsou k dostání nejen v českých galeriích a specializovaných obchodech, ale i v zahraničí.

Name: Au verre Phil é d'art fusionné
Description:
L'art du verre fusionné : Une invitation à la beauté, à l'élégance, et à l'émotion.
Découvrez un savoir-faire unique et des créations exceptionnelles

Vous êtes à la recherche d’une œuvre d’art originale, d’une pièce artisanale qui incarne l’élégance et l’émotion ? Vous souhaitez offrir à vos espaces privés ou professionnels une touche lumineuse et colorée, qui capte la lumière et transforme l’atmosphère ? Alors, bienvenue dans mon univers, où le verre fusionné se réinvente pour donner vie à des créations uniques, élégantes, et éco-responsables.

Je suis créateur verrier fondeur par fusion, et ma passion pour le verre, héritée de mes premières découvertes enfantines, m’a conduit à explorer cette technique ancestrale, modernisée pour répondre aux besoins esthétiques d’aujourd’hui. Le verre fusionné est bien plus qu’une simple matière : il est le reflet de l’interaction entre la lumière, la couleur et la forme. Chaque pièce que je crée est une œuvre d'art unique, où l’émotion prend forme à travers un jeu subtil de transparence et d’opacité.

Mes œuvres s’adaptent aussi bien à des projets personnels qu’à des commandes sur-mesure pour des espaces professionnels, hôteliers, ou haut de gamme. Que vous soyez particulier ou prescripteur (designer, décorateur ou architecte d'intérieur) dans le secteur du luxe et de l’hôtellerie, chaque création peut être réalisée selon vos besoins et envies, tout en respectant une approche sur-mesure et personnalisée.

Name: Steko LLC
Description:
«ՍՏԵԿՈ» ընկերությունն արդեն քսան տարուց ավել է, ինչ հայկակական շուկայում ապակի ներմուծող ընկերությունների մեջ առաջատարներից մեկն է, սակայն այդքանով չի սահմանափակվում վերջինիս գործունեությունը...

Այսօր ժամանակակից «ՍՏԵԿՈ» ընկերությունն իրենից ներկայացնում է մի շարք արտադրամասերից բաղկացած համալիր, որտեղ յուրաքանչյուր փուլ իրականացվում է տարիների փորձով կոփված անձնակազմի կողմից, իսկ ներմուծման հարուստ փորձի արդյունքում հաստատվել են ամուր գործնական կապեր արտասահմանում գտնվող մի շարք գործարանների հետ: Այս ամենի շնորհիվ  «ՍՏԵԿՈ» ընկերությունն այսօր վստահորեն իր հաճախորդներին է առաջարկում բարձրաճաշակ և որակյալ արտադրանք:

«ՍՏԵԿՈ» ընկերությունում աշխատող փորձառու ինժեներների և դիզայներների խումբը պատվիրատուներին տրամադրում է պրոֆեսիոնալ խորհրդատվություն և ճշգրիտ նախահաշվարկ, ինչի շնորհիվ էլ պատվերներն իրականացվում են հաճախորդի պահանջներին և "գրպանին" համապատասխան:

Ընկերության գործունեության հիմնական ուղղություններն են.

Ձևավոր և հարթ ապակիների, էներգոխնայող և մուլտիֆունկցիոնալ ապակիների, վիտրաժային ապակիների, հայելիների և հայելապատ ապակիների մանրա-մեծածախ վաճառք,
Ապակու մշակման ծառայություններ` կտրում, անցքերի բացում և բարդ կտրվածքներ, թրծում, եզրերի հղկում և փայլեցում, եզրերի թեք մշակում (ֆացետ), ծակում, սոսնձում, ամրանավորում և ավազահարում, բազմաշերտ ապակիների (Lamex) պատրաստում
Էներգոխնայող և մուլտիֆունկցիոնալ ապակեփաթեթների արտադրություն
Այլումինե և մետաղապլաստե կոնստրուկցիաների արտադրություն,
Շենքերի արտաքին երեսապատում` ապակե փաթեթներով և կոմպոզիտային պանելներով,
Ամբողջությամբ ապակուց հատակներ, առաստաղներ, պատեր, դռներ և բազրիքներ,
Հավաքովի կոնստրուկցիաների արտադրություն` տաղավարներ, կրպակներ, առևտրի և սպասարկման կետեր և այլն,
Կահույքի արտադրություն,
Ավանդական և թաղանթային վիտրաժների արտադրություն,
Լայնաֆորմատ տպագրություն ցանկացած մակերևույթի վրա:
Գովազդային վահանակների պատրաստում,
Լայնաֆորմատ տպագրություն ցանկացած մակերևույթի վրա
Դիզայնի և նախագծի ամբողջական մշակում, պատվերի վիրտուալ մոդելավորում և վիզուալիզացիա,
Բոլոր տեսակի ապրանքների տեղափոխում և տեղադրում,

Name: Elite Glass Industries Co. - Bullet Resistance Glass
Description:
Elite Glass Industries Co. (EGI) was established in 2013 as a premier global provider of state-of-the-art armored ballistic glass. Based in Jordan at the KADDB Industrial Park, EGI is the industry leader in the design and manufacturing of bulletproof glass solutions. EGI specializes in custom-cut, bullet resistant windows and barriers for a wide range of security and protection systems to meet our clients’ needs. We are experts in the provision of transparent armored glass solutions for heavy and lightweight armored vehicles, cash-in-transit vehicles, earth moving equipment, military and law enforcement vehicles and facilities, aircraft, train and marine applications, financial, government and diplomatic institutions, retail stores and residences.

Elite Glass Industries Co. transparent armored glass has undergone rigorous testing to ensure that it withstands the highest levels of ballistic threat. EGI glass is custom-developed based on our clients’ requirements to withstand different grades of penetration, providing clients with a guaranteed protective environment. Not only does EGI manufacture the most effective protective glass products available, our bullet resistant glass offers unparalleled visual clarity and unique design.

Name: RONA2serve
Description:
How does RONA glassworks, a manufacturer of global prominence, approach the catering sector? 
The answer is easy: full on! At RONA, not only have we separated product design and manufacturing for products used in the hospitality sector from products for domestic use, but we also decided 
to deal with the entire catering sector as it really is - with all its specific quirks, attention to detail, special demands of the hospitality world, and the needs of our partners, with whom we are destined, 
through the rules of catering, to live not simply in a supplier-customer relationship but a symbiotic, mutually beneficial long-term partnership. This is how, more than 20 years ago, the concept of a 
professional crystalline range made specifically for the catering sector was born at RONA. It soon became a unique project at the company, and we coined it “RONA2serve”

Name: Al Jadaani Glass Factory For Industry
SZKŁO
Description:
Szkło /shkwo/ means glass in Polish. Szkło are functional glass sculptures, hand-blown by Aleksandra Zawistowska with a team of craftsmen. Szkło is a celebration of materials and the glassblowing process, with no two pieces alike.

Szkło is a combination of an imaginary approach, years of craftsmanship experience and an admiration for the raw material. Szkło stems from challenging the conventional glassblowing process, turning it into a playful experiment instead. As no traditional moulds are used in the process, the sculptures assume coincidental, spontaneous forms, often challenging the notion of beauty. The glassblowing process becomes as important as the final form itself. The mission of Szkło is to push the boundaries of functionality and material characteristics, turning the simple act of eating and drinking into an experience.

Szkło celebrates uniqueness and diversity. Szkło is an invitation to limit our possessions and enjoy the quality of individual objects instead.

Name: GlassMaister
Description:
GlassMaister is the official representative of a major American company for the international market. We specialize in removing scratches from glass using the advanced Gforce Max tool. Our mission is to extend the lifespan of glass and prevent unnecessary waste. We passionately believe in our product, as it offers fast, efficient, and environmentally friendly repairs.

If you work with glass, you know scratches are inevitable. They waste time, cost money, and hurt business. Most people discard scratched glass or worsen the damage trying to fix it. Gforce Max removes scratches professionally and distortion-free.

GlassMaister je uradni zastopnik velikega ameriškega podjetja za mednarodni trg. Specializirani smo za odstranjevanje prask s stekla z uporabo vrhunskega orodja Gforce Max. Naša misija je podaljšati življenjsko dobo stekel in preprečiti njihovo nepotrebno odlaganje. S strastjo verjamemo v naš izdelek, saj omogoča popravilo, ki je hitro, učinkovito in okolju prijazno.
Če delate s steklom, imate opravka s praskami. Ne le, da opraskano steklo jemlje čas, povzroča stroške in slabša poslovanje – že samo po sebi predstavlja zoprno težavo. Opraskani kos stekla večina ljudi odvrže ali pa z odstranjevanjem prask povzročijo še večjo škodo. Se vam to zdi znano? Čas je za boljši način. Z orodjem Gforce Max praske odstranjujemo profesionalno in brez popačenja.

Name: Glass Roots Inc.
Description:
Curtis Dionne left home at a young age to pursue a career in craft and design, eventually learning glassblowing from masters in the Glass City of Guadalajara. In 2008, Curtis bought a homestead in rural New Brunswick, where he built a 14th-century-style wood-fired furnace and founded Glass Roots Inc.

In 2021, Curtis and his partner Charlotte MacLeod relocated their family to Saint John, New Brunswick, to start a public glass studio. Initially, Glass Roots planned to move their studio to Union Street in the summer of 2021, but the furnace’s industrial designation prevented this. Instead, they operated out of a basement workshop on Canterbury Street, fronting a parking lot and connected to an alleyway. Although not the most ideal location, it was meant to be temporary, with the landlord describing it as a "diamond in the rough."

In January 2023, Glass Roots expanded their workshop, moving equipment into an adjoining building. This new addition, which had been boarded up for decades, was transformed into a functioning studio with a viewing area where guests can sit and watch glassblowing.

In July 2024 we closed our showroom in 89 Canterbury Street and consolidated our gallery space into our expanded studio space so we could work together under one roof.

The Glass Roots gallery entrance is located at the corner of Canterbury and Duke Streets, opposite Saint John High School, just two blocks up from the entrance to the award-winning Area 506 Container Village and the cruise ship terminal.

Name: Perfect Glass Instrument Co.
Description:
About Us:
Welcome to Perfect Glass Instrument Co. marketed under the brand name VITRIFY, a premier laboratory glassware manufacturer with a legacy spanning over 20 years. Established in 2005 and situated in the heart of Ambala Cantt, Haryana, India our company have built a solid reputation for producing innovative glass instruments that meet the evolving needs of scientific research, pharmaceuticals, and educational institutions.

Our Commitment to Excellence:
We strive for excellence in every aspect of our business. From the initial design concept to the final product, our team of skilled artisans and engineers are committed to delivering laboratory glassware that exceeds the industry standards. Our product portfolio encompasses a wide array of laboratory glassware, including adapters, bottles, flasks, condensers, extractors, distillation apparatus, funnels and more. Whether our customers require standard or custom-made laboratory glassware, we have the expertise to fulfill the specific requirements, either it is a research institution, pharmaceutical company, or educational organization, we are here to provide you with high-quality, customizable laboratory glassware that enhance your scientific endeavors.

Unparalleled Expertise & Quality Assurance:
With our extensive experience, we have gained unparalleled expertise in the art of laboratory glassware manufacturing. Our team of experts is well-versed in the latest techniques and technologies, enabling us to produce cutting-edge glassware solutions for a wide range of scientific applications. At Perfect Glass Instrument Co. quality is at the core of everything we do, we understand the critical role that precise and reliable laboratory glassware plays in scientific research and experimentation. That's why our commitment to excellence is reflected in every piece of glassware we produce. We ensure that every piece of glassware leaving our facility is of the utmost quality and durability.

Name: Glasmalerei Sattler Kunst am Bau
Description:
Unsere Welt ist eine Scheibe
Folge uns und du wirst sehen wie und wo die Welt ein Stückchen bunter wird!
Wir zeigen dir die Fertigung sowie das Endergebnis unserer modernen oder auch traditionellen Glaskunst im öffentlichen und privaten Raum.
Unsere Glasgestaltung umfasst ein sehr umfangreiches Gebiet und deshalb sagen Bilder mehr aus als 1000 Worte. 

Nun paar Kurzinfos
Wer sind unsere Kunden?
Architekten/innen, Kirchen, Künstler/innen, öffentliche Träger und Einrichtungen, Gemeinden,  Pfarrer/innen, Privatpersonen, einfach gesagt für alle Menschen die eine Freude am farbigen Glas und besonderem Handwerk verspüren

Was/Wo gestalten wir und fertigen an:
Moderne sowie traditionelle Kirchenfenster, Kapellenfenster, Gestaltungen für Aussegnungshallen, Abschiedsräume, Meditationsräume, Krankenhäuser, Pflegeheime, großflächige Glasmalereien, Buntglasfenster, Bleiglasfenster, Bleiverglasungen, Grabsteine, Friedhofsgestaltung, Kirchenleuchten, Bleileuchten, Bleiglasleuchten, Glaszäune, Ganzglasanlagen, Glastüren, Glasduschen, Spiegel und alles was das Glasherz begehrt
Selbstverständlich restaurieren und reparieren wir auch Kirchenfenster, Glasmalereifenster nach denkmalpflegerischen Vorgaben.
Fragt uns einfach an!
Wir wünschen euch viel Freude mit unserer seltenen Handwerkskunst!
Eure Frau Macher (Katrin Engel-Meyer) und euer Meister Engel

Name: Hefter Galéria és Stúdió
Description:
A Hefter galéria és stúdió győri gyökerekkel rendelkező, ma már Pannonhalmán működő üvegművészeti vállalkozás. Története visszanyúlik az 1970-es évekre amikor Hefter László üvegművész Budapestről Győrbe költözött és megalapította műtermét. A stúdió fő profilja az építészethez kapcsolódó üvegművészeti feladatok tervezése és kivitelezése. Közel ötven éves munkásságunk alatt számos építészeti, belsőépítészeti és restaurációs projektben vettünk részt tervező művész, társtervezői és kivitelezői felkérésben. Új munkáink során, saját vizuális jelrendszerünkön keresztül olyan összetett problémákra keresünk megoldást, mint a tér, az üveg és a fény vizuális viszonylatai.

A stúdió 2006-ban kiegészült egy galériával, amely az eredeti szándék szerint ma is a magyar kortárs üvegművészet kiállítóhelye és folyamatos bemutatkozási fóruma. Állandó és időszakos kiállítások, workshopok, szakmai programok és előadások keretein belül kínálunk kapcsolódási lehetőséget a szakma és az érdeklődők számára egyaránt. Kiállítótereinkben közel ötven magyar művész és számos külföldi vendégművész munkája kerül bemutatásra.

Name: The Glass Club at The Ohio State University
Description:
The Ohio State University Glass Club is a fully student-run organization dedicated to glass art, education, and community engagement. We create and sell a wide range of handcrafted glass products, including functional drinkware, ornaments, decorative objects, and sculptural works. Our club also hosts annual glass sales, bringing one-of-a-kind student-made pieces directly to the campus community.

Beyond production, we provide hands-on learning experiences through studio workshops, visiting artist demonstrations, and collaborative projects. Members participate in regional and national glass events, conferences, and studio trips to expand their skills and connect with the wider glass community. Through these opportunities, we support artistic growth, professional development, and a vibrant culture of creativity at Ohio State.

Name: Glassmester Einar Knutsen AS
Description:
Fra bare å ha vært et produkt som skulle beskytte mot vær og vind samt slippe lys inn i bygget, kan glass i dag fylle en mengde funksjoner. Hos Glassmester Einar Knutsen AS er det kun fantasien som setter begrensninger. 

Glassmester Einar Knutsen AS er en tradisjonsrik familiebedrift som har eksistert i over 40 år. Nå har sønnen Mads Knutsen overtatt hovedansvaret for firmaet, men far og grunnlegger Einar er fremdeles med på laget. Sammen skaper de en kvalitetsbedrift som vet hva glass byr på av muligheter. 

Bedriften rommer 10 ansatte, hvorav 6 av jobber daglig med montering av glass, utomhus. Selskapet er etablert sentralt på Bryne og leverer til hele distriktet. Erfaring er gull verdt og begrensninger er et fremmedord – når det gjelder glass er det bare fantasien som setter grenser.

Name: Miras 1988
Description:
Since 1986, Miras has been dedicated to crafting high-quality, culturally rich products. Our unwavering commitment to continuous research and development has been the cornerstone of our progress to this day.

Primarily utilizing glass and integrating it with wood, metal, marble, and raw ceramic (polymer) materials, our products are predominantly handmade, maintaining a consistently high-quality standard. We ensure price competitiveness through the use of process-enhancing tools while steadfastly upholding our commitment to quality, thereby delivering products that meet and exceed our customers’ expectations.

Our policy of continuous improvement is driven by significant investments in human resources and automation.

With our original design strength and diverse manufacturing capabilities, Miras is always prepared to meet the demands of our valued customers.

Please feel free to reach out to us with any inquiries.

Name: Glaserei Marlog
Description:
Meisterbetrieb, gegründet Januar 2022. Geschäftsführer Markus Marlog, Glasermeister. Büro und Buchhaltung sowie Email- und Textverkehr Franziska Marlog, Wirtschaftsfachwirtin. 2 Angestellte, kleine Werkstatt in Dorfstraße 12, 83098 Brannenburg. Neuer großer Showroom in der Rosenheimerstraße in Brannenburg, auf 140 m², seit April 2024.

Über uns: Bereits in jungen Jahren war die größte Motivation von Markus Marlog wieder akkurate Arbeit bis ins kleinste Detail in die Branche zu bringen! Dieses Ziel stets vor Augen beendete er 2012 seine Ausbildung zum Glaser und führt heute, mit (hochgerechnet von 2009 bis stand heute) 14 Jahren Berufserfahrung, stolz seinen eigenen Meisterbetrieb. Die Liebe zum Detail und der Drang zur Innovation lassen sich oft schwer verbinden. Glasermeister Markus Marlog findet in den meisten Fällen doch einen Weg. „Hochwertige Qualität durch langlebige Produkte mit den Wünschen der Kunden zu verbinden vermag Kreativität und das nicht zu selten, doch es wurde Zeit meine Träume mit den Träumen anderer zu verbinden, sie glücklich zu machen durch das Ausarbeiten und Umsetzen ihrer Ideen.“

Warum Wir: Qualität vom Glas-Experten. Wir bieten Ihnen das Rundum-sorglos-Paket für Ihre Glasangelegenheiten: Passgenaue Beratung und Aufmaß vor Ort. Ideen entwickeln und formschöne Umsetzung! Saubere, schnelle Qualitätsausführungen.

Dienstleistungen: Sämtliche Dienstleistungen im Glaserei-Gewerk.

Produkte:
- Rahmenlose Ganzglas-Duschen
- Glas Fassaden
- Wintergärten
- Terrassenüberdachungen und Carports
- Ganzglaas Geländer
- Ganzglasanlagen / Büro Abtrennungen aus Glas
- Fenster Vorbereitung für den neuen Anstrich
- Rückwände aus Glas / lackiertes Glas
- Glas Schaden Reparatur
- Flügelabdeckprofil-Service

Gesuch nicht gefunden? Fragen Sie uns!

Although we’ve come a long way over the past 100+ years, one thing hasn’t changed: our commitment to serving customers. Whatever the size of the job, we apply the same glazier expertise, craftsmanship and care.

It’s why we continue to offer round-the-clock emergency glass repairs, with a one-hour response time. We don’t want customers to have to worry about their home or business premises being left insecure or open to the elements a moment longer than necessary.

As one of the largest glaziers in Sydney, our knowledge, equipment, buying power and region-wide coverage offer significant advantages to customers. And our expert glaziers and repairers have unbeatable experience–many have been with us for decades.

Name: HTCE GmbH
Description:
HTCE GmbH
IN-SITU annealing lehr ROLL CLEANING SERVICES
For more than 10years, we have successfully cleaned more than 3000 transport rollers in various annealing lehrs in the flat glass industry, using dry ice blasting. 
Cleaning can be carried out during ongoing production without any significant impairment of your glass production.
Many of our customers use this option, preferably during the production of 4mm float glass.
Today, we are proven to be able to remove well over 95% of sulphate and tin oxide deposits from the surface of your stainless-steel rollers. 
The cleaning process is contactless, which eliminates the mechanical damage caused by removal, scraping or grinding.
Because the dry ice dissolves without leaving any residue, there is no entry of abrasive into the interior of the annealing lehr.
Defects and optical flaws in the glass caused by contamination on the surface of the transport rollers can be ruled out by cleaning.
No more sulphate flakes are carried along and damage the glass during transport.
Cleaning improves the reject rate and enables you to produce the best glass quality. 
Through regular roller cleaning you can maximise the efficiency of your production.
We would be happy to arrange a test date with you, during which we can demonstrate our process at your premises.
If you have any problems with your production or would like a prophylactic cleaning, please contact us.

Name: Verre Soufflé Sadika
Description:
SADIKA est une maison tunisienne emblématique du verre soufflé artisanal, fondée par Sadika Keskes, artiste plasticienne et maîtresse-verrière de renommée internationale. 
 Basée à Gammarth (Tunisie), SADIKA est bien plus qu’un simple atelier : c’est un centre vivant d’artisanat, de création et de transmission, où le savoir-faire traditionnel du verre soufflé est préservé, modernisé et célébré. 
 
Histoire et héritage:
Sadika Keskes a étudié aux Beaux-Arts de Tunis puis s’est formée comme maître verrier à Murano (Italie), la ville mythique du verre soufflé.
En 1984, elle construit son premier four artisanal à Gammarth, initiant la renaissance du verre soufflé en Tunisie, une tradition qui avait presque disparu depuis le XIVᵉ siècle.
En 1993, elle crée sa première société dédiée au verre soufflé à Gammarth, attirant amateurs d’art, designers et collectionneurs.

 Savoir-faire & création
SADIKA conçoit des pièces 100 % artisanales, soufflées à la bouche et souvent associées à d’autres matériaux comme le métal ou le bois. Chaque pièce est unique, fruit d’un travail minutieux du verre en fusion, reflétant la lumière et la tradition, le tout inspiré par le riche patrimoine culturel tunisien et méditerranéen.

 Portée et impact
SADIKA n’est pas seulement une marque locale :
Ses créations ont été exposées et intégrées dans des contextes internationaux prestigieux.

L’entreprise a formé de nombreux artisans, contribuant à faire revivre une tradition ancestrale et à la transmettre à de nouvelles générations.

 Transmission et culture
Au-delà de la production, SADIKA est un centre d’art et de formation, où les techniques ancestrales du verre soufflé sont enseignées et partagées, renforçant la scène artistique tunisienne et inspirant des créateurs du monde entier.
 
Valeurs clés
Patrimoine & innovation
Unicité & artisanat
Transmission & formation
Rayonnement international

Dayglass, müşterilerine projelerindeki özel gereksinimlere uygun çözümler sunma konusundaki taahhüdüyle tanınıyor. İhracattaki başarısı, Dayglass’ın dünya genelinde tercih edilen bir cam tedarikçisi olmasını sağlamıştır.

Dayglass, cam teknolojisinin sınırlarını zorlayan bir vizyonla, müşterilerine estetik açıdan çekici, dayanıklı ve çeşitli uygulama alanlarına uygun cam ürünleri sunmaya devam edecektir.

Name: GlasSchaller
Description:
Glas Schaller: Tradition und Innovation in Fürth, Bayern

Über Glas Schaller

Mitten im Herzen von Fürth, Bayern, befindet sich Glas Schaller, ein renommiertes Unternehmen, das sich auf hochwertige Glaslösungen spezialisiert hat. Als familiengeführtes Unternehmen mit einer langen Tradition hat sich Glas Schaller durch innovative Designs und herausragende Handwerkskunst einen Namen gemacht.

Der Gründer hatte die Vision, erstklassige Glasprodukte für private und gewerbliche Kunden bereitzustellen. Diese Vision hat sich über die Jahrzehnte bewährt, und Glas Schaller ist heute ein vertrauenswürdiger Name in Fürth und darüber hinaus.

Produkte und Dienstleistungen

Glas Schaller bietet eine breite Palette an Produkten und Dienstleistungen an, darunter:

Maßgeschneiderte Glaslösungen:
Von Duschabtrennungen bis zu Glastüren bietet Glas Schaller individuelle Lösungen, die auf die spezifischen Bedürfnisse der Kunden zugeschnitten sind.
Innenglasdesign: Das Unternehmen ist spezialisiert auf die Gestaltung beeindruckender Glaselemente für den Innenbereich, wie Glasgeländer, Trennwände und dekorative Elemente.
Externe Glasinstallationen: 
Glas Schaller übernimmt auch Großprojekte wie Glasfassaden, Fenster und Oberlichter und sorgt für Langlebigkeit und ästhetischen Reiz.
Glasreparatur und -wartung: 
Das Unternehmen bietet umfassende Reparatur- und Wartungsdienste, um Glasinstallationen in einwandfreiem Zustand zu halten.

**Innovation und Qualität**

Der Erfolg von Glas Schaller beruht auf einem festen Bekenntnis zu Innovation und Qualität.

Name: Glastech.pl
Description:
Glastech – przestrzeń ze szkła, styl z charakterem

Tworzymy drzwi i zabudowy loftowe, które łączą w sobie elegancję szkła, industrialną prostotę i rzemieślniczą precyzję. Każdy nasz projekt to indywidualne podejście – od doboru szkła, przez układ szprosów, po detale okuć, które decydują o ostatecznym efekcie. Dzięki temu powstają realizacje dopasowane do stylu życia, wnętrza i charakteru inwestora.

Glastech to partner dla tych, którzy szukają więcej niż produktu – dla architektów i projektantów wnętrz, którzy chcą wzbogacić swoje projekty o wyjątkowy akcent. Dla salonów i dystrybutorów, którzy chcą oferować klientom unikatowy wyróżnik. Dla profesjonalnych ekip montażowych, które poszerzają swój katalog usług o modny i ceniony element. I wreszcie – dla klientów indywidualnych, którzy pragną, by ich dom nabrał światła, przestrzeni i loftowego charakteru.

Nasze drzwi loftowe ze szkła hartowanego to ponadczasowa inwestycja – bezpieczne, solidne, tworzone z myślą o tym, by zachwycały przez lata. Wierzymy, że piękno tkwi w prostych, dopracowanych liniach i perfekcyjnie dobranych detalach.

Zapraszamy do współpracy profesjonalistów, którzy chcą razem z nami kreować przestrzenie, inspirować klientów i rozwijać rynek drzwi premium w Polsce i Europie. Glastech to marka, która otwiera możliwości – od eleganckich mieszkań i apartamentów, przez biura i hotele, po showroomy i realizacje deweloperskie.

Dołącz do nas – razem możemy tworzyć więcej niż drzwi. Możemy tworzyć przestrzenie, które definiują styl i nadają wnętrzom wyjątkowy charakter.

Name: Murano Straws
Description:
Benvenuti nella Rivoluzione Sostenibile di Murano Straws

Siamo Murano Straws, un brand che unisce l'antica arte della lavorazione del vetro di Murano con l'innovazione sostenibile, offrendo una soluzione elegante e ecologica alle problematiche ambientali causate dalle cannucce di plastica monouso.

 Chi Siamo
Murano Straws nasce dall'idea visionaria di Luca Vincenzini, che, ispirato dalla bellezza dei mari e dalla necessità di proteggerli, ha creato un prodotto unico: cannucce di vetro di alta qualità, resistenti, prodotte sull'isola di Murano. La nostra missione è quella di ridurre l'impatto ambientale nel settore delle bevande, promuovendo al contempo l'eccellenza del Made in Italy.

 Il Nostro Prodotto
Le nostre cannucce sono realizzate attraverso un attento processo artigianale, risultando in un prodotto non solo esteticamente raffinato ma anche estremamente resistente e durevole. Ogni cannuccia è un'opera d'arte, personalizzabile in vari colori e formati, e può essere impreziosita con personalizzazioni.

 Sostenibilità e Impatto Ambientale
In un mondo dove la sostenibilità è sempre più al centro dell'attenzione, Murano Straws offre una soluzione concreta e di stile per ridurre l'uso di plastica monouso. Le nostre cannucce di vetro sono una scelta ecologica che dimostra l'impegno del vostro brand verso la protezione dell'ambiente.

 Perché Scegliere Murano Straws?

Qualità e Design: Unite l'eleganza del vetro di Murano con la funzionalità di un prodotto quotidiano.
Personalizzazione: Rafforzate l'identità del vostro brand con prodotti personalizzati.
Sostenibilità: Dimostrate il vostro impegno verso l'ambiente con una scelta ecologica e durevole.
Esperienza Unica per i Clienti: Offrite ai vostri clienti un'esperienza di consumo unica e memorabile.

 Unisciti a Noi nel Cambiamento
Siamo già partner di prestigiosi hotel e ristoranti. Offriamo un prodotto che non solo risponde alle esigenze ambientali, ma che eleva anche l'esperienza del cliente.

Name: TechCatcher Sub-Surface Laser Engraving
Description:
TechCatcher is an industry-leading glass laser engraving specialist dedicated to transforming ordinary glass into extraordinary works of art and functional design elements. Our core expertise lies in precision internal glass engraving, where we harness cutting-edge Sub-Surface Laser Engraving Technology to craft intricate designs within the very heart of glass materials.

With meticulous control over the laser dot matrix, we skillfully manipulate light transmission properties, creating unique visual effects. When unlit, our pieces maintain transparency, seamlessly blending into their surroundings. However, upon illumination, they reveal stunning patterns, images, or even act as high-performance light-guiding plates, demonstrating exceptional versatility.

Our advanced techniques allow for multi-layer engraving, enabling us to produce captivating designs that are visible even without backlighting, adding depth and complexity to each creation. This innovative process opens up endless possibilities for architects, artists, and designers looking to incorporate customized, high-quality glass features into their projects.

At TechCatcher, we pride ourselves not only on our technical prowess but also on our commitment to collaboration and customer satisfaction. Whether it's bespoke artwork or large-scale production runs, we invite you to explore the boundless potential of glass laser engraving by contacting us at techcatcher@yeah.net.

Name: EURODEKOR Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Firma EURODEKOR (dawniej Elektromech) działa na rynku szklarskim nieprzerwanie od 1986 roku. Od początku swojego istnienia firma zajmuje się opracowywaniem technologii oraz produkcją maszyn dla przemysłu szklarskiego. Dzięki systematycznemu rozwojowi firmy oraz wdrażaniu nowych rozwiązań w 2005 roku poszerzyliśmy zakres swojej działalności o zdobienie szkła. Fachowość i profesjonalizm są największym kapitałem naszej firmy dzięki czemu z powodzeniem realizujemy trudne wyzwania kooperując zarówno z potentatami, jak i z małymi firmami z kraju i zagranicy.

Podstawą naszej działalności na ten moment jest dekorowanie szkła. Wykonujemy realizacje dla zróżnicowanych klientów. Zdobimy różnego rodzaju pojemniki szklane dla firm z branży świeczkarskiej, kosmetycznej, farmaceutycznej, spożywczej oraz monopolowej. Jesteśmy także obecni na rynku HoReCa, gdzie w największej mierze tworzymy dekoracje na szkle użytkowym. Współpracujemy z klientami zajmującymi się brandingiem, gdy decydują się na wykorzystanie narzędzi marketingowych, takich jak tzw. szkło reklamowe z logowaniem. Produkty szklane z logo marki często trafiają do restauracji, pubów i innych lokali gastronomicznych. Stosuje się je także do tworzenia zestawów prezentowych. W ramach tego rodzaju projektów prowadzimy współpracę z agencjami reklamowymi. Jako usługę dodatkową oferujemy konfekcję produktów.

W ramach oferowanych technologii możemy zaproponować:
• malowanie natryskowe,
• sitodruk,
• satynę chemiczną,
• hot stamping,
• nakładanie kalkomanii.

Powyższe techniki można z sukcesem ze sobą łączyć tworząc unikatowe produkty. Nieustannie pracujemy nad poszerzaniem naszej oferty. Prowadzimy prace w zakresie oferowania nowych technologii dekorowania szkła – w stosunku do tych, które możemy zaproponować dotychczas. Równolegle poszukujemy na rynku efektów specjalnych, które rozwijają dostępne techniki dekorowania, często wynosząc je na zupełnie inny, niestandardowy poziom.

Description:
Founded in2015, RasaCrystal has evolved from a boutique atelier into Iran’s leading manufacturer of luxury crystal glassware. More than100 artisans work at our purpose‑built campus, producing up to25000 handcrafted pieces each year—from gold‑plated tableware and vases to limited‑edition objets d’art. Every item is blown, cut, engraved and finished in‑house, then gilded with responsibly sourced 24‑karat gold.

We serve prestige retailers, distributors, hospitality groups and corporate clients across Iran, the Gulf and the Caucasus, with new partnerships opening in Europe and EastAsia. Flexible minimum orders, end‑to‑end customisation and transparent pricing mean that luxury is always within reach.

Name: O'Culot
Description:
Chez O’Culot, nous avons une mission claire : offrir une seconde vie aux bouteilles en les transformant, dans notre atelier, en verres de table design, durables et responsables.

Pourquoi on existe ?

Parce qu’on croit qu’une bouteille vide ne devrait pas finir à la poubelle mais avoir une seconde vie. Chez O’Culot, on veut prouver qu’on peut trinquer avec style tout en allégeant la planète. Recycler c’est bien. Réinventer, c’est mieux.

Comment on le fait ?

On récupère des bouteilles, on les coupe, on les ponce, on les polit,  dans notre atelier. Chaque pièce a son histoire, son caractère et son petit twist culotté.

Qu’est-ce qu’on propose concrètement ?

Des verres design, faits main, issus de bouteilles sauvées. Malins, durables et parfaits pour l’apéro ou pour une touche déco unique.

Name: Albeni Cam
Description:
1986 yılında kurulan üretim yolculuğumuz eski bir evde soğuk seramik (polimer) malzemelerle başladı. Sürekli araştırma ve geliştirmeye olan bağlılığımız, bugüne kadarki ilerlememizin temel taşı olmuştur.

Başlangıçta Anadolu’nun eşsiz kültürel mirasından ilham alan ürünlerimiz, zamanla müşterilerin taleplerini karşılayacak şekilde gelişerek, uluslara yönelik, kültüre özgü ve modern ürünler ortaya çıkarmıştır.

Ağırlıklı olarak camın kullanıldığı ve bunun ahşap, metal, mermer ve ham seramik (polimer) malzemelerle bütünleştirildiği ürünlerimiz büyük ölçüde el yapımıdır ve sürekli olarak yüksek kalite standardını korur. Kaliteye olan bağlılığımızı korurken, müşterilerimizin beklentilerini karşılayan ürünler sunarak, süreç iyileştirici araçların kullanımı yoluyla fiyat rekabetçiliği sağlıyoruz.

İnsan kaynağımıza ve otomasyona yatırım yaparak sürekli iyileştirme politikasını sürdürüyoruz.

Özgün tasarım gücümüz ve farklı imalat imkanlarımız ile siz değerli müşterilerimizin taleplerini karşılamak için her zaman buradayız.

Name: Maaricha USA
Description:
As the Sales Manager for Maaricha USA, I specialize in connecting brands with premium glass packaging solutions that elevate product presentation and protect product integrity. Maaricha is an international glass manufacturer providing high-quality bottles for the fragrance, liquor, and pharmaceutical industries — where craftsmanship, clarity, and consistency truly matter.

At Maaricha, our focus goes beyond just supplying bottles. We help brands bring their vision to life — from initial design to final production — ensuring every piece reflects elegance, quality, and functionality. Our manufacturing is based in India, where modern production meets sustainable practices. By managing our U.S. sales operations, I bridge the gap between American brands and our world-class glass production capabilities overseas.

Many of our partners come to us searching for alternatives to mass imports from China — looking for cleaner materials, better quality control, and transparent sourcing. That’s where Maaricha stands out. We offer a reliable, long-term solution for companies seeking to enhance their brand image while reducing chemical exposure and supply chain risks.

My role involves developing strategic partnerships, managing client relationships, and helping companies design custom glass bottles that match their product’s story. Whether it’s a luxury fragrance, small-batch spirit, or pharmaceutical line, I work closely with clients to ensure they receive packaging that looks beautiful, performs reliably, and aligns with their values.

If you’re exploring new packaging options or looking for a dependable supplier who values quality and integrity as much as you do, I’d love to connect and discuss how Maaricha can support your next project.

Name: Alok Glass Works
Description:
Founded in the 1980s, Alok Glassworks has grown from a modest glass manufacturing unit into one of India’s leading producers of premium glass products. Based in Firozabad, we specialize in manufacturing a wide range of glassware, including bottles, tumblers, jars, cosmetic and perfume bottles, vases, candles, and home décor items. With over 350 metric tons of glass produced daily, we are committed to excellence, offering products that combine traditional craftsmanship and cutting-edge technology.

Our manufacturing facilities utilize the latest in glass production technology, ensuring that we meet the highest global standards of quality and precision. All our products are arsenic-free, lead-free, and BPA-free, making them a safe and sustainable choice for a variety of industries, including food and beverage, cosmetics, personal care, and home décor. We pride ourselves on being able to deliver products that are eco-friendly, recyclable, and reusable, promoting a healthier and more sustainable environment.

In addition to our vast array of ready-to-ship products, we offer custom solutions to meet the specific needs of our clients. With over 250 custom molds in stock and the capability to develop new molds upon request, we provide the flexibility and creativity to bring your packaging ideas to life. Our in-house decoration services, such as color printing, UV printing, frosting, and metallization, allow for a high degree of customization, giving your brand a distinctive look in the marketplace.

At Alok Glassworks, we are more than just a supplier—we are your partner in success. We understand the importance of high-quality, visually appealing packaging in today’s competitive marketplace. Whether you are looking for standard products or bespoke packaging solutions, we are here to help you achieve your vision, ensuring your products stand out in every setting.

Together, let’s build a sustainable future, one glass at a time.

Name: OLCZAK SZKŁO
Description:
Specjalizujemy się w realizacji innowacyjnych projektów z zastosowaniem szkła w architekturze już od przeszło 25 lat. Współpracujemy z inwestorami indywidualnymi, biurami architektonicznymi na terenie całej Polski, doradzając w doborze odpowiedniego materiału oraz projektując produkty ze szkła - w tym te artystyczne. Dysponujemy własną instalacją do hartowania szkła oraz specjalistycznymi urządzeniami CNC do jego obróbki. Pełna kontrola procesu projektowego i produkcyjnego umożliwia nam przewidywalną współpracę, która spełnia oczekiwania naszych klientów. Gwarantujemy bezpieczeństwo stosowania naszych wyrobów, które opieramy na odpowiednich certyfikatach, stale je aktualizując. 

Dzięki naszej wiedzy, doświadczeniu i pasji, jesteśmy w stanie realizować najbardziej wymagające projekty. Jesteśmy dumni z dotychczasowych osiągnięć, ale zawsze dążymy do doskonalenia naszych umiejętności oraz poszerzania oferty. Jeśli poszukujesz innowacyjnych rozwiązań i chcesz, aby Twoje marzenia związane z zastosowaniem szkła w architekturze stały się rzeczywistością, to skontaktuj się z nami. Z przyjemnością podejmiemy się kolejnego wyzwania i pokażemy, co potrafimy.

Who we are?

Mylly is where ideas are polished and a new contemporary message of studio glass is fundamentally ground. 

What we do?
Mylly provides small series products, contemporary glass art and offers educational events and training. Mylly wants to raise the traditions of Finnish studio glass. We operate nationally and internationally. 

Where you can find us?
Mylly Glass is building own studio in Karkkila! Mylly Glass studio will be in our plot, the place where used to be the village's old mill. We will tell you more soon when we finish the studio. We are located only about 1 hour's drive from the capital region.
Now you can find our products in Vintamo vintage store in Karkkila, Högfors old mining district. Valurinkatu 2c, Karkkila.

Mylly is open to cooperation and development!

Description:
Üretim hayatına bir ağaç grup iştiraki olarak başlayan Thermostell üretim tesisi; grubun büyüyen ihtiyaçları karşısında, modernize edilen yönetim sisteminin ortaya çıkarttığı Day Şirketler Grubu’nun bir parçası olarak hizmet vermektedir.

 

Günümüzde çelik sanayi sektörünün ithal ürünler tarafından işgal edilmiş olan thermo mug ve matara alanında; ülkemizin öncü ve lider üretim tesisi olarak tüm sektöre hizmet veren Thermostell kendi markası Bienly yanı sıra pazardaki tüm markalar için de üretim yaparak kendi alanında ülkemizin ithal ürünlere olan bağımlılığına son vermiştir.   

 

Thermostell üretim tesisi; Türkiye'nin deniz ve kara ulaşım merkezi Gebze'de kurulu  ..... m² kapalı alana, ..... adet yıllık üretim kapasiteli,, en modern teknolojilerle donatılmış fabrikasında; sadece 304 kalite çeliği işleyerek, sağlıklı bir gelecek için tek kullanımlık değil, uzun ömürlü tasarım ürünler üretmektedir. Sağlık, çevre ve kalite bilincini teknolojik üretim yöntemleriyle birleştiren Thermostell ; otomasyon gücü, üretim esnekliği ve tedarik çeşitliliği sayesinde ülke ekonomisine maksimum fayda sağlamak amacıyla üretmeye devam etmektedir.

Name: Savazzi Balicco - Produzione di specchi
Description:
La Savazzi – Balicco S.r.l. è un'impresa specializzata nell'argentatura di vetri e cristalli. Attraverso un ciclo produttivo semi-automatizzato, argentiamo le lastre di vetro con un convogliatore per ottenere specchi di alta qualità. Operiamo nel settore dell'arredamento e della cosmetica, adottando tecniche specifiche in base alle esigenze dei clienti.

Siamo esperti nell'argentatura di lastre ultra sottili con spessori fino a 0,85 mm, anche di grandi dimensioni. La lavorazione richiede attenzione e competenza ed è svolta manualmente da personale qualificato. Testiamo regolarmente i prodotti utilizzando strumenti di precisione per garantire elevati standard di qualità.

La nostra produzione si distingue per l'estetica e la durabilità nel tempo. Utilizziamo materiali certificati e sostenibili, attrattivi anche per designer di fama. La nostra attività è nata nel 1947 da un incontro tra Ladino Savazzi e Augusto Balicco, che hanno collaborato fino alla scomparsa di Savazzi nel 1981.

Negli anni, abbiamo aggiornato le tecniche passando dall'argentatura manuale al bagno a bilico oscillante, fino all'acquisto del primo convogliatore automatico in Italia nel 1983. La nostra sede attuale ospita un impianto moderno e automatizzato per garantire la massima qualità.

Siamo gli ultimi rimasti delle 84 aziende lombarde che utilizzavano convogliatori per l'argentatura. La nostra resilienza e l'impegno ci hanno consentito di rimanere sul mercato senza dimenticare i valori fondamentali del nostro lavoro. Poniamo grande attenzione al cliente e al prodotto, utilizzando componenti certificati e sostenibili. La cura dei dettagli e l'innovazione delle tecniche sono il fondamento della nostra azienda.

L'argentatura dei vetri è un processo complesso che trasforma il vetro in superfici riflettenti.

Name: Lhotský studio
Description:
Studio Lhotský is one of Europe’s foremost studios specializing in kiln-cast glass for sculpture, architecture, and site-specific commissions. Founded in 1994 by artist and technologist Zdeněk Lhotský, the studio is based in the Czech Republic, in the historic workshop “Na Pelechově” — the birthplace of many of the world’s most iconic cast glass works.
This space continues the legacy of Stanislav Libenský and Jaroslava Brychtová, who first demonstrated the potential of cast glass for monumental expression at EXPO 58. Studio Lhotský proudly upholds and evolves this lineage through new materials, technologies, and international collaborations.

Name: LEADER GLASS LLC
Description: The Leader Glass llc was founded in 2015 originally for wholesale and retail trade of float glass. After some time, we decided to provide our customers with an additional service for collecting their glass cullet, which is generated during the production of insulated glass units and glass products. At this stage, we faced a problem with processing mirror cullet and any other covered cullet, because it cannot be sent for remelting into float glass without prior cleaning – impurities will clog the melting equipment and also reduce the degree of transparency of the glass obtained at the output. In 2017, we found a way to clean glass from mirror and other types of coating and gradually began to use it, discovering all the new features of this technology and improving the processing line. Over time, we optimized the processing process and achieved the ability to process covered cullet on an industrial scale. Today, we work with leading global manufacturers of float glass and successfully supply them with high-quality clear cullet obtained during the recycling of covered cullet. At the moment, the processing line allows recycling up to 100 tons of covered cullet per day. This capacity is not a limit and can be increased several times with the emergence of the appropriate volume of covered cullet to be recycled.

 DKGLASS – specjalizujemy się w precyzyjnej obróbce szkła płaskiego.
